chapters.title: Chapter 1492 - An Extraordinary Power?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1492 - An Extraordinary Power?

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"F*ck, boy, you must be bewitched!" Duan Jiude stared wide-eyed at Xu Que.

"Forget bewitchment, Your Holiness can guarantee upon my head that he has absolutely been deceived by the illusion." Buttface solemnly swore and was very certain.

They had met with the illusion just now, and only Xu Que had been fine after. It was not surprising that now it was Xu Que who had been struck by the illusion.

But the problem was that Xu Que was in the defense mechanism mode of the System and thus could be immune to the illusion for a period of time.

At this moment, he was very sure that the immunity period was not over yet and that it was absolutely impossible for him to have been struck by the illusion. He still unconditionally believed in the System's words.

However, if that was the case...what was going on here?

Xu Que frowned and directly summoned the System. An idea had come into his mind. "System, check what this piece of black cloth is."

DING! "After testing, the object is a shroud that has absorbed the last wisp of breath from a number of Celestial Primes, and this has given rise to a trace of spiritual intelligence." The System responded immediately.

"It gave rise to spiritual intelligence? Is that an Artifact Spirit? Why am I the only one who can hear her talking?" Xu Que was a little puzzled for the moment.

DING! "Due to the shroud's insufficient level, it doesn't have enough spiritual intelligence to develop into an Artifact Spirit. But in various environments, the spiritual intelligence of the shroud has transformed into an existence similar to that of an Artifact Spirit, although far less strong than an Artifact Spirit. It has been described as actually much closer to a ghost as described by mortals. Only a small number of people can perceive her voice." The System gave a detailed explanation.

Xu Que stared blankly and said, "So, in other words, I belong to a minority of people? Is it because of my inner purity and dashing appearance?"

DING! "As your intelligence is higher than the average person's, you can perceive this kind of voice."The System replied blandly.

"Ha, ha, ha, ha!"

Xu Que immediately laughed out loud.

"My intelligence is higher than the average person's."

Ha, ha, ha, this made sense. With the intelligence of Buttface and Duan Jiude, it was really normal that they couldn't hear the voice of this piece of black cloth.

"Boy, why did you burst out laughing?" Buttface was baffled by Xu Que's laughter.

"It's over. The illusion is too powerful." Duan Jiude's face became grim.

"No, no, no, it's not an illusion but a test of intelligence. Only people with superior intelligence can hear the voice of this piece of black cloth." Xu Que grinned and looked at Buttface and Duan Jiude. The corners of his lips ticked upward in amusement.

Buttface immediately sneered. He looked toward Duan Jiude with a face full of disdain and contempt.

Duan Jiude was instantly confused. He could understand that Xu Que had looked at him in this way. But what gave Buttface the right?

"Damn, Buttface, stop pretending! Can you hear the voice of the black cloth?" Duan Jiude immediately chided him.

"Utter nonsense! How do you know that Your Holiness can't hear it? Your Holiness just doesn't want to say it, that's all." Buttface looked smug.

"F*ck me, you're shameless..."

"Okay, okay, stop making a fuss. Let's take care of the black cloth first, and then you two can take care of proper business." When Xu Que saw that the two dunces were about to bicker again, he hurriedly interrupted Duan Jiude's words.

At the same time, a burst of fire leaped out from his palm. His eyes locked on the black cloth as he calmly smiled, "I'm giving you to the count of three. Hurry up and move aside. Otherwise, I'll throw a fire at you to burn you up."

"No, you horrible people, I'll never let you hurt my masters," the female voice behind the black cloth shouted.

Xu Que raised his eyebrows and shook his head as he chuckled and said, "Don't pretend, you devious wh*re. You weren't so innocent when you touched me just now. You relied on a broken shroud to grow to this point, but you also dared say that you didn't absorb the essence of these two dead people?"

"....." The black cloth instantly fell silent. It seemed that Xu Que had exposed its true colors, and it somehow didn't know how to continue.

"Hurry up and move aside. To be honest, it has nothing to do with me that you killed these people. I just want to wake up some of the powerful beings inside that room, and then I'll leave here right away. You don't have to try to stop me," Xu Que said with a smile.

Truthfully, he really was finding it very tiresome to deal with the black cloth. All he wanted was just to wake up a few Celestial Kings and then get a reward from the System so that he could immediately get the h*ll away from here.

However, as he finished talking, the black shroud abruptly emitted a murderous aura. And, with a WHOOSH, it swiftly disappeared.

"Huh?" Xu Que frowned. The piece of black cloth was really gone, but something was obviously not right about that murderous aura.

OOWWW!

Almost at the same time, Buttface howled in surprise and suddenly sprang up. "F*ck, this black cloth has struck me. D*mn it, she's sucking the blood of Your Holiness." Buttface growled and explained what was going on.

Xu Que looked over. The black shroud had completely coiled itself around Buttface's neck and was hanging there.

"It looks like you're really asking for death." Xu Que's face immediately darkened and he snarled in a deep voice.

"Oh, you think you can deal with me with the little ability you have? Do you think I only know how to produce illusions? Since the illusions are useless against you, I tried to be nice, but you refused to treat me as an equal. So don't blame me for making this fierce move." The female voice in the black cloth cackled in an extremely evil manner.

Xu Que shrugged his shoulders. The source of the black cloth's spiritual intelligence came from the last breaths of several Celestial Primes. It seemed as if this spiritual intelligence had more or less inherited the inner dark side of these Celestial Prime Elders.

But Xu Que was not inclined to try to eradicate evil. He also couldn't be bothered dealing with this ridiculous black cloth. But now that the black cloth had messed with them, he just couldn't take it any longer.

"System, turn on the retaliatory mechanism for me and help me get rid of this d*mn shroud." Xu Que had an idea and commanded the System.

The most troublesome thing about the black cloth was that it appeared and disappeared in a completely unpredictable way. It was so fast that he couldn't capture its tracks.

But under the System's retaliatory mechanism, there were strong tracking capabilities. Previously, it had been able to locate Li Xuanqi's Celestial Artifact. Now Xu Que was sure that it would be easy for it to locate the shroud.

DING! "Because the target's level is so low, it is not recommended to deploy the retaliatory mechanism. The host can use the enforced plunder function. According to the target's level, only 100 Acting Tough Points will be used up!"

The System beep sounded.

Xu Que stared blankly for a second and then asked, "If I deploy the retaliatory mechanism, how long is the whole process expected to take?"

DING! "At least 11 seconds!"

"Well, forget it then. Just use the enforced plunder function," Xu Que said.

The retaliatory mechanism required ten Acting Tough Points per second, which meant that 110 Acting Tough Points would be used up within 11 seconds. It was ten Acting Tough Points more than the enforced plunder function. Xu Que definitely didn't want to waste his Acting Tough Points.

BOOM!

Almost instantaneously, an invisible pulling force surged out from Xu Que's body and instantly swept forward.

The enforced plunder function was an element that the System had had for a long time. But this function didn't play a big role. It was only able to plunder some low-level things. For example, Living Holy Water could be forcibly obtained using this function.

Now that he had run into some trouble with this piece of black shroud, this enforced plunder function was effective because the black shroud's level was pretty low.

"Ah! What is that? Stop it, I won't intervene in this matter, quickly stop!" When the power of the System appeared, the black cloth burst out screaming.

Xu Que crossed his arms in front of his chest, looking indifferent. "It's either that I, the Act-Tough Saint, don't act, or I do. However, once I make my move, how can you expect me to stop? No way am I going to do that!"

HISS!

A crisp sound rang out in the air, and the power of the System forcibly tore the black cloth, ripping it apart in an instant.

AAAHHH!

The female voice of the black cloth gave a piercing scream.

The next moment, only a SWISH! could be heard, and the entire black cloth was swept up in an instant. Xu Que raised his hand and gave a wave. The black cloth was immediately taken in by the System's storage space and put away in one of its drawers.

Buttface was finally freed and fell on the ground, panting. His face was full of anger as he said, "Oh, let me get my paws on that rag. Your Holiness wants to kill her."

"Don't even think about it. If you had used a little more strength and just waved your paws, she would have already been broken." Xu Que threw Buttface a contemptuous look.

The physical body of this fool was clearly so strong, but it had been so frightened by a broken shroud that it didn't dare to fight back. If Buttface had been a bit more courageous he wouldn't have needed to waste 100 points of his own Acting Tough Points.

DING! "Detecting the Spiritual Intelligence within the shroud. After the System recycles it, the host will acquire an Extraordinary Power. Shall the recycling commence?"

Unexpectedly, the System beep rang out in Xu Que's mind.

Xu Que stared blankly for a moment.

An Extraordinary Power?

.....

chapters.title: Chapter 1493 - Open The Coffin And Look Inside
chapters.body:
Chapter 1493 - Open The Coffin And Look Inside

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"What the heck? I'm a famous cultivator. What do I need an Extraordinary Power for?"

Xu Que's initial reaction was to be stumped. He felt like asking the System whether they were extremely stupid.

But then the next moment he suddenly realized what he was being offered.

"An Extraordinary Power? X-ray vision? Mind reading? F*ck yes, I want this extraordinary power."

Xu Que shouted excitedly to the system, "Yes, quickly recycle it and give me the Extraordinary Power. I want X-ray vision."

A cultivator could use his soul strength to understand everything clearly and to see an enemy's Celestial Core Power flowing within his internal meridians and vessels.

However, even though this ability was more powerful than an X-ray, it couldn't stir one's blood like X-ray vision could.

With X-ray vision, one could see under others' clothes at any time. Soul strength would just see through the outside of the body to the bones and meridians right away. The two functions were not the same thing.

DING! "A mutant shroud has been successfully recycled, and 1,000 points of Weapon-Refining Essence have been obtained, as well as an Extraordinary Power."

The System beep sounded, and at the same time an introduction of the Extraordinary Power popped up on its interface.

: The ability obtained from the recycled mutant shroud is the ability to communicate with any article of clothing that the host puts on to acquire the secrets of the owner of said clothing. (Note: the closer the clothing is worn next to the skin, the more secrets you will obtain.)

"What???"

After Xu Que had read the introduction of the Extraordinary Power, he looked dumbstruck for a moment and didn't move from where he was standing. He was completely baffled.

"Speaking Clothes Spell?

"And he had to wear the other party's clothes in order to communicate with them?

"Come on, this is a crazy Extraordinary Power. Wearing other people's clothes to talk with them, and it's better to choose the clothes that are closest to the skin? Ah, have I got no shame?"

"System, are you playing with me? What kind of d*mn use does this lousy Extraordinary Power have? If I want to know the secrets of others, I can just conduct interrogation by torture. If that is of no use, I can force the soul to reveal its secrets. That would definitely be stronger than this Extraordinary Power no matter what." Xu Que immediately called out the System. He was extremely annoyed and wanted to settle a score with the System.

His recycled shroud had been used up in exchange for such an insignificant lousy ability, and this felt like a loss.

DING! "Any object, once recycled, cannot be returned." The System responded with complete indifference.

Xu Que sneered and shook his head.

"Forget it, the System's behavior was only something that was going to bother him for a day or two.

"Furthermore, the broken shroud wouldn't have been of any use to him. This whole incident really wouldn't have any impact on his life at all.

"But since the matter of secrets had been brought up..."

Xu Que glanced toward Buttface. He had known Buttface for so many years. And this fool had always kept his origins secret in a very mysterious way. Even thought he had said countless times that he was the descendant of the Ancient Magic Dragon, it had never been confirmed.

The point was that if Xu Que could get his hands of some of Buttface's close-to-the-body clothes, he might be able to acquire some real secrets about Buttface's previous lives and origins.

But the most important question now was where would he be able to find some of Buttface's close-to-the-body clothes?

Xu Que looked at Buttface's bare buttocks and couldn't help but fall into a deep contemplation.

"F*ck, boy, what are you doing? Why are you looking at Your Holiness's lower body?" Buttface became suddenly alert.

"Nothing, it's nothing. Next time you shed some fur, remember to collect it. I can make you a defensive Celestial Artifact," Xu Que replied in a lighthearted manner.

Although Buttface didn't wear any clothing, he had dog fur on his body that could be used to make clothes. Xu Que decided that he would look for a chance to shave some fur off Buttface's body and make a piece of clothing to wear. Perhaps he would really be able to acquire a lot of Buttface's hidden secrets.

"Is that true or false? Your Holiness's fur can be made into a Celestial Artifact? As expected, Your Holiness's body is full of treasures. But now what Your Holiness really wants to know is what is this run-down place?"

After Buttface had showed off a little, he began to complain about their surroundings again.

The entire cave was not very spacious. There was the small entrance area where they were located, and the rest was just the deeper part of the cave that had an altar filled with coffins.

The reason they were here was inside those coffins: the Supreme Existence of the Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes, which made Buttface and Duan Jiude afraid to make any reckless moves at the moment.

"Even thieves have a code. We will not touch those coffins." Duan Jiude immediately spoke up when he realized that Xu Que's eyes had been fixed on the coffins the entire time that they'd been in here.

It was not that they had a code. In truth, he was scared and was pretty sure that they couldn't afford to provoke those Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes.

"I didn't say I was going to touch them. What are you getting nervous about? First, you set up a few Trap & Kill Arrays here. Then I'll go inside myself and take a look. I'll be back right away."

Xu waved his hands and rushed straight toward the altar.

In any case, he had to wake up a Celestial King and then leave again. Otherwise, those attractive rewards that the System was going to give him would disappear.

SWISH!

With the accompaniment of a loud sound, Xu Que landed lightly on the altar and found himself standing in the middle of the coffins.

His arrival didn't cause any movements. All the coffins remained just as quiet as they'd been before. The surroundings were also very quiet. Only Buttface and Duan Jiude stood outside, watching him.

"Heh, heh, heh, wake one up, get a reward, and run."

Xu Que's mouth opened slightly and his eyes locked on the coffin resting next to him.

From what he could sense of the soul, it wasn't difficult to figure out that the person in this coffin was a Celestial King. He had fallen into a deep sleep in a kind of suspended animation state. His breathing was very shallow, but his cultivation stage hadn't weakened at all.

BANG!

Xu Que didn't hesitate. He immediately got out his Magic Art and cut through the seal outside of the coffin. Instantly, the entire outside covering that was made entirely of jade cracked open.

Inside the casket, a bronze casket was revealed.

All these noises and movements still didn't seem to have caused any awakening of the powerful being. Even Xu Que's strike, which had been powerful and loud, hadn't disturbed the tranquility.

"F*ck, I have a bad feeling about this. Don't tell me that the hardest part of this whole challenge is to wake up the person inside?" Xu Que frowned and hurriedly summoned the System to inquire about the details.

The System responded as if it knew beforehand what the question was going to be.

DING! "The host can rest assured that the difficulty of waking up the other party is not high. The moment the coffin is opened, the other side will be awakened!"

"Very well, even though I'm not sure what kind of trouble you devious System is trying to create, I'm still determined to get this round of rewards." Xu Que smiled boldly, and gathered his Celestial Core Power into his palm to slam toward that bronze coffin.

BANG!

With a muted sound, the bronze coffin suddenly shook violently, following which the whole coffin's cover flew open.

Sure enough, the System hadn't lied this time. It really hadn't been difficult to wake the Celestial King.

With an easy punch from Xu Que, the bronze coffin had opened right up.

At this moment, he caught a glimpse of the person lying inside the bronze coffin. Clad in a white, immaculate long dress, the person wore a feathered crown that seemed to have been formed from the cold, sparkling and bright.

It was actually a woman.

More important, this woman's facial features and profile were vaguely familiar. It seemed as if he knew her.

"F*ck, Xuanyuan Wanrong? No, it can't be her..." Xu Que was startled, but he soon gathered his senses.

Although the woman lying in the bronze coffin looked a little like Xuanyuan Wanrong, the entire feel of her, including her face, was off. She was somewhat different from Xuanyuan Wanrong.

However, if he wasn't guessing wrong, this woman must have been a blood descendant of Xuanyuan Wanrong.

"Yes or no? Xuanyuan Wanrong seemed to have said that she'd always been alone. Then who could the woman in the coffin be?"

Xu Que's face turned serious as he started to ponder the situation.

.....

chapters.title: Chapter 1497 - : Shameless Disciple
chapters.body:
Chapter 1497 - : Shameless Disciple

POOF!

After the seal spun around for a bit, Xu Que, Buttface, and Duan Jiude managed to successfully escape.

Behind them in the cave, they could hear an angry commotion that seemed to be getting louder and louder.

BANG!

An extremely loud sound rang out, and one of the bronze coffins shattered. A burly middle-aged man appeared. He waved his palm and summoned a strong gust of wind. It was directed toward the bronze coffin that Xu Que had opened.

This coffin, too, was shattered into pieces. A lady dressed in white appeared, and her restriction spell had been broken also. She was full of anger, and she was glaring at the middle-aged man.

“Why are you looking at me like that? Whose child is that?” The middle-aged man asked, furious.

“You know very well whose child it is? If you don’t want it, I’ll destroy it.” The lady in white answered coldly.

The middle-aged man froze, and then it struck him. He felt a sense of closeness and he could sense the same blood as the child’s coursing through him.

Finally, he heaved a sigh of relief. The child was his.

“H*ll yes, I want it, I want it, I want it. It’s my child. Why wouldn’t I want it.” The middle-aged man smiled and tried to pacify the lady. “Hong-er, don’t be angry. I was foolish and hadn’t seen things clearly yet. I didn’t know that you were already pregnant before you went into a deep sleep. It’s been so many years, our poor child.”

HMPH!

“I don’t blame you. It’s that b*stard. He went too far.” The lady in white, Xuanyuan Hong, said coldly. Recalling what Xu Que had done to her, she gritted her teeth.

Having been in cultivation for so many years, it was not like she hadn’t met any lecherous cultivators. However, ever since she had become an Immortal Cultivator, she hadn’t met these kind of cultivators for a long time.

This time around, it had been a dude from the Celestial Stage of the Great All-Embracing Heaven who had been so shameless. He had stolen her clothes, including some that were very close to her.

“It was because I saw that he was wearing your…ahem…your closest clothing. That’s why I got this mistaken idea about you. I am sorry.” The middle-aged man nodded, looking stern.

“He must be one of those disgusting people with a strange fetish. A shameless fool!” Xuanyuan Hong was furious. Although she hadn’t been violated, and it was only her clothing that had been stolen, it was still an enormous insult.

“What lady in the world would be able to endure having her closest piece of clothing stolen by a man?”

“That b*stard. He must have a thing for the clothing of ladies. What a man with such a strange fetish. This is the first time I’ve ever met someone like that. Hong-er, rest assured, I will wake up the others. Then we will hunt him down,” the middle-aged man said solemnly.

Xuanyuan Hong stared at the exit of the cave and replied coolly, “He has woken us up a century early. That’s already an unimaginable crime. When we get out of here, the first thing we have to do is to hunt him down. As for what happened to me just now, there’s no need to tell the others.”

“Hong-er, rest assured. I’m not that dumb. I wouldn’t tell the others about what just happened.” The middle-aged man smiled very caringly.

With that, he waved his palm, and the Qi in the entire cave was summoned and entered the other bronze coffins.

Although Xu Que had only woken the two of them up earlier than they should have been, now that they had been woken, they couldn’t allow the rest to continue hibernating.”

..…

At the same time, things were going on outside the cave, in the treasure vault of the Heaven Palace Academy.

Zixia Fairy and the others were still trying to break through the entrance. However, now Xu Que, Buttface, and Duan Jiude had returned. The three of them looked anxious, but didn’t look hurt.

“Oh, guys, let’s run, Brother Xu has created huge trouble.” Buttface had just landed but he shouted immediately toward Jiang Hongyan and the others.

“What happened?” Zixia Fairy, Jiang Hongyan, and all the rest of them wanted to know.

Then they looked toward Xu Que. He was wearing a lady’s white clothing and carrying a pale yellow belt. No one could understand why he was dressed so strangely.

“Dude, what did you do inside there?” Liu Jingning smiled meaningfully, her left eye winking at Xu Que.

“Don’t make any mistakes. I’m only dressed like this so we could get out of there,” Xu Que said seriously.

At that moment, he was definitely not in the mood to joke around. There were so many Celestial Kings and strong Celestial Primes in there.

If they hadn’t been awakened, he would be able to calm down now.

However, when he’d come out, it was clear that one of the Celestial Primes had woken up. Hence, there wouldn’t be much time left before the rest of them had woken up too.

If the whole lot of them came after him, he would really be in deep trouble.

“So that you could escape? You needed to wear those? These clothes are from which sl*t?” Liu Jingning laughed.

Jiang Hongyan and Zixia Fairy also stared at Xu Que without speaking.

Xu Que rolled his eyes and explained impatiently, “You guys won’t believe this, but I can speak to clothes. However, I need to wear them to speak to them. From this belt, I learned how to break the restriction spell. If you guys don’t believe me, ask Buttface and Duan Jiude.”

“I swear on my name that Brother Xu is speaking the truth.”

“That’s right. I didn’t believe him initially either, but later I saw it with my own eyes.”

Buttface and Duan Jiude nodded.

However, the words of the duo had long been disregarded by the masses. Nobody believed them anymore.

Xu Que noticed that Jiang Hongyan and the rest wore strange expressions. He added, “If you don’t believe me, pass me your closest clothing. I will prove it to you guys.”

PFFT!

Liu Jingning signaled her disapproval.

“Shameless,” Zixia Fairy said.

Jiang Hongyan smiled, then shook her head, indicating no.

“D*mn, I’m telling the truth.” Xu Que was very frustrated. “This d*mned skill…”

BOOM!

Right at that moment, a commotion resounded from behind the stone wall of the treasure vault. It sounded as if someone was casting spells.

Xu Que, Buttface, and Duan Jiude’s expressions changed.

“Things aren’t good. Hurry, we must retreat!” Xu Que shouted as his waved his hands and started to draw a Celestial-Grade Escape Emblem.

FLASH!

Before the others had any time to react, a light shone from Xu Que’s hands. It sucked all of them in, entering the void.

By the time the bunch of them had regained their composure they found themselves in a corner of the Ziwei Celestial Realm. It was an ancient city that was quite a distance away from the Heaven Palace Academy.

Nobody realized that Xu Que and his group had appeared outside the city’s entrance.

“What did you guys bump into inside there?” Zixia Fairy asked severely after taking in what Xu Que had done.

“Things are urgent. Talk later!” Xu Que couldn’t let his guard down. Based on his skills now, he would be asking for death if he had to face so many of those Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes. There was absolutely no need for that.

He had summoned the Information Interface of the System and immediately retrieved a couple of fake puppets. He distributed them to Jiang Hongyan and everyone else. They all changed their looks completely.

Even Buttface had his looks changed. He’d been turned into a small pig and was being held by Duan Jiude.

It was only after they had entered the ancient city and found a place to rest that Xu Que started to relax.

“Dude, is there going to be a problem with this?” Duan Jiude asked. He was feeling kind of nervous.

“It’s fine now. The Celestial Prime didn’t manage to make a mark on me. Now that I’ve changed my looks, he shouldn’t be able to trace us.” Xu Que waved his hands and sat down.

“Celestial Prime?” Zixia Fairy and the rest heard that and couldn’t help but be startled.

“There was a Celestial Prime inside the Heaven Palace Academy?”

Xu Que nodded and summed up what had happened inside the vault. As for how he had stolen the clothing of Xuanyuan Hong, he did not say much.

After Zixia Fairy and the rest heard the story, they sank into silence.

They had just resolved the Heaven Palace Academy issue. They hadn’t expected that the long-vanished Heaven Palace Sect would reappear.

“What this means then is that, back then, the strong rivals from the Heaven Palace Sect didn’t vanish, but they were asleep in that room?” Mo Junchen said thoughtfully.

“Things are not so simple!” Xu Que shook his head. He could still remember clearly what the belt had said. Xuanyuan Hong had once given chase to Xuanyuan Wanrong. Xuanyuan Wanrong had sunk into a deep sleep in the Celestial Burial Valley of the Four Continents. There must be some further story behind this.

As for what had exactly happened, the belt had no idea.

“Oh, right.” Xu Que recalled something and looked at Jiang Hongyan. “Hongyan, how’s Fei Fei doing these days?”

Back in the day, they had brought Xu Fei Fei to the Four Continents from Earth. Before they had had the chance to rescue her, she had fallen into the Celestial Burial Valley. Fortunately, Jiang Hongyan had been keeping her under protection, allowing her to recuperate and train.

It had been so many years that had passed now. Xu Que was very curious to know how far Xu Fei Fei had gone in her training.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 1498 - Enlightenment
chapters.body:
Chapter 1498 - Enlightenment

“It’s not been so long since she entered the Original Infant Stage,” Jiang Hongyan said softly, a little embarrassed.”It’s not been so long since she entered the Original Infant Stage,” Jiang Hongyan said softly, a little embarrassed.

“That’s good. To be able to enter the Original Infant Stage after a couple of years is already pretty decent,” Xu Que grinned as he tried to console Jiang Hongyan.

After all, Xu Fei Fei had started her cultivation much later than others. Besides, she had lived on Earth. In terms of both her physique and her potential, she wouldn’t be able to match up to any of the cultivators.

Despite all that, Xu Fei Fei did possess several mystical items, such as the Good Fortune Jade Disk. She’d also had the guidance and protection of Jiang Hongyan. These conditions were much better than those of other cultivators. Besides, to be cultivating under the Good Fortune Jade Disk, she would progress much faster than others.

To be able to enter the Early Infant Stage in just a couple of years was already considered very fast to most cultivators.

However, for Xu Fei Fei, who had had so many advantages, it was considered rather slow.

Jiang Hongyan had also trained under the Good Fortune Jade Disk. After the Crossing Calamity Stage, she had entered the Half-Celestial Stage. After that, and in no time, she had entered the Golden Celestial Stage.

To most common cultivators, disregarding the elites, to be able to cross over these stages would require at least a few thousand years.

What that meant was that by practicing under the Good Fortune Jade Disk, Jiang Hongyan was able to shave off a few thousand years.

However, Xu Fei Fei had only just entered the Early Infant Stage.

This was why Jiang Hongyan had looked stressed. Clearly, she had been disappointed in Xu Fei Fei’s progress in cultivation. It was turning out to be much slower than she had hoped for and expected.

Xu Que understood deep down that there was only one reason for that: Xu Fei Fei was born with an inferior potential.

“The Good Fortune Jade Disk is able to improve the Spiritual Root. Besides, it is also able to refine the muscles. Over the past years, Fei Fei’s physique has achieved perfection. However, for some reason, she is unable to catch up on the cultivation speed.” Jiang Hongyan shook her head lightly, brows knitted.

Obviously, she had been mulling over this issue.

“It’s okay. Once we have resolved the problems of the Heaven Continent, I will check in with Fei Fei. I don’t think it’ll be a huge problem.” Xu Que was calm. As long as there was time for him to test out the System, the problem of Xu Fei Fei’s cultivation could be easily resolved in a matter of minutes.

However, it was not the time now to do that. Right now, the priority was the strong opponents from the cave. There were more than ten Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes. All of them came from the Heaven Palace Academy back in the old days. After they were awakened, it wouldn’t be tough for them to escape the seal. In no time, the top elites in the Heaven Continent would be changed.

This meant that huge mess would fall upon the Heaven Continent. Under such circumstances, it wouldn’t be the most brilliant plan for Xu Fei Fei to appear.

Xu Que decided to continue to wait for a while.

Meanwhile…

A few days passed.

Xu Que and the others remained in the Resting Inn in the ancient city. However, in the outside world, it seemed that there was no news of those strong opponents.

Instead, there was news about how Xu Que had single-handedly killed so many Celestial Kings that spread throughout the Heaven Continent.

He first used the Tribulations to kill ten Celestial Kings outside Tian Sha City. While doing that, he had managed to scare off two Celestial Primes who had come from outside the area. Then Xu Que had gone to the Heaven Palace Academy. With his own skills, he’d managed to kill three Celestial Kings and destroy the Heaven Palace Academy.

That had shocked countless cultivators in the Heaven Continent. They were in disbelief.

“My goodness! I initially thought that Xu Que’s father was very skillful. I didn’t expect that Xu Que would be even more ruthless.”

“That’s too scary. If it hadn’t been for the fact that so many people saw it with their own eyes, I wouldn’t have dared to believe one bit of this story.”

“I heard that Xu Que is only at the level of Disbanded Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven. However, he’s managed to kill the founder of the Heaven Palace Academy, Li Xuanqi.”

“No, I heard that he is a True Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven. He was up against two, and he killed two Ancestral Celestial Kings from the Sage Sect.”

“That’s not true. He is really a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven. Someone said that after he killed the two Ancestral Celestial Kings from the Sage Sect, his body emitted some sort of strength. He’s obviously a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven.”

“Regardless, that man is truly scary!”

In every corner of the Heaven Continent, people were discussing Xu Que’s skills.

While everyone was shocked by his skills, nobody dared to question them.

The Heaven Palace Academy had really been left in shambles. All of the deans and the Elders had been killed off. The disciples had all fled, returning to their respective clans and sects. Also, in less than one day, these clans and sects had announced that they wanted to get along with the Exploding Heavens Faction. Some of them had even willingly requested to join the Exploding Heavens Faction, to be affiliated with the Exploding Heavens Faction.

Regardless of how the outside world had been shaken, Xu Que persisted in not revealing himself.

He was very curious why the powerful beings from the Heaven Palace Academy had yet to appear. That was strange.

More than ten days had passed!

Xu Que finally could wait no longer.

Now, close to one month had passed, and there was still no news of those higher beings from the Heavens Palace Academy. However, Xu Que was certain that they must have left that place. It was just that they didn’t want to show themselves.

“This can’t do. We need to get someone to check it out. We can’t hide forever.” Xu Que summoned everyone over and made a suggestion.

“That’s right, I agree! However, I haven’t been feeling my best lately. I’m afraid I can’t go.” Buttface first agreed with Xu Que and then acted like he was ill. He was trying to show that he was unable to take on the task of checking out what was going on outside.

“Me, the old man, will have to prepare for Crossing a Tribulation. I really don’t have the bandwidth to check out the beings from the Heaven Palace Academy, although I would like to.” Duan Jiude sighed and spoke regretfully.

Indeed, he had been making progress in his practicing. The Heavenly Tribulations would come soon, hence, he wouldn’t be able to help.

However, it was clear to everyone that even if Duan Jiude didn’t have to face the Heavenly Tribulations, it was impossible that he would take on the task. The regret on his face right now was fake, and he was really good at acting.

Xu Que threw a look of scorn at Buttface and Duan Jiude before he smiled and said, “Shut up, the two of you. I didn’t say that I’m asking one of our own to go. We can just ask someone else to help.”

“Someone else? Who?” Buttface and Duan Jiude heaved a sigh of relief.

The rest of them also looked at Xu Que, expectantly.

The corner of Xu Que’s lips twitched, and he said, “It’s time to make a trip to Jade Lake.”

“What? Going to Jade Lake to cause trouble again?” Duan Jiude said, wide-eyed.

“What do you mean causing trouble! Jade Lake has been sealed, and they said that they will wash their hands of all matters. However, I guess they can’t wait for us to knock on their doors.” Xu Que laughed, “After all…they don’t know that there are still people from the old days in the Heaven Palace Academy.”

“You’re not being too nice to them,” Duan Jiude said as he shook his head.

“Chill, this time we won’t bully them. We are just going to give them some enlightenment.” Xu Que laughed.

“What? What kind of enlightenment? Give me some first.” Buttface rushed forward, looking ecstatic.

Xu Que gave his head a push and then said contemptuously, “If you were half as beautiful as the ladies at Jade Lake, then I wouldn’t mind giving you some enlightenment.”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1507 - 1507 What Gives You The Right?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1507 - 1507 What Gives You The Right?

1507 What Gives You the Right?

“Xu Que?”

Countless people who were present immediately opened their eyes wide and stared disbelievingly.

“Why had this fool come here? Was he here to cause trouble?”

“This is…” Bai Cailing, the Jade Lake Saint, looked especially startled.

Previously, when they’d been in the Jade Lake, she’d attempted to invite Xu Que to come here with her, because the Heaven Palace Sect had secretly issued an order to pursue and capture Xu Que. In the end, Xu Que had rebuffed her, so she hadn’t persisted. She’d intended to turn a blind eye to Xu Que’s whereabouts and also ordered the internal sections of the Jade Lake not to divulge Xu Que’s movements.

And now, this guy had actually come over here by himself and even exposed his identity. It seemed as if he was just courting death.

“You animal!” Xuanyuan Hong’s face changed on the spot and became murderous-looking.

The fact that Xu Que had woken them up early had already infuriated the members of the Heaven Palace Sect. But, not only that, this fool had had the nerve to take off some of her clothes while they were still in the cave. He was nothing less than a monster.

“Is this the man who made us wake up nearly 100 years too early?” The old man of the Heaven Palace Sect glared at Xu Que with an icy gaze and asked in a deep voice.

“It’s him.” Xuanyuan Hong nodded coolly.

“Then he should die.” The old man of the Heaven Palace Sect pronounced this sentence, suffused with a murderous aura.

It was true that 100 years to people at these cultivation stages could only be considered as a snap of the fingers. However, this 100 years had been very critical. It had been their last chance to rest and accumulate strength until the natural collapsing of the Heaven Continent’s shackles. When they woke up, everyone’s cultivation stage was supposed to have achieved a breakthrough.

But the problem was that when Xu Que had jolted them awake ahead of time, their cultivation stages had all been stuck at the thresholds of their breakthroughs, and they weren’t able to finish them.

And, at the same time, due to the emergence of all these people of the Celestial King and Celestial Prime stages, the collapse of the Heaven Continent’s shackles had accelerated from nearly 100 years to simply dozens of days.

As a result, it was certainly understandable that all their hate was targeted at Xu Que.

“Yo, there sure seem to be a lot of my acquaintances…” As Xu Que revealed his true appearance inside the restrictive barrier of the Taoist Sanctum, he looked around, wearing his signature sneer playing on the corners of his mouth.

Ming Yixuan was thoroughly shocked to see Xu Que and couldn’t help but shiver to himself. He thought of the battle a few days ago in the Heaven Palace Academy. He’d watched helplessly as this evil person had beheaded three Celestial Kings, while he could only frantically run away in fear.

Although he hadn’t participated in that battle, it had become an inner terror in his soul. It was a terrifying fear. And now Xu Que had appeared in front of him. He couldn’t stop trembling.

“So…so afraid. This is too scary!”

“Ming Yixuan!” Suddenly, a crisp cold shout roused Ming Yixuan.

He sought out the voice that had called to him and looked over. Xuanyuan Hong stared at him with a face full of gloom and said in a deep voice, “Anyone who is of Celestial King stage and above cannot pass through the restrictive barrier, but we can help you with Mind Sense. We all are going to assist you with all of our strength to kill this man.”

BOOM!

Her voice had just faded away when several Celestial Kings of the Heaven Palace Sect instantly unleashed a boundless mighty force, which seemed like the sudden arrival of an invisible huge mountain, which landed with a thud on Xu Que.

The ground beneath Xu Que’s feet ruptured on the spot. He seemed to have some difficulty straightening his body. It was as if it had become arduous to budge, having to bear such a huge pressure.

“You b*stard, Ming Yixuan, why aren’t you quickly making your move?” Xuanyuan Hong shouted at this time.

“Yes!” Only then did Ming Yixuan swiftly snap to attention and look at Xu Que, who was seemingly pinned down and unable to move. The fear in his heart slowly diminished, and was closely followed by a sudden rise in an intense hatred.

“What is it? Touch me if you dare.” Xu Que scoffed at him. He appeared nonchalant but a cold sweat had already broken out across his forehead, as if he was finding it hard to bear the powerful pressure.

Ming Yixuan’s eyes began to look fierce and the corners of his mouth slightly opened. His heartbeat began to accelerate as he said through gritted teeth, “Xu Que, all the hatred new and old that I’ve had for you, I’m going to clearly settle all of it with you today! I’m going to kill my inner demons.”

SWISH!

In an instant, Ming Yixuan started to move. He unsheathed his sharp sword and slashed across the void. The trailing shadow of his sword looked like it came from a divine sword from the heavens, bright and cold, and it enveloped Xu Que.

“Oh, pathetic.” Xu Que scoffed. An idea came to him, and he directly activated the System’s retaliatory mechanism.

A mass of liquid metal suddenly gushed out from his interior, pervading his whole body, and solidifying into a black metal.

CLING CLANG! CLING CLANG! CLING CLANG!

Amid numerous clinking sounds of metal hitting against metal, Xu Que had been completely encased in metal in the blink of an eye. The Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Rod that he held in his hands had also been encased with a layer of metal. His imposing manner soared straight off the charts.

“Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Umbrella!”

The Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Rod in his hands transformed. The metal blocks rushed toward the top of the rod and unfurled into a metal umbrella, which spanned across the front of his body to protect it.

BANG! BANG! BANG!

The trailing shadow of Ming Yixuan’s sword smashed down and struck the surface of the metal umbrella heavily, triggering sounds like explosions.

However, it became almost like the definition of the phrase: to start off with a bang and end with a whimper.

After the edge of the sword touched the metal umbrella, it was immediately deflected, almost like an egg hitting steel.

Not only was Xu Que not injured, he was even able to use this action to help the Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Umbrella to free him from the restraints of the Heaven Palace Sect.

BOOM!!

The mighty force that the Mind Sense of the various Celestial Kings of the Heaven Palace Sect had placed on Xu Que was immediately crushed by the Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Umbrella.

“Wh…whaaat?”

“How is that possible?”

Xuanyuan Hong and several of the other strong people of the Heaven Palace Sect’s faces changed. They all looked incredulous. Every single one of them, including the great powerful Ancestral Celestial Kings, opened their eyes wide as they gasped.

Although they had heard before that Xu Que had a strange Divine Weapon that was able to change forms and that he had killed three Celestial Kings by himself, now that they had witnessed it with their own eyes, they’d realized how shocking it really was.

The fact that a rod could actually change so quickly into an umbrella and that it could directly shatter the mighty force of the Mind Sense of the Heaven Palace Sect’s several Ancestral Celestial Kings was mind-boggling.

“What kind of Divine Weapon was this?”

SWISH!

At the same time, once Xu Que had regained his freedom from the pressure of the Mind Sense of the Heaven Palace Sect , his entire person had suddenly come alive like a runaway wild horse. In a flash, he’d transformed into a shadow and dashed straight toward Ming Yixuan.

“No!” Ming Yixuan looked frightened and then frantically tried to retreat as he roared in a panic, “If you dare to kill me, I will write Jiang Hongyan’s name in the Heavenly Book of Taiyi when I die to force them to bury her together with me.”

Amid all the shouting, he had already pulled out the Heavenly Book of Taiyi. Meanwhile, with a wave of his hands, he had already started writing the name.

It was not just a verbal threat from him, but he was really going to put it into action and write Jiang Hongyan’s name in the Heavenly Book of Taiyi. In this way, not only would he ensure that he would get Jiang Hongyan, but also he could prevent Xu Que from moving to kill him. It was the equivalent of holding a death-exemption card.

“What gives you the right? Who do you think you are?”

Xu Que heaped scorn on him as the Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Umbrella in his hands tilted forward slightly. The tip of the umbrella shot out a black blade.

POP!

Ming Yixuan had no time for any reaction before his two wrists were linked and twined by the black blade, and fresh blood then splashed out.

AAHH!

He screamed and his arms froze where he was. He couldn’t move anymore.

The black blade that had sprung out of the Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Umbrella was a metal hook with a black metal wire. On the one hand, it could seize others’ divine weapons. On the other hand, it could also be used as a concealed weapon, which was successful in every endeavor.

“Did you really think of yourself as the One Chosen by Heaven just because you’d obtained the Heavenly Book of Taiyi?” Xu Que tugged at the Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Umbrella to control both of Ming Yixuan’s hands as he sneered at him. “With one punch, not only can I destroy the Heavenly Book of Taiyi, I can even blow up your death-exemption card.”

BOOM!

Xu Que held up a fist. Two fireworks sprang out, one black and one white, and they twisted around his fist. It looked just like the famous Black-and-White Flaming Fist.

“Stop!!” Out of the blue, Xuanyuan Hong and several of the other strong people of the Heaven Palace Sect exclaimed the moment they saw the flame.

Xu Que remained unmoved. With a flash of anger in his eyes, his fist shot out and the two blasts of black-and-white flames sprang up instantly and transformed into the two heads of the black-and-white Fire Kylin, which shot straight toward Ming Yixuan’s male member.

“No, no, no… Ah!!!” Ming Yixuan was in a total state of panic but couldn’t move at all.

BANG!

In the blink of an eye, the two Fire Kylins blasted Ming Yixuan’s male member. His crotch area was immediately badly mangled and a burning smell filled the air.

HISS!

Gasps could be heard coming from all directions.

Everyone was horror-struck, feeling a chill in their nether regions.

This…was too vicious. With one shot, his ability to produce heirs had been completely cut off.

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1508 - 1508 What Does He Want To Do?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1508 - 1508 What Does He Want To Do?

1508 What Does He Want to Do?

AAAHHH!!

An ear-piercing, miserable shriek, heartrending and distressing, rang out loudly throughout the Taoist Sanctum.

Ming Yixuan stood, clamping his legs together tightly, his eyes bulging with so much pain that he didn’t really want to live. He was soon to go insane.

Everyone present also looked completely horror-stricken. No one had expected that Xu Que could be so very vicious and brazen. He clearly had had plenty of opportunity to kill Ming Yixuan, but instead he’d insisted on striking his nether regions to torture and humiliate him.

“It’s terrible.”

“I almost wet my pants from watching it!”

“Ming Yixuan should never have used Jiang Hongyan to threaten him. I have long heard of this guy’s temper. He is said to be a madman when it comes to being protective of his many women!”

…..

Many people started discussing this terrible incident in low voices. At such a time, no one cared about the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi. On the one hand, it was because the ancestors of the Heaven Palace Sect had announced the end of the ceremony. On the other hand, it was because no one dared to enter the Taoist Sanctum at this time. In case one really became the One Chosen by Heaven, wouldn’t one be courting death at this time if he were to enter?

“You disgusting scumbag, let him go.” Xuanyuan Hong reproved Xu Que in a stern voice on the outside of the restrictive barrier.

She shot the boundless mighty force of the Heaven Palace Sect again toward Xu Que, trying to save Ming Yixuan.

The rest of the Heaven Palace Sect’s powerful Celestial Kings followed suit one by one, as did the other forces’ Celestial Kings.

“Boy, how dare you show such impudence toward my Heaven Palace Sect?” A thunderous, murderous roar came from the sky, as if someone had torn apart the void. It was deafening.

Several figures were galloping over from the mountains in the far distance. There was not only strong Celestial Kings among them, but also three powerful Celestial Primes. Their murderous aura was overbearing and suffocating.

“Oh no, time to pull out,” Zixia Fairy said as she suddenly frowned and looked at Xu Que.

With her current strength, she could only hinder one powerful Celestial Prime from the Heaven Palace Sect at the most. If the other three rushed in, then she and Xu Que would be in big trouble.

“Okay!”

Xu Que also noticed that the rest of the strongmen were rushing over. He got ready to retract the metal hook on the Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Umbrella and kill Ming Yixuan.

However, a pair of bloody hands suddenly pulled the metal hook hard and firmly grasped it.

“What?” Xu Que stared blankly for a moment and was startled.

Ming Yixuan’s face was full of malevolence and madness as he glared angrily at Xu Que while he gave a loud deranged laugh, “Ha, ha, ha, Xu Que, did you even check with me if you can run? I am the Divine Being of Taoist Fetus. My ability to recover from injuries is extraordinary, akin to taking the Elixir of Life. I…”

At this point, Ming Yixuan was suddenly stumped for words, his voice screeched to a halt, and his eyes slowly drifted down to look at his own male member. His eyes looked shocked.

“No, it’s impossible, my…” His trembling, frightened voice drew everyone’s attention.

All eyes swept toward his crotch area. The clothing had long been burned to ashes. The physical flesh of that area, which had been burnt to a crisp and blackened by the Fire Kylin, was visibly recovering at a rapid pace at this moment. However, it was completely smooth. There was no male member that could be seen.

“What…what was going on with Ming Yixuan?”

“A barren land?”

Many people stared in profound disbelief.

Xu Que also hadn’t expected this. Ming Yixuan’s d*ck had been blown up and now he couldn’t recover?

However, he thought about Buttface, when he’d been affected by the Fiery Lotus that one time and the fur on his buttocks had been burned clean off. The fur had never grown back, it suddenly dawned on Xu Que.

This flame that he had used this time had been quite strange. It had been upgraded by a full level. It made sense that with Ming Yixuan’s level of strength, even if he was the Divine Being of Taoist Fetus, he could not take it on.

BOOM!

All of a sudden, the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi ,which had been deathly quiet this whole time, shook again.

The Heavenly Book of Taiyi that had been floating in front of Ming Yixuan was pulled back by the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi and returned to its original position, rescinding Ming Yixuan’s identity as the One Chosen by Heaven.

“Oh, no! He’s lost the ability to perform in the bedroom, and now he’s been disqualified to become the One Chosen by Heaven.” Xuanyuan Hong’s face changed immediately.

Losing Ming Yixuan as the One Chosen by Heaven was a huge loss for the Heaven Palace Sect.

“Bah, ha, ha, ha!” Xu Que laughed out loud, rejoicing in Ming Yixuan’s misfortune. Fortunately, he had a Holy Physique, although he didn’t know how much more powerful it was as compared to Ming Yixuan’s Divine Being of Taoist Fetus body. He was happy that the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi had taken back the Heavenly Book of Taiyi in the end. And now Ming Yixuan’s Heavenly Book of Taiyi had also been taken away, which brought more of a sense of balance to Xu Que’s mentality.

“No, Seniors, save me!” Ming Yixuan panicked at this time. Never mind that he’d lost his male member. There would always be a way to remedy that. But once he’d lost the Heavenly Book of Taiyi, then it would mean losing an important patron like the Heaven Palace Sect.

Unfortunately, the people of the Heaven Palace Sect couldn’t enter the center of the Taoist Sanctum. Furthermore, they weren’t able to affect the Heavenly Book of Taiyi.

Ming Yixuan tried to snatch back his Heavenly Book of Taiyi, but his hands and the metal hook were entangled. Other than matching his strength with Xu Que, he simply couldn’t seize the Heavenly Book of Taiyi.

BANG!

With a crisp sound, everyone could only watch helplessly as Ming Yixuan’s Heavenly Book of Taiyi returned to its original owner and slowly fell back to the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi and merged into it. No traces of it having been cut out could be seen.

WHOOSH!

Almost at the same time, a cool breeze blew past and Ming Yixuan opened his mouth wide and shouted. But his voice couldn’t be heard as his entire person was turned into dust as the breeze blew past and he was scattered along with the breeze.

It was as if he had never existed in this world. He vanished like smoke in thin air.

The entire scene fell into a dead silence.

Xu Que was also stupefied and felt palpitations in his heart.

“What kind of power was this? A gust of wind in the blink of an eye could so easily erase a Divine Being of Taoist Fetus at the Golden Celestial Stage?

“Moreover, if he had allowed the Heavenly Book of Taiyi to be taken back just now, then would he himself have been scattered with the wind at this time as well?

“Was this the power of the Way of Heaven?

“No, no, this must have been caused by the power of the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi, which contained the power of a Deity. In other words, to be precise, that kind of power they’d just witnessed was from a Deity.”

“Xu Que, you animal!” At this moment, an angry roar rang out.

The Celestial Kings of the Sage Sect were crazy with fury. They’d wanted to rely on Ming Yixuan to strike up a relationship with a powerful backer like the Heaven Palace Sect.

But now, everything was gone. With Ming Yixuan’s death, the Sage Sect was thoroughly in trouble. After all, as compared with the other forces, the number of Ancestral Celestial Kings in the Sage Sect was small, and Xu Que had killed two of them. Their former supremacy in the Heaven Continent apparently no longer existed.

But even more furious than the people of the Sage Sect were the many strongmen of the Heaven Palace Sect.

Xuanyuan Hong and the others had stopped rebuking him at the moment. Their cold eyes were staring at Xu Que intently, like hungry wolves wanting to pounce on Xu Que to tear him into pieces at any time.

The One Chosen by Heaven was the key to their control of the Heaven Continent. Now seeing the destruction of their seedling Ming Yixuan meant that they were only left with two choices. They could either continue to search for another One Chosen by Heaven or capture Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong alive.

But the time was already tight. Xuanyuan Wanrong’s strength was way beyond their control, and it was impossible to seek Xuanyuan Wanrong in just ten short days.

Therefore, these strongmen of the Heaven Palace Sect didn’t need any more discussion. They had already chosen what to do: kill Xu Que to assuage their anger and then continue to look for a new One Chosen by Heaven.

“Kill that woman and force that little animal to come out from there,” Xuanyuan Hong said with a cold and gloomy face. She reached out her hands to Zixia Fairy.

Xu Que was still within the restrictive barrier so they couldn’t do anything to Xu Que for the time being. But Zixia Fairy was outside the Taoist Sanctum’s restrictive barrier. Her odds of victory were slim up against a dozen Celestial Kings and one Celestial Prime, not to mention the few Celestial Kings and three powerful Celestial Primes from the Heaven Palace Sect who were due to arrive soon.

“Xuan’er, you must withdraw.” Xu Que looked calm and shouted with a smile.

Zixia Fairy didn’t hesitate. She nodded and took out a talisman, which was a Celestial Grade Escape Emblem.

Although this section of the Heaven Palace Sect’s Taoist Sanctum had been hidden in the Ziwei Celestial Realm for many years, the void had not been sealed. With a Celestial Grade Escape Emblem, coupled with her own strength, she could tear the void instantly and disappear right in front of the eyes of everyone present.

“A Celestial Grade Escape Emblem?” The faces of Xuanyuan Hong and many other of the strong Celestial Kings changed.

A Celestial Grade Escape Emblem was extremely rare and precious. This kind of talisman that could tear the void was a rare treasure indeed.

“Heh, heh, heh…”

Xu Que’s roguish laughter rang out at this time. He also took out another Celestial Grade Escape Emblem, but was not worried about using it. Instead, he swept his glance toward that huge Heavenly Stone of Taiyi. His eyes glittered with mischief.

“What…what is this guy going to do?”

“F*ck, the expression in his eyes gives me a bad feeling!”

BANG!

Suddenly, a loud noise rang out.

Xu Que rushed toward the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi. He flung the Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Umbrella across it. It divided in two and became two huge metal boxing gloves in the air. They automatically sheathed his hands and groped toward the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi.

“Stop!” Xuanyuan Hong and the others seemed to realize what was going on. Their faces turned pale from fear and they shouted loudly.

Xu Que didn’t care at all. He spread open his arms. Two huge metal gloves, one on the left, one on the right, bore down on that huge Heavenly Stone of Taiyi. With an enormous POP, the whole huge Heavenly Stone of Taiyi was directly shaken up and carried off the ground.

“F*ck!”

“What the f*ck!”

The disciples of all the major forces in the whole arena shouted in fright, one by one. Every single person present was completely flabbergasted.

“This guy had actually picked up the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi?”

“What does he want to do?”

Xuanyuan Hong and many others were standing open-mouthed, with their eyes twitching. All the Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes had unleashed boundless mighty forces to try and stop Xu Que.

However, under the System’s retaliatory mechanism, Xu Que was in full body metal armor that completely protected him. He was able to carry away the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi.

As he left, he turned and looked at all the shocked and incredulous looks of everyone present. With the talisman in his hand, he absolutely radiated from the glow of this moment!

A ripple instantly emerged in the void, and the figure of Xu Que, carrying the enormous Heavenly Stone of Taiyi, completely vanished in the blink of an eye.

chapters.title: Chapter 1509 - 1509 Reunion
chapters.body:
Chapter 1509 - 1509 Reunion

1509 Reunion

“Wh…what?””Wh…what?”

“The Heavenly Stone of Taiyi has been stolen?”

“You couldn’t really call it theft. He did it in broad daylight. Just grabbed it and took off.”

“How else can they pick the One Chosen by Heaven?”

All of a sudden, the crowd who had been waiting for the One Chosen by Heaven ceremony erupted with questions.

The operation that Xu Que had carried out was extremely natural and smooth. It had merely taken a moment, and, by the time anyone had reacted, he’d already picked up the stone and was long gone.

The female disciples from the Jade Lake were also flabbergasted. Bai Cailing looked completely startled, and she laughed bitterly. She asked herself why she hadn’t expected Xu Que would actually do this? Now that he had really offended the Heaven Palace Sect, would there ever be a place for him to seek shelter in the Heaven Continent again?

The many strongmen of the Heaven Palace Sect were walking around with thunderous expressions on their faces. Their fury had skyrocketed almost out of control.

“D*mn it. We actually let him slip away.” A Celestial King’s murderous aura suddenly suffused his whole body. The pressure in his body had built up to such an extent that when he released some of it, cracks appeared on the ground underneath his feet.

“The means that this fellow used are ever-changing. He actually had methods of changing his appearance and presence. He achieved his aim through underhanded means, which we haven’t been able to detect.” Everyone frowned, and people were walking around with depressed expressions on their faces.

“If we can’t take back the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi, the consequences will be unimaginable!”

“We must find him. Even if we have to dig deep underground to look for him, we can’t let him get away with this.” Xuanyuan Hong was grim-faced as she spoke.

…..

At the same time, in the Ziwei Celestial Realm, several thousands of miles away from the Heaven Palace Academy, a burst of ripples could be seen in the sky, which were followed by a brilliant glow. A figure flew out from within the ripples, carrying a boulder. It was Xu Que.

“Xu Que, what the h*ll have you done?” Zixia Fairy had been waiting here for what seemed like a very long time. They had previously devised an escape route and had agreed to meet up here.

But when she saw Xu Que arrive, carrying out the entire Heavenly Stone of Taiyi, she was suddenly struck dumb.

“Heh, heh, heh, if I didn’t take this lousy boulder away, how could I prevent them from continuing to search for the One Chosen by Heaven? Better to be safe than sorry!” Xu Que sniggered and landed on the ground.

With a BANG, the ground immediately caved in from the weight of the boulder.

“Are you going to continue to carry it wherever we go like this?” Zixia Fairy frowned. For Xu Que to carry such a large boulder, even if he changed his appearance or presence, it was still sure to attract attention. Their whereabouts would certainly become exposed if he kept on carrying the stone.

“I want to get rid of it, but I can’t figure out how to do this safely,” Xu Que said with a wry smile.

The weight of this Heavenly Stone of Taiyi had completely surpassed his imagination. With his second-rate Holy Physique, coupled with the increased power of the System’s retaliatory mechanism, it was still extremely hard to move.

Xu Que had also tried to put the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi into the System’s storage space, but that idea was rejected by the System in the end. The System at its current level was unable to accept the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi, which contained a lot of God’s Strength.

However, in addition to the System’s storage space, the World of the Green Lotus in Xu Que’s own Dantian also had a place to accept it.

But for an item that even the System didn’t dare to accept, Xu Que also didn’t intend to rush to try it out. He himself had no way to control the small world derived from the chaos of the Green Lotus. How could he dare to toss in the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi so recklessly?

Therefore, left without any other choices, he had to carry the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi with him the entire way.

Fortunately, Xu Que had another Divine Item. The Divine Aperture’s Shell could isolate them from the world and let them become invisible in order to move in the world. The Heavenly Stone of Taiyi wouldn’t be detected by people as long as they were under the Divine Aperture’s Shell.

The only problem with using the Divine Aperture’s Shell was that they couldn’t really use a teleportation device for traveling. They needed to travel all the way across the Ziwei Celestial Realm and then rush to the Tianxiang Celestial Realm.

For more than ten days, Xu Que and Zixia Fairy traveled until they finally arrived at a mountain outside the Tianxiang Celestial Realm.

Jiang Hongyan and Liu Jingning had been staying here to wait for Xu Que, and they’d even built a small, comfortable cave dwelling.

Before Xu Que had returned, Jiang Hongyan and Liu Jingning had lived here happily. The forests here in the mountain were as beautiful and quiet as ever, and signs of human habitation were rare.

Jiang Hongyan and Liu Jingning had been undisturbed for more than ten days and had been immersed in their states of cultivation.

Jiang Hongyan and Liu Jingning appeared very surprised to see Xu Que arrive with such an enormous boulder. They were even more astounded to learn that the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi was the boulder that assigned the Heavenly Book of Taiyi.

“This guy had actually snatched such a precious Heavenly Stone of Taiyi?”

“Wouldn’t the Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes of the Heaven Palace Sect be furious?”

Even if they had not been at the scene, Jiang Hongyan and Liu Jingning could imagine those people’s flustered and exasperated appearances. After all, it was not the first time that their fellow, Xu Que, had done this kind of wicked deed.

“Oh, yeah, you mustn’t use your Mind Sense to communicate with the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi. Otherwise we could be in big trouble if you accidentally become the One Chosen by Heaven.” Xu Que warned them all specifically.

The One Chosen by Heaven was simply a scam. If he had had a choice, he would never have wanted to be some lousy One Chosen by Heaven.

“Now I can only hope that Buttface and the others can really find Xuanyuan Wanrong and ask her if there’s any way to take back the Heavenly Book of Taiyi. Even if it can’t be taken back, I have to control the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi and not let the One Chosen by Heaven appear. Then we can stay safe for the time being.” Xu Que shook his head and sighed. Since he’d become the One Chosen by Heaven, there’d only been a bunch of trouble. and, most important of all, he hadn’t gotten any benefits yet.

“In this case, it’ll be better for us to all stay here during this time. You can also take a look at Feifei’s cultivation problems and other things. We will make another plan while we all wait for Buttface and the others to return.” Jiang Hongyan smiled and suggested.

Xu Que also realized that they could no longer move freely during this time. He’d guessed that the group of people from the Heaven Palace Sect were already frantically looking for any traces of them everywhere. If they were to encounter any strongmen of the Celestial Prime cultivation stage while they were out, they might not have to worry about losing their lives, but they would inevitably suffer a hard time. There was no need for them to put themselves through this.

Therefore, Xu Que simply opened up the cave to make it more spacious and wide. He dug out two tunnel entrances, one headed through the north and one headed south, and ended up with a very nice temporary cave dwelling. He even crafted a wide variety of furniture.

Finally, he set out a high-level restrictive barrier covering the whole cave and used the Divine Aperture’s Shell to envelop the outermost layer in order to hide the cave dwelling completely.

In this way, with a two-pronged attack on one problem at the same time and the two protective measures, even if there was someone of the Celestial King cultivation stage passing by, he would be unable to see any signs of life.

With the issue of staying hidden resolved, Jiang Hongyan sat cross-legged on the ground and brought out the Good Fortune Jade Disk to put her soul into it.

Xu Que stood aside and waited. Ever since their last farewell at the Celestial Burial Valley, it had been more than ten years that he hadn’t seen Xu Feifei. But this period had been like running water, hurriedly passing by. It didn’t feel all that long a time.

“I understand that no one in your hometown practices cultivation, but there are countless fun objects there. One can fly without the need to have spiritual energy. Is there really such a place like this in the world?” Zixia Fairy looked at Xu Que and asked.

Duan Jiude had heard a lot of things about Earth from Buttface and had more or less also informed Zixia Fairy about them.

She was very puzzled. Xu Que was such a strange genius, and it was bizarre that he would actually come from a place without any cultivators. The most important thing was that she heard that there were many strange things in that place, which made her really curious.

“Ha, ha, ha, of course it’s true. After all, it was the crystalization of countless years and generations of human wisdom. But in the face of a cultivator’s absolute power, everything there counts for nothing.” Xu Que smiled and then shook his head.

He had been on Earth in person and deeply understood that no matter how strong science and technology were, they also couldn’t stop the frightening power of a cultivator.

However, there were still many strange things that existed on Earth, and it could be determined that before ancient times, cultivators did exist there. But at the time that he had lived there, Xu Que had not been strong enough to explore these ideas any further.

If he had a chance in the future, he would like to go back and try it all again.

“Then…” At this point, Zixia Fairy opened her mouth again and wanted to say something.

However, Jiang Hongyan’s Good Fortune Jade Disk suddenly vibrated and released a brilliant glow of stupendous lights and vibrant colors.

Immediately after, two figures stepped out from within: Jiang Hongyan came out along with Xu Feifei.

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1510 - 1510 Not A Bad Thing
chapters.body:
Chapter 1510 - 1510 Not A Bad Thing

1510 Not a Bad Thing

“Older Brother!” Crying out in an excited, loud voice, Xu Feifei dashed toward Xu Que with a face full of joy.

But she didn’t throw herself into his embrace.

She acted like a small child who’d gotten 100 percent on a test and was anxious to find her parents to show off. She pulled up her sleeves to reveal her fair, young hands, as she moved closer to Xu Que and said proudly, “Older Brother, you see, quickly look!”

“What am I looking at?” Xu Que stared at her, a little confused.

“Aren’t they tender? Aren’t they fair? Aren’t they beautiful?” Xu Feifei fired off three questions in a row.

Xu Que rolled his eyes and said in a serious voice, “Can you be a little more modest? Where are the humility and subtlety of our Xu family traditions?”

PAH! “Xu Que, I’m telling you, now that I’ve shed my mortal body and am at the peak of the Original Infant Stage, I’m no longer an ordinary person. I want to fight a duel with you.” Xu Feifei seemed very smug. Her true colors seemed to have reasserted themselves, after a period of shyness and quiet that had followed her introduction to the World of Cultivators.

She seemed to believe that as long as she had cultivated her Qi and could put some Magic Arts to use, she was no longer an ordinary person, but a true

cultivator. And since her older brother, Xu Que, was also a cultivator, she figured, why not? A duel between two cultivators, she and Xu Que, win or lose, they would have to fight to find out who was strongest.

“You want to fight a duel with me? Ho, ho, ho, you should ask your sisters-in-law whether they think you can beat me? I, your older brother, am already a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven. A mere Original Infant Stage cultivator is way too weak to fight with me.” Xu Que shook his head with disdain.

“A Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven?” Xu Feifei looked startled. Then she turned and looked at Jiang Hongyan in confusion as she said, “Older Sister Hongyan, is the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven more powerful than the Original Infant Stage?”

Jiang Hongyan smiled faintly and said, “The Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven is way more powerful, but he wouldn’t dare bully you, his little sister.”

“Ah! So it turns out that I still haven’t overtaken him.” Xu Feifei seemed unexpectedly a little depressed. Her greatest pleasure and motivation were to quickly cultivate and become stronger so as to surpass Xu Que, in order to return to their previous time on Earth during her childhood when she could bully her older brother, Xu Que.

But now it seemed as if this hope was going to be lost forever.

“Why are you so eager to be stronger than I am?” Xu Que smiled and asked.

“It’s my main goal,” Xu Feifei replied.

“Then are you able to bear hardships?” Xu Que said with a smile.

“Of course, I can.” Xu Feifei looked strong and determined.

“But I’m not willing to let you suffer.” Xu Que rejoined.

PAH! “I want to bear hardships!”

“No way, your Older Brother won’t let you. You’d better listen to me.”

“No, Older Brother, I want to suffer,”

All of a sudden, Xu Feifei grabbed Xu Que’s arm and started acting like a spoiled, little child.

Xu Que and Xu Feifei had always done this, and it continued now. They went from mutual dislike to acting like spoiled children with each other. The people who were forced to watch these demonstrations of sibling love would grimace bitterly.

“Okay, then you eat this.” Xu Que directly took out a Flat Peach from the System’s storage. It shone golden, with brilliant lights and vibrant colors.

It was the Nine-Reincarnation Peach, dug out from the bottom of the Jade Lake that year that Xu Que’s “father” had “saved” the Jade Lake’s Peach Garden. It had absorbed all the energy from the entire Peach Garden, and it had been the main culprit that had caused the Peach Garden to decline into a state of depression for thousands of years. It contained thousands of years of essence from the hundreds of peach trees that comprised the whole Peach Garden.

Originally, Xu Que had kept this Nine-Reincarnation Peach as a lifesaver in order to prepare for any eventualities he might run into. He knew he could use it to prevent the Chaotic Green Lotus in his Dantian area from not being given enough Celestial Core Power in case it suddenly grew larger.

But recently the Chaotic Green Lotus had seemed calm, and there had been no signs of growth for a long time. It seemed as if Xu Feifei’s qualifications weren’t naturally very good, so, in order to allow her self-protection ability to grow as soon as and as much as possible, Xu Que had decided not to be stingy and to share his Nine-Reincarnation Peach with his sister.

Xu Que took out the Nine-Reincarnation Peach. As a madman in terms of protecting his younger sister, this mere Nine-Reincarnation Peach was nothing.

“Wow! What a beautiful peach!” When Xu Feifei saw the Nine-Reincarnation Peach, her eyes lit up instantly.

Although she was already at the Original Infant Stage, all her cultivation had taken place in the Good Fortune Jade Disk, behind closed doors. She had been treated completely like a flower in a greenhouse, and her knowledge about the World of Cultivators was still relatively sparse.

Furthermore, the Nine-Reincarnation Peach itself was an object powerful enough to make countless cultivators in the Heaven Continent covetous. As Xu Que took it out at this moment, Xu Feifei really couldn’t be blamed for not staying calm.

Zixia Fairy, Jiang Hongyan, and Liu Jingning were also stunned by the appearance of the Nine-Reincarnation Peach. They looked at Xu Que, full of strange and curious looks. How was it that this guy always had these many precious objects on him?

“Take it. Take a small bite, and then continue to cultivate. If you feel that the pace of your cultivation has slowed down, then take another bite. Do not be greedy. Got it?” Xu Que gave the Nine-Reincarnation Peach to Xu Feifei and reminded her repeatedly of his instructions.

Xu Feifei nodded with a face full of joy. She took the Nine-Reincarnation Peach and held it up in her hands. She handled it lovingly and admired it.

“Don’t just look, hurry up and take a bite…” Xu Que couldn’t help shaking his head when he saw Xu Feifei’s look. Girls always liked to collect beautiful things, even if they were meant to be eaten.

However, he hadn’t even finished his sentence when Xu Feifei suddenly opened her mouth and took a bite of the Nine-Reincarnation Peach. The moment she opened her mouth, she bit off a large chunk of the peach’s flesh.

The sparkling, bright pulp of the fruit produced a golden-colored peach juice. Also, when she chewed it, it gave off a refreshing deep fragrance.

“Wow, it’s delicious!” Xu Feifei smiled like a silly, spoiled child of a land-owning household and looked at Xu Que as she spoke.

“All right, all right, I’m glad that it’s good to eat. Quickly sit down and start your cultivation.” Xu Que laughed bitterly and looked at the peach longingly. He was actually a little ravenous.

“Okay.” Xu Feifei swallowed the pulp and sat cross-legged in satisfaction.

Jiang Hongyan also smiled as she walked forward to set up a protective spell for Xu Feifei, to prevent the Qi from overflowing and causing meditation psychosis from swallowing too much peach pulp.

However, Xu Feifei’s state seemed very stable, and the pace of cultivation was still slow.

Xu Que was surprised. He hadn’t expected this kind of situation. “It doesn’t seem to be much faster than cultivating in the Good Fortune Jade Disk,” he said. Jiang Hongyan also frowned.

“How did this happen?” Xu Que was struck dumb. According to everything they knew about the power of this Nine-Reincarnation Peach, it was enough to make a cultivator at the Earth Celestial Stage improve by one level with just one mouthful.

Xu Feifei was only at the Original Infant Stage. Xu Que was of course happy that her body hadn’t exploded because of this one mouthful. But he was also dumbfounded. “Why was her cultivation still going so slowly?”

“Is it possible that her digestion and absorption ability are not good?” Xu Que frowned.

“Something’s not right!” Zixia Fairy suddenly said in a panic. She stepped forward and reached her fair hand out and placed it on top of Xu Feifei’s head. A wisp of Celestial Core Power flowed out of her palm and enveloped Xu Feifei’s entire body.

The next moment, she immediately took back her hand, and her face became deadly serious.

“Xuan’er, what’s going on?” Xu Que asked hurriedly.

“It’s not that her aptitude is not good.” Zixia Fairy shook her head, and her expression became a little complicated as she said, “It can be said rather that her aptitude is too good.”

“Too good?” Xu Que, Jiang Hongyan, and the others were stunned.
