The important thing was that this set of palm techniques actually only required 100 Acting Tough Points and was particularly forceful as it was linked to the force of dragons. If he could manage to put it to good use, wouldn’t it shock the people of Earth?

“I definitely want to buy this. Definitely… Hey, wait a minute, why there is a line of fine print in the introduction to this?”

Xu Que had been excited to buy the Eighteen Dragon Palms, but, after glancing at the System interface, he suddenly saw that there was a line of fine print in the System’s introduction to it.

After reading it, he got so angry he almost cried.

“100 Acting Tough Points just to randomly select one of the palm techniques? Sh*t, do you dare to write it any smaller? Just as I said, how could the Eighteen Dragon Palms only be sold for 100 Acting Tough Points. Indeed, it’s a trap.”

Xu Que immediately started complaining that the System was too stingy. This felt very familiar. Back when he was in the World of Cultivators and had exchanged for a nine-character secret, it was also carried out in this way, where one of them was randomly selected, and, even if a duplicate was drawn, there would be no refund.

WHOOSH!

Xu Que had just finished bitching to himself about how cheap the System was. Suddenly, the System’s interface flashed, and the small line of fine print stated that the selection of skills had randomly been enlarged.

Xu Que’s eyes got wide. This replicated version of the System was so arrogant.

It was as if it was telling Xu Que that since he thought that the words were too small, then the System would enlarge them for him to see if he wanted to buy it or not.

“Sh*t, okay, okay, you’re awesome. Anyway, in this place, it’s no use accumulating Acting Tough Points. You really think that I won’t dare to spend what I have?” Xu Que snorted and thought about it, then bought this martial arts skill.

The System interface flashed again, and Xu Que’s body was suddenly filled with warmth, penetrating his whole body. An additional martial arts skill had just appeared in his mind as if he had been born knowing how to do it.

DING! “Congratulations to the host Xu Que, who has obtained the Eighteen Dragon Palms, and the overbearing dragon is repentant.”

At the same time, the System prompt sounded in Xu Que’s mind.

“Oh? The overbearing dragon is repentant?” Xu Que was immediately happy. Its character seemed to be okay!

Among the Eighteen Dragon Palms, there were palm techniques that favored attack and those that favored the defense. There was no strongest palm technique, and only when all the Eighteen Dragon Palms were learned, in addition to having strong internal strength, would this set of palm techniques be the best in the world.

But now in this urgent situation, Xu Que couldn’t learn the complete set of palm techniques. However, he had drawn the overbearing dragon is repentant, which was the first palm in the Eighteen Dragon Palms and favored attacking.

In Mr. Jin Yong’s works, this palm technique was so powerful that even Pharmacist Huang admired it.

Xu Que felt that its properties weren’t bad because the palm that he had drawn was very suitable for coping with the current situation.

“Xu Que, don’t move.”

“If you have guts, don’t run.”

“You are dead today.”

At this time, the Taekwondo Club members were still chasing Xu Que and shouting aggressively, as if they were going to beat him up.

The students on the scene were shaking their heads and smiling bitterly, except for Ji Shengnan and the others. No one dared to come forward to stop the club members.

Xuanyuan Wanrong remained standing on the same spot with a blank expression, watching this chasing farce. It didn’t concern her, and, even if Xu Que was beaten until he was disabled, it wouldn’t affect their relationship.

In her opinion, it wouldn’t be a bad thing for Xu Que to be taught a lesson. With his past roguish style, if he could be taught a lesson by others, it would help to relieve her pent-up feelings.

At this time, Xu Que was still running for his life, hiding in the crowd, and playing hide-and-seek with members of the Taekwondo Club. Then he suddenly ran out of the crowd and rushed toward the president of the Taekwondo Club, Wu Hui.

Previously, after being punched, Wu Hui had squatted on the ground holding his broken hand. Now Xu Que was rushing toward him again, and there was no one beside him to come to his aid.

Many of the onlookers watched this scene and widened their eyes. They had a bad feeling about this…

The eyes of the members of the Taekwondo Club who were still chasing Xu Que popped open.

“You…what are you doing?” Wu Hui was also scared. He had a terrified look on his face. He looked at Xu Que and shouted, “Don’t come over here.”

“Hee, hee, hee!” Xu Que smiled in a despicable manner and not only didn’t stop but rushed forward more quickly. Pushing off from the ground, he got considerable momentum and kicked Wu Hui in the face.

Wu Hui hurriedly raised his uninjured hand in front of him in an attempt to block Xu Que.

BANG!

His body was kicked to the floor.

The strength of Xu Que’s kick wasn’t that great, but after Wu Hui had been knocked down, Xu Que landed and just happened to step on his broken hand.

AAHHH!

In an instant, Wu Hui’s heartbreaking screams could be heard by everyone who was still watching this performance.

All the onlookers took in a sharp breath of cold air. They widened their eyes, and their faces looked horrified.

Even Ji Shengnan and the others from the Wushu Club were shocked.

This was so cruel. After kicking him, he’d even stepped on his broken hand.

“This guy seems to have changed.” Ji Shengnan frowned slightly, feeling like this was different from her previous impression of Xu Que.

Xu Que at the moment was indeed being very ruthless, and many people present couldn’t accept it!

On the contrary, Xuanyuan Wanrong remained calm, because this Xu Que was similar to the Xu Que that she knew. He had always been equally shameless about using ruthless means to his ends.

“Xu Que, what are you doing?”

“Sh*t, you want to kill him?”

“Sh*t, quickly go and save the president.”

Soon the other people from the Taekwondo Club caught up with them.

Xu Que didn’t run this time and stood smiling on the spot. He lifted his foot off from Wu Hui’s palm and walked forward.

But, as soon as he took this step away, the panting Wu Hui roared ferociously. “Get him, break his hands and feet! I will take responsibility for everything!”

“Eh?” Xu Que heard this and stopped. He looked at Wu Hui with a smile and asked, “What are you saying? Break my hands and feet?”

AAHHH!

Wang Li screamed again, struggling frantically on the ground. He shouted angrily. “Xu Que, don’t mess around with me. I have Young Master Xia protecting me. You’d better not mess around with me.”

“Young Master Xia?” Xu Que shook his head. “Xia Luoqing counts as nothing.”

After saying this, he stomped hard onto Wu Hui’s palm and twisted his foot.

Wu Hui’s screams echoed throughout the area once again.

“Sh*t, you’re going to die.” At this time, the members of the Taekwondo Club rushed forward like fiends, giving off an imposing vibe.

Xu Que didn’t run anymore, but instead took a step forward. An internal force from his Dantian surged through his body, and his momentum rose instantly. At the same time, he bent his left leg slightly and bent his right arm inward. He waved his right palm and drew a circle.

Everyone in the audience was shocked by his sudden move.

“What the hell was this?”

“Radio gymnastics?”

BOOM!

Before waiting for anyone to react, there was a WHOOSH! Xu Que suddenly pushed his right palm forward.

Immediately, under everyone’s shocked gazes, a glittering golden dragon, as if a three-dimensional special effect, flew out of Xu Que’s palm and roared toward the members of the Taekwondo Club.

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1519 - 1519 First Love
chapters.body:
Chapter 1519 - 1519 First Love

1519 First Love

BOOM!

With a loud whistling sound, the three-dimensional dragon, shining with a golden light, bared its teeth and brandished its claws, as it swept forward.

The members of the Taekwondo Club were frozen in place. They seemed to have lost their ability to react. It really didn’t matter because even if they had reacted, they wouldn’t have been able to dodge this magnificent dragon in time. As it was, they just stood and watched, wide-eyed, as this dragon giving off a golden light flew right into their faces.

AAHHH!!

The next moment, these pitiful members of the Taekwondo Club had been swept up into the air. The dragon ran through them in a matter of minutes, and then it quickly dissipated.

These members of the Taekwondo Club started to fall from the air, one after another. Everyone watching this was equally scared and frozen in place, and no one dared to go catch them, so they slammed onto the ground with several loud thuds.

Suddenly, wailing sounds filled the air.

Even if they’d practiced a lot of Taekwondo and knew how to resist attacks, falling heavily from high in the air caused many of the bones in their arms and legs to break.

Luckily, their heads hadn’t hit the ground. Otherwise, they could’ve suffered concussions or even severe brain damage.

At this moment, all the onlookers who had been anywhere near this scene were dead silent. Everyone felt stupefied and stood frozen where they’d been.

“Why did this golden dragon and palm technique seem so familiar?”

“Had it been on a TV series?”

“Eighteen Dragon Palms? The dragon is repentant?”

“Was this special effects?”

“How could this be?”

Ji Shengnan looked at Xu Que with terror. Her eyes were full of conflicting emotions, and she wanted to say something, but hesitated.

Xuanyuan Wanrong had also been stunned. This palm technique was very common in the World of Cultivators, and even moderately strong cultivators could practice it. “But now that they had been reduced to being mortals, how was he still able to use this technique?”

The formation of imperial Qi and the release of the inner breath, to a certain extent, could be regarded as an immortal cultivation method.

“Unless this guy has come into contact with True Core Strength, or became a cultivator through martial arts before he went to the World of Cultivators…” Xuanyuan Wanrong was shocked. But then she immediately shook her head to reject this speculation.

“Impossible!”

“Xu Que could not have become a cultivator through martial arts.”

According to his current bone age and the strength of this palm technique, even with outstanding talent, and even if he had been exposed to strong Qi, it would not be possible for him to have become a cultivator through martial arts.

When she’d first seen this guy in the Celestial Burial Valley, his bone age had been only about 20 years old, and that had only been a few years ago.

So what had happened to this guy in these few short years, and how had he attained such a high level in a seemingly single bound?

Thinking about all of this, Xuanyuan Wanrong couldn’t help but be filled with infinite curiosity.

In the past, she hadn’t known anything about Xu Que’s background and also she hadn’t been interested enough to find out. However, now that she was in this position where she was being forced to get to know him, she had discovered that Xu Que’s past was very astounding and mysterious.

TSK! TSK! TSK! “What a pity. My force wasn’t strong enough to have caused some of them to die.”

Xu Que stood before the members of the Taekwondo Club. Looking at them rolling on the ground and howling, he shook his head with regret and muttered.

Hearing what he’d said, everyone took in a big breath of air.

“Sh*t, he’d wanted them to die?”

“Was Xu Que crazy?”

Beating up so many people today, it was pretty likely that he would have to go to prison. If he’d really killed someone, then it could have been a point of no return.

However, for Xu Que, none of this was really a big deal.

After all…this world was fake.

Although everyone looked real, everything had just come from his world of memory. As soon as he’d passed the tribulation of love with Xuanyuan Wanrong, he would be able to leave, so why would he have any fear about killing people?

Xuanyuan Wanrong also looked indifferent. She also knew that this was just a world of memory. And, even if it weren’t the world of memory, what did killing a few mortals who were bullies matter? In a cruel place like the World of Cultivators, this kind of thing would really not be worth mentioning.

“Okay, everything is all settled. Let’s go get a room.” Xu Que clapped his hands and turned toward Xuanyuan Wanrong. He had a grin on his face, with a hint of roguishness. In the eyes of all the watching students, he was acting like a living Demon.

After beating up all these people, he was still in the mood to get a room?

A lot of these people were still immersed in the horror of the Eighteen Dragon Palms, but suddenly they had been stunned by Xu Que’s words.

“Okay!” Xuanyuan Wanrong nodded lightly and actually agreed.

She didn’t know what getting a room meant. She’d only heard Xu Que mention that getting a room would help to promote their feelings toward each other and would help them become a couple, which was what she wanted.

If they could become a couple who loved each other and passed the tribulation of love, then there would still be hope that they could continue living.

Everyone present who witnessed this scene almost vomited blood.

What a nice lady! What a personality! Why did she throw herself in Xu Que’s arms and actively enter the tiger’s den with Xu Que?

However, no matter how many guys felt jealous or sorry for Xuanyuan Wanrong, they didn’t dare to come forward to make any comments to Xu Que or attempt to fight with him over this young lady.

The overbearing dragon is repentant move that Xu Que had used just now, and that large golden dragon had left everyone in shock.

In this ordinary world, who could possibly have imagined that one day they would actually see the fantastic martial arts that they’d seen on television series appear in real life. It had been so powerful and greatly challenged scientific concepts.

In the end, amid the shocked gazes and silence of all the onlookers, Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong left, walking side by side.

The two of them walked toward the back entrance of the school, and Xuanyuan Wanrong stayed silent throughout.

Xu Que had wanted to say something. He’d intended to ask Xuanyuan Wanrong how this tribulation of love could be accomplished successfully. However, before he’d had the chance to open his mouth, he’d seen a luxury sports car stop at the back entrance of the school.

This sports car stopped near two girls. Xu Que found one of them very familiar.

“Lin Yuxi?”

He frowned slightly. He hadn’t expected that he would meet his past girlfriend, his super-crush, and the school belle.

“So is that the person that you like?” Xuanyuan Wanrong, who hadn’t spoken much, suddenly asked Xu Que a question.

She’d already known that Xu Que’s first sweetheart was named Lin Yuxi, and she also knew that the trip here was meant to make Xu Que have a change of heart so that they could pass the tribulation of love.

But this was the first time that she’d seen Lin Yuxi in person, and her looks were really outstanding. Although they couldn’t compare to hers, Lin Yuxi was still beautiful enough to stress Xuanyuan Wanrong out.

After all, the saying that beauty is in the eyes of the beholder was not groundless.

“I used to like her,” Xu Que responded lightly.

“…..” Xuanyuan Wanrong became suddenly speechless. She looked at Xu Que with some contempt.

“So quickly, it had become a matter of the past?”

“What about all his previous excitement? The kind of ecstatic joy that most people got from the first awakening of love? Why was it all gone?”

“He had become attracted to her so easily? Oh, what a jerk.”

Wait, something was not right…

Suddenly, Xuanyuan Wanrong seemed to realize something. If Xu Que had had a change of heart about Lin Yuxi, then he should have succeeded in passing the tribulation. Why didn’t the tribulation of love end?

Was it possible that this tribulation of love also required her to have feelings for him? And only when the two parties loved each other, would it be passed?

In an instant, Xuanyuan Wanrong realized that she was in a tough position. She gazed into the air and felt as if the heavens were toying with her by giving her such a difficult problem. Liking such a douchebag as Xu Que was really difficult.

…..

“Schoolmate Xia, I have already arranged to eat with my roommate. Maybe we can eat together some other time!” Lin Yuxi took her roommate’s hand and spoke to the person in the sports car with a wry smile.

There was no doubt that the person in the sports car was the Young Master of the Xia Family, who Xu Que had taken already revenge on back in the day: Xia Luoqing.

This was the first time that Xu Que had seen this scene.

In his memory, there had originally been no such scene, but the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi even recovered the things that he hadn’t known about. It allowed him to unexpectedly encounter this scene.

“So… On the day when I’d successfully confessed to Lin Yuxi, Xia Luoqing had also asked her out for a meal.” Xu Que stroked his chin and smiled slightly.

Back then, when he had been able to confess to Lin Yuxi, Lin Yuxi had been in her dormitory.

“Yuxi, you don’t need to be so guarded against me. I just ask that you give me a chance. It’s just a meal to let you get to know more about me, that’s all.” Xia Luoqing sat in the car and said with a face full of sincerity.

Many students had appeared and stayed standing around, watching this scene.

Lin Yuxi was in a bit of a difficult spot. She didn’t hate Xia Luoqing, but she didn’t have feelings for him. If they had been just ordinary friends, she could’ve accepted a meal. However, it was very obvious that Xia Luoqing was intending

to pursue her. Thus it wasn’t a good idea for her to accept. Even if it was just a meal, she was afraid that after agreeing, Xia Luoqing might get the wrong impression.

What was even more important was that she already had someone she liked in her heart. Although that guy’s family background was ordinary, he’d managed to take care of himself and had a soul that was eternally happy.

So…

“Sorry, Schoolmate Xia, I really…” Lin Yuxi shook her head and refused again.

But just before she’d finished speaking, her gaze happened to meet Xu Que’s, who had just walked out of the school gate. She saw Xuanyuan Wanrong next to Xu Que, and she suddenly froze.

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1520 - 1520 Working As Normal
chapters.body:
Chapter 1520 - 1520 Working As Normal

1520 Working As Normal

Lin Yuxi was stunned. She hadn’t expected to see Xu Que at this time.

Then, as her gaze fell on Xuanyuan Wanrong who was standing next to Xu Que, she became even more surprised.

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s old-fashioned costume didn’t take anything away from her beauty. Even though her clothing appeared very strange, it couldn’t hide her stunning looks.

Even the school belle, Lin Yuxi, couldn’t help but be amazed by Xuanyuan Wanrong’s gorgeous appearance.

She was so beautiful…

Lin Yuxi’s gaze rested on Xuanyuan Wanrong for a while.

Lin Yuxi’s roommate was staring at Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong also, and what she was thinking about the situation was written all over her face.

Then, at this moment, the Xia family’s young master, Xia Luoqing, the guy who was in the sports car, also spotted Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Without exception that day whenever anyone spotten Xuanyuan Wanrong, Xu Que was thoroughly ignored. In this world where looks mattered so much, Xuanyuan Wanrong was the only one who caught anyone’s eyes.

In that instant, Xia Luoqing was overwhelmed by desire.

In his capacity as the dignified young master of the Xia family, he had seen countless beautiful women, even some female stars, and he’d even had deep relationships with some of them.

But ever since entering the university, only Lin Yuxi had piqued Xia Luoqing’s interest, and he’d decided to conquer her. Especially after she’d rejected all his attempts to pursue her, Xia Luoqing had become even more interested in Lin Yuxi.

But now, he’d suddenly found that Lin Yuxi seemed to have become a little bit boring, and the woman wearing the ancient costume next to Xu Que, who was just like a fairy, had grabbed all his interest. At this moment, Xia Luoqing had no desire simply to conquer. He now had a strong desire to possess.

He was definitely not in the mood to take the time to conquer her. He just wanted to exhaust all his power immediately. At all costs, he wanted to make Xuanyuan Wanrong his, fearing that she would be coveted by others if he waited at all.

Yes, such a perfect woman being coveted by others would tarnish her.

BOOM!

Xia Luoqing got out of his car and closed the door with a simple slamming action, a gentlemanly smile appearing on his face.

PFFT!

Before Xia Luoqing could speak, an untimely laugh rang out, disrupting Xia Luoqing’s rhythm.

Xia Luoqing couldn’t help but look at Xu Que, stunned. This fellow had a strange expression on his face and was staring at him, smiling but not speaking.

“What was going on?”

Xia Luoqing suddenly felt startled, and there was a trace of inexplicable uneasiness in his heart.

All along, it had circulated around the campus that Xu Que was his biggest rival in love, but he had never managed to identify what about Xu Que threatened him.

But now, for the first time, he felt a little fear and anxiety about Xu Que.

“Yo, what a coincidence!” At this time, Xu Que suddenly smiled and took the initiative to offer a greeting.

But this greeting was directed at Lin Yuxi.

Xia Luoqing was just an ant who he had taken revenge on already. At this time, he was insignificant, and it would be too boring if he was going to have to hit him again.

Lin Yuxi’s attention finally returned to Xu Que. She smiled and asked him, “Xu Que, do you want to go out?”

This was the back entrance of the school, and the students who came out from here either wanted to eat, get a room, or take a car to go shopping in the city.

Before Xu Que had time to answer, Xuanyuan Wanrong, who was standing beside him, opened her mouth and said, “I am going to get a room with him.”

SWOOSH!

At that instant, the people who were standing nearby were stunned.

“Get a room?”

“She…she said this so straightforwardly?”

Lin Yuxi struggled with disbelief. It wasn’t that Xu Que and this perfect woman were impossible together, but she just felt that it had been a little bit sudden.

From being acquaintances to becoming friends with Xu Que, she didn’t remember when exactly Xu Que had started to occupy a place in her heart, but now he was the only one in her heart.

Even if Xu Que had not formally confessed to her, in her heart, she and Xu Que were only one confession away from being together forever.

But now, Xu Que was standing there with such a perfect woman beside him. And, most important, this woman had just stated in an amazingly straightforward way that she wanted to get a room with Xu Que.

“This…” Lin Yuxi was caught a bit off guard. She didn’t know how to respond and looked at Xu Que in confusion.

Xu Que smiled and didn’t know what to say.

He had indeed lost all his feelings for Lin Yuxi, but, in this period, Lin Yuxi had been particularly innocent and had been waiting for him to confess to her before they got together.

If he’d really gone along with Xuanyuan Wanrong, this would be a huge blow to Lin Yuxi and would leave her in a traumatic situation.

Even more important was that he didn’t even really want to get a room with Xuanyuan Wanrong. It was just something that he’d casually said, trying to act cool.

“Ha, ha, ha, this young lady is very humorous. Xu Que, is she also from our school? Why haven’t I seen her before?” At this time, Xia Luoqing smiled and came over, looking at Xu Que with a friendly face.

This interruption gave Xu Que a chance to ignore Xuanyuan Wanrong’s awkward response.

Xu Que was very grateful. He looked at Xia Luoqing, thought for a while, and said with a smile, “What does this have to do with you?”

“Uh…” The smile on Xia Luoqing’s face instantly stiffened, a fierce look appeared in his eyes, and anger started to burn in him.

He was the young master of the Xia family. In this small school, who dared to treat him so arrogantly?

But Xu Que, with no family background and no parents, had actually dared to talk to him with this rotten attitude? And in front of these women too. He was looking to die.

“Ha, ha, ha, oh, Xu really loves to joke around. Come on, Xu, let’s talk over here. I have something to tell you. It’s good news.” Xia Luoqing controlled his temper, and, with a standard fake laugh, he took the initiative to come forward and put his arm around Xu Que’s shoulders, feigning closeness with him.

He felt that it was necessary to talk to Xu Que so that this unruly country boy would understand what was called power.

Xu Que had originally been too lazy to deal with this piece of trash, but when he heard that he had some good news to talk about, he couldn’t help but raise his eyebrows.

It felt as if a big wave of Acting Tough Points had just been sent to him. What a waste if he didn’t take advantage of it.

Quickly, they walked to a corner, far away from Xuanyuan Wanrong, Lin Yuxi, and the others.

“Xu Que!” He took initiative and started to talk, initially still smiling.

“Oh, so what’s up? What’s the good news?” Xu Que asked with a smile.

Xia Luoqing continued to smile and said, “Don’t you like Lin Yuxi? Well, from now on, I won’t fight over Lin Yuxi with you, but you must introduce the woman who came with you to me or at least help to make a match for us. What about that?”

PFFT!

Xu Que suddenly laughed.”That’s the good news you are referring to?”

“So, is there a problem?” Xia Luoqing’s smile slowly vanished, and a cold look replaced it.

In fact, he didn’t need Xu Que’s introduction or matchmaking in any way. He just wanted to make a clear distinction with Xu Que that they would have one each, lest Xu Que interfere and spoil his plans.

After all, he was the future heir of the Xia family. If he wasn’t forced to do so, he really didn’t want to make use of the power of his family. This would make others look down on him, and the elders in the family despise him.

“Of course, there is a problem!” Xu Que looked at Xia Luoqing, with a smile still on his face and nodded.

Xia Luoqing couldn’t help but frown. “Then do you want to choose the other option and give Lin Yuxi to me?”

Xia Luoqing started to become angry again. He was not satisfied with this choice and wasn’t feeling very agreeable.

“No!” Suddenly, Xu Que responded in a deep voice. At the same time, with a serious expression on his face, he raised his right hand and made a fist. “I want everything!”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1523 - Call For People Ii
chapters.body:
Chapter 1523 - Call For People Ii

“Huh?”

Xia Luoqing was momentarily left stupefied by Xu Que.

“Is he so direct?”

“Is he so arrogant?”

“Well, since you know what’s going to happen, why do you still dare to come along?” Xia Luoqing was thinking as he soon regained his composure. He was devising his battle plan in his head, and he just calmly smiled.

He sat down facing Xu Que. The service staff hurriedly turned around to leave and closed the door of the private room on their way out.

Although this type of situation was not common in the restaurant, the staff were aware of the identity of the young master of the Xia family. When Young Master Xia wanted to deal with people, then of course they had to pretend not to see anything and simply slip away.

However, it seemed smart to at least inform his boss.

As the staff left the room, it suddenly became very quiet.

Xu Que and Xia Luoqing eyed each other. The two men’s eyes had the same looks of self-confidence and contempt for the other.

“Xu Que, you have no idea what you’re going to face. In fact, I’ve heard of you. You’re someone who supposedly defeated more than a dozen of people in the Taekwondo Club,” Xia Luoqing said and picked up a glass to drink water.

“I have to say. A person like you may be considered outstanding in the university. Well-versed in your studies and skilled in martial arts, you do have the abilities to be haughty, but unfortunately…the opponent you’ve encountered is me.” At this point, Xia Luoqing’s lips curled up into a sneer and his face was full of disdain and mockery.

In his view, no matter how powerful Xu Que was, he was still unarmed and defenseless. Even if he had been skilled in kung fu, he still would be afraid of a kitchen knife. To deal with a person such as Xu Que, it would be like taking a sledgehammer to crack a nut if he, Young Master Xia, were really to put his identity to use.

“Oh, is that so? Then you must be pretty amazing.” Xu Que was still smiling and spouted some inconsequential, phony words.

“Xu Que, you’re so irksome. However, you’re also a smart person. I can give you one last chance. Either you stay far away from those two women, or…ha, ha, ha.” Xia Luoqing felt that it was no longer necessary to spell out the words explaining what would come after. Any normal person would know the score when they’d heard this.

However, Xu Que wasn’t exactly normal. He wore a nasty smile on his face and winked at Xia Luoqing, “I know, I know. But are the people that you called for here yet? How many people did you call for? Better call out for more to be on the safe side.”

BANG!

Xia Luoqing became full of rage when he heard this. He slammed his hand on the table and growled, “Xu Que, you don’t know a good thing when you see it. Even if I cripple you right here, right now, or even make you drunk and throw you off the roof, there’s no way for you to get out of this alive.”

“Wow, the stakes are getting pretty exciting. I feel I should give it a go.” Xu Que pretended to panic but his tone was full of excitement.

He was also going to carry out all that Xia Luoqing had threatened him with fully on Xia Luoqing.

CLICK!

At this time, the doorknob was suddenly twisted open by someone, which was closely followed by the door being pushed open. Several middle-aged men in tracksuits walked in. At a glance, these people seemed very ordinary, except that they had better physiques than most middle-aged men. Their appearances were nothing out of the ordinary.

But on a second glance, it was possible to see that these people’s stances were straight and tall. They had a slightly imposing manner, their eyes had slightly penetrating stares, and they felt slightly overbearing.

“Young Master Xia?” When they came in, they first looked at both Xu Que and Xia Luoqing, but then all their eyes were focused on Xia Luoqing.

“That’s right, it’s me.” Xia Luoqing nodded and remained in his chair.

These middle-aged men just looked at Xu Que as they asked suspiciously, “And you are Xu Que? Are you the one who supposedly achieved the Innate Realm to release your Inner Qi?”

Xu Que grinned and looked at them before he replied, “What the h*ll does it have to do with you?”

“Oh, you arrogant kid! It’s impossible for a 20-something-year-old kid to achieve the Innate Realm. We’ve come at this time to expose you as a fraud. You’re so young and do not set a good example. How dare you pretend to be a grand master who can release your inner Qi.”

One of them snorted coldly and immediately adopted a stance as if ready to ward off an attack.

This was equal to a declaration of war on Xu Que.

PAH!

“Only a few people have come. It’s still not enough.” Xu Que looked disgruntled as he shook his head. He took out his cell phone and started to play with it. He didn’t pay any attention to anyone at all.

At first, they thought Xu Que was calling for people, until his cell phone rang out with the POW! POW! POW! sounds of gunshots, as well as a male commentator’s voice. Only then did they realize that this guy was actually playing a game.

“You b*stard!”

The middle-aged man who reacted first growled in anger. He took firm strides forward and shot out a palm toward Xu Que. This palm was particularly powerful, vigorous, and imposing. It went straight for Xu Que’s forehead.

The corners of Xu Que’s lips curled up in a sneer, and he remained sitting in his chair. He slightly moved his head to the side and easily dodged the palm. It was closely followed by a lift of his right hand and his elbow directly bumped into the middle-aged man’s waist.

BANG!

With a loud thud, the middle-aged man suddenly retreated two steps from the impact. Next, he gave a painful cry and held his waist as he crouched down on the ground.

AAHHH!

“What?”

Several of the other middle-aged men were suddenly startled by this scene.

They couldn’t imagine how Xu Que had managed to strike just now and be able to dodge that palm attack and also to complete the counterattack and instantly overcome their companion. He obviously was…

An expert. He was a dab hand.

These middle-aged men were instantly shocked out of their minds. “This kid was only in his early 20s. How could he be so powerful?”

Xia Luoqing was also a little startled, and his eyebrows went into a full frown. He’d wondered to himself in secret if Wu Hui had deceived him that he was a good Martial Arts grand master. “What kind of master could he be? He’d been brought down by Xu Que so quickly?”

“What do you guys say? Do you want to keep fighting?” Xu Que looked up this time and glanced at the few middle-aged men standing around.

Several of the middle-aged men immediately appeared furious and glared at Xu Que.

With the disparity in strength, they really didn’t have to fight anymore. These people were all well aware of their respective strengths. Everyone had swapped pointers with one another and practiced with each other. Generally, the outcome of the duels that they engaged in wouldn’t be determined in less than 200 rounds.

But Xu Que had been able to overcome one of them with one strike. His strength was obviously way above them, but this guy was too arrogant. They really couldn’t give vent to their anger without a fight.

“What’s the use of anger? You’ll still get a beating from me, won’t you? Forget about it. You’d better hurry up and call for more people. Just get all the grand masters that you know of to come over here,” Xu Que said again, taunting them.

However, he was serious about what he said. He wanted these people to call for more and more powerful people.

“The grand masters? Oh, young man, I’m afraid you’re still not qualified to let our Master make his move!” A middle-aged man sneered.

Xu Que’s eyes suddenly lit up, and he said in surprise, “So, there’s really a grand master. And he’s your Master? Quick, hurry up and call him over. Oh, that’s right, does your master have any brothers and sisters who also practice martial arts? Call them to come all together too as well as the other grand masters they know. Just call all of them here.”

“I want to beat up dozens of them!” Xu Que said excitedly, getting ready to attack with his fists.

His words and actions completely infuriated the middle-aged men.

“Such arrogance, how dare you speak and insult my Master! Then you’d better not blame us today for not sticking to the code of honor and forgetting to fight fair.” One of them finished speaking and exchanged glances with several others.

WHOOSH!

The next moment, a few people shot out at the same time and rushed toward Xu Que.

According to the rules of the Martial Arts world, it was normal to have a one-on-one duel.

Xu Que had overpowered their companion with one strike, which made them realize that Xu Que’s strength was above theirs. To continue with a one-on-one fight, the odds of winning would be zero, so no one issued a one-on-one challenge again.

But when Xu Que opened his mouth and showed disrespect to their Master, then a few of them found an excuse to make their moves together. They were no longer required to adhere to the rules of the Martial Arts world, because this was also one of the rules of the Martial Arts world.

They might not defeat him one-on-one, but it might not necessarily be the case if it was five people against one. The saying “four hands are better than two fists” was not said just in fun.

Several of the people were full of confidence that by combining forces, it would be enough to deal with Xu Que.

However, Xu Que was still very calm. He didn’t panic and simply placed the cell phone next to his glass. He seemed to have especially adjusted the angle, while his right palm draw a circle at waist level and suddenly pushed forward.

BOOM!

A sound of a blast in the air could be heard and a violent wind rolled into a ball as a golden dragon-shaped form as thick as an arm with bared fangs and claws brandished, directly rushed toward several of the middle-aged men.

“What?”

“The release of Inner Qi from a grand master in his early 20s?”

“What…that’s impossible!”

Several of these middle-aged men were shocked, but it was too late to escape. They were blasted by the golden dragon on the spot, and their bodies immediately flew up to heavily strike against the wall in the room.

BANG! BANG! BANG!

Along with heavy impact sounds, even the walls had been cracked. Several of the middle-aged men fell to the floor, unconscious on the spot.

Other than Xu Que and Xia Luoqing, the only person still conscious was the middle-aged man who had been struck in the waist by Xu Que in the first place.

And, at this moment, the room fell into a dead silence.

The middle-aged man was dumbstruck.

Xia Luoqing was also freaking out.

“Was this…the Eighteen Dragon Palms? Could he really get the dragon to appear.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1524 - Call Your People Too!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1524 - Call Your People Too!

The middle-aged man shuddered. “How was that possible?”

Even if his master, who was nearly 100 years old and whose body was still incomparably robust, could release his Inner Qi only because he’d stepped into the realm of a grand master. But the scary thing here was that when his master released his Inner Qi, it was invisible, like a gust of wind, and it cut through the air to strike an opponent.

Now, however, Xu Que had directly unleashed a dragon, and a golden dragon at that. Although it was only as thick as an arm, in the eyes of martial arts people, it was simply an unbelievable occurrence.

It was so frigging scary!

Xia Luoqing sat slumped in the chair. He’d originally been sitting up very straight and full of confidence. But currently his body had fallen in on itself and was soft in the chair.

Before he’d thought that it was Wu Hui who’d deceived him by just taking along a few fakers without any skills, who in turn had been beaten to a pulp by Xu Que.

However, just now he’d seen with his own eyes that this guy had actually shot out a small golden dragon and overwhelmed the whole bunch of middle-aged men by knocking them into a wall. Only then had Xia Luoqing realized that it wasn’t that these middle-aged men were too weak, but that that guy Xu Que was really an expert.

“What do you think? My dear viewers and friends, the authentic Eighteen Dragon Palms, nothing added to it at all, no special effects. The dragon was shot out from 100 percent pure Internal Force. Bros, if you like it, remember to double-click on like, add and follow me, and you won’t miss out.”

At this time, Xu Que’s voice could be heard, ringing out in the silent private room.

This guy was greeting people on his cell phone camera on the table, with a brilliant smile on his face.

Xia Luoqing and the middle-aged man on the floor could do nothing but stare at him.

“What the heck?”

“Is this guy live-streaming this on the Internet?”

“F*ck, is he crazy?”

“He actually dares to live-stream this kind of thing? Isn’t he afraid of creating too much influence and getting pulled in for censorship or being dissected for analysis?”

“Yo, yo, yo, if any of you friends out there think I’m doing a fake streaming, you’re welcome to come watch it live in person. I’ve put out my address. I’m happy to oblige if you want to fight a duel with me.”

At this time, Xu Que looked at the bullet comments on the live broadcast and beamed as he responded.

When this kind of thing was broadcast, the viewers’ first reaction was certainly to feel that this was fake and had had special effects added to it. But there were many people who liked that the live-streamer had made the effort to actually use special effects in the live-stream. In other live-broadcast rooms, they couldn’t see such awesome special effects.

Of course, there were even more people cussing out the owner of the live-streaming room.

Originally this live-streaming room had been used by Xu Que’s roommate. When he’d had nothing to do, he would broadcast himself playing League of Legends and spouting some obscenities. This had eventually let him accumulate a large number of fans. He was considered a minor celebrity live-streamer in the dog eat dog world of live-streaming platforms.

Now the live-streaming room had been borrowed by Xu Que. Originally, the viewers had just wanted to watch the League of Legends streaming, but now they saw that it was out of the dorm, and also a stranger performing the Eighteen Dragon Palms. So some of them were still expressing their dissatisfaction.

However, the words that Xu Que had just spoken still attracted a lot of people’s curiosity in the end. Some people lived nearby and had already hurried over, wanting to expose Xu Que’s use of special effects.

But, at this moment, Xu Que didn’t have much time to waste on the live-streaming as his eyes swept toward the middle-aged man. He chuckled and said, “How? Are you still unconvinced? If you still remain unconvinced, then hurry up and get more people.”

Having said that, he looked at Xia Luoqing again and said, “How about you? Are you refusing to give in? Want to call some more people?”

“You…” Xia Luoqing immediately glowered in anger. Now he had to admit that Xu Que had some evil ways, but he still didn’t pay Xu Que too much attention. Instead, he was thinking of his next steps:

“So, what if he released his Inner Qi to unleash the Eighteen Dragon Palms?”

“No matter how powerful you are, can you be more powerful than advanced technology? Can you block a bullet?”

“You must know that our Xia family’s special bodyguards are armed with guns.”

“Well, well, as you wish, I’m calling for more people now.” Xia Luoqing sneered at him, revealing his desire to commit murder.

This time, he was going to really use the power of the Xia family.

As the young master of the Xia family, he wasn’t an idiot. It wasn’t possible for him to personally get involved and meet Xu Que head to head. But he was also aware that the existence of a heathen like Xu Que was already not quite in line with the core values of socialism.

Having offended this kind of person, in case he became more powerful in the future, he would always be a hidden danger and must be dealt with as soon as possible. Even if he was not dealt with, he must also be captured to be studied, lest he fell into the hands of others.

Furthermore, Xu Que was spreading the news of what had gone on here today all around. He was obligated to get rid of him before he broadcast about it anymore. That would definitely be the right choice.

Otherwise, after more people had noticed him and wanted to mess with him, then it would really be difficult to get rid of him.

Moreover, with the strength of the Xia family, it would be quite easy to make an insignificant student disappear. At least this had been the case up to now.

Therefore, Xia Luoqing didn’t think this matter would be too difficult.

WHOOSH!

He pulled out his cell phone, but still hid it under the table while he quietly sent out a message.

At the same time, the middle-aged man struggled to get up from the floor. He took out his cell phone, huddled in the corner, and dialed a number.

…..

KNOCK! KNOCK! KNOCK!

At this time, someone knocked on the door of the private room a few times.

Immediately after, a young woman dressed in Western-style clothes walked in.

She wore sunglasses, had a Chinese face, but a head of blond curls. She appeared fashionable and dressed in a way that perfectly concealed her true age.

She looked like a girl in her early 20s, but the clothes as well as her manners and air made people feel that she was at least 30 or 40 years old.

“Young Master Xia, do you realize what kind of place I’m running here? Do you really think it’s wise to create so much trouble here?” As soon as the woman entered, she immediately started talking to Xia Luoqing.

As for those people lying on the ground, she didn’t even glance at them once as if she’d already known all about what had gone on in this room. After all, there was surveillance video in these private rooms.

“Boss Lin, you’ve misunderstood. I’m not the one who’s punched and hit people.” When Xia Luoqing saw this woman with the sunglasses, he made a face and flashed her a pained smile as he spoke.

Originally, he’d just wanted to borrow the place to get rid of Xu Que and then he would have sent a gift of friendship to the restaurant owner after. Taking the Xia family into account, the boss would certainly not have investigated further and would’ve even undertaken the task of smoothing things over for that matter.

But now, not only had he not dispatched Xu Que, the matter looked as if it was about to be blown up. He had also just called the Xia family’s people to come over. Once Boss Lin came forward, perhaps there was no way to settle this.

“Young man, you’re fighting here and breaking the rules of our restaurant. How do you think this matter should be settled?” At this time, the woman in the sunglasses looked at Xu Qu. Her gaze behind the sunglasses seemed to be full of curiosity.

However, as soon as she spoke, Xia Luoqing’s face suddenly changed slightly, and he was somewhat surprised.

Since when was this woman so easygoing?

Although Xia Luoqing had set up the arrangements here, he was cognizant that, right or wrong, this woman wouldn’t brook fighting in her restaurant, and she would definitely throw out anyone caught fighting here.

Once, a long time ago, when the restaurant had just opened, there had been a famous director of a conglomerate, a man more than 50 years old, a famous person, who had once become drunk in the restaurant and opened his mouth to assail a male waiter with obscenities. Boss Lin had sent her people to toss him into the elevator. She hadn’t cared who he was at all.

Also once there had been a vice president of a large corporation who had been inexplicably punched by someone in the restaurant. She had thrown both people out before you could say Jack Robinson.

But now, Xu Que had not only been involved in the fight, but he had also laid waste to a few people. And this woman actually didn’t throw him out. Instead, she’d asked how he thought the matter should be settled?

Since when did this woman listen to other people’s opinions?

HISS!

Xia Luoqing’s heart turned over in an upheaval. He thought he knew what was going on here.

This woman must have seen what had happened from start to finish with the surveillance camera. She must be interested in the golden dragon shot out by Xu Que. Otherwise, he couldn’t think of any other reason for her to be so respectful to Xu Que.

“How do I want to handle it?”

At this time, Xu Que raised his eyebrows. His eyes directly met the gaze of the woman with sunglasses. He said with a sneer, “You’d better stop talking nonsense. You should call your people too.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1525 - Who Dares To Touch My Phone?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1525 - Who Dares To Touch My Phone?

“…..”

The woman in sunglasses instantly froze, and her beautiful eyes behind the sunglasses also looked flabbergasted.

“What the h*ll?

“Is this young man right in his head?

“I’ve already been patient with him, and he missed that entirely. Now he’s telling me to call for more people?”

“Ha, ha, ha…..”

At this time, Xia Luoqing suddenly burst out laughing and looked at Xu Que as if he was a real fool. He repeatedly shook his head and said, “Xu Que, it seems as if you are really tired of living. Boss Lin was trying to be respectful to you, and then you dare to show her such disrespect.”

He looked at the woman in sunglasses and said, “Boss Lin, you don’t need to dirty your hands with this matter. I’ll deal with it for you. How about it?”

The actual meaning of what he was saying was to ask the woman in sunglasses to turn a blind eye. Xia Luoqing wanted to continue to borrow this place to deal with Xu Que.

Because in this place it was easier to tie up all the loose ends after he’d dealt with Xu Que. He could avoid disaster if he did it here.

“There’s no need to trouble Young Master Xia with this.” The woman in sunglasses responded with a cold voice.

Then she turned her ashen face to look at Xu Que and said in a deep voice, “If you want to solve the problem in this way, then I’d be happy to oblige.”

With that, she raised her hand and waved it gently. Her impeccably attired attendant immediately turned around and left.

The woman in the sunglasses pulled out a chair, sat down, and crossed her legs. Another attendant immediately stepped forward, brought up a cigarette, and helped her light it.

WHOOOOO

The woman in the sunglasses exhaled a puff of smoke. She was no longer looking at anyone. She was just sitting there quietly.

Xia Luoqing and the middle-aged man on the floor had also informed their people by this time.

Suddenly, the room became deadly quiet.

Xu Que was also being very quiet, because he was staring at all the bullet comments of the live-stream on his cell phone screen.

After the appearance of the woman in the sunglasses, the bullet comments had clearly increased by a lot.

After all, the airs and manners of this woman were seductive to many men and easily produced a desire to conquer or to be conquered.

“Damn, this woman is fine.”

“Tap that, live-streamer, tap that!”

“Tap that?” Shouldn’t it be poke?”

“I just like to say tap that. How annoying.”

“Exploding Heavens Faction’s Li Bai was here.”

“Come on, commenters, post your words carefully. This woman is not someone you can afford to provoke.”

“What? What do you mean?”

“Oh, who doesn’t know about Boss Lin in our area? If I tell you all about this woman’s background, I’m afraid of scaring you to death.”

“Yo, is it another woman with someone on top? I’m not the same. I’m generally below. No need for me to move.”

“Exploding Heavens Faction’s Li Xiaoyao was here.”

“666666.”

…..

The bullet comments were getting ridiculous. The majority were about the woman in the sunglasses.

But there was also a calm and collected group who were already worried about Xu Que.

“The live-streamer is going to be in big trouble. He’s single-handedly tackling this and letting other people call for backup.”

“Big trouble, my *ss! You can tell it’s scripted at one glance.”

“Yes, it’s all fake, and there are special effects.”

“Forget about it. Just think of it as if you’re here to watch the special effects. It doesn’t matter if the script is contrived.”

“Exploding Heavens Faction’s Kato Bird was here.”

…..

TSK! TSK! TSK!

Reading all these nonsensical comments, Xu Que couldn’t help shaking his head.

The peanut gallery actually still didn’t believe that the Eighteen Dragon Palms was real.

“But this is also normal. If it were me in the past, I probably would have started cussing out at this point too.

“But these comments are not important. The impact of these people isn’t big. As long as there are enough viewers, then that’s good enough. As long as I can infinitely amplify this impact, then it will be enough.

“Most important, there will soon be a lot of people coming to the door to be hit in the face, so the Acting Tough Points will definitely surge.

“Ah, I’m so happy!”

KNOCK! KNOCK!

At this time, the impeccably attired attendant who’d left earlier was back. He lightly knocked twice on the door and nodded to the woman with the sunglasses.

The corners of the mouth of the woman in sunglasses ticked up, and she gave a slight nod of her head.

The next moment, a group of sturdy men in suits swarmed in.

Each of these men wore a face mask and their bodies were extremely strong. In addition to the way they were dressed, one could tell that they were bodyguards at a glance.

But Xia Luoqing knew instantly that this group of men weren’t her normal bodyguards.

Although the golden dragon that Xu Que had shot out was strong and could also magically jolt and send opponents flying, this group of bodyguards had received special training. It went without saying that their marksmanship was exceptional, but the important part was that these men were outfitted with…guns.

Yes, they had real guns, which were in their hands and not concealed at all.

Xia Luoqing was completely bowled over by Boss Lin’s fierce and malicious ways. She’d actually summoned this group of men so openly in such a place, in order to deal with Xu Que alone. “Was there really a need to make such a big fuss over him?”

“Boss Lin is indeed…ha, ha, ha, powerful. It looks like my Xia family doesn’t need to step in.” Xia Luoqing couldn’t help laughing.

“What’s Young Master Xia talking about? These people came to my restaurant with guns to commit an armed robbery. It seems as if I should be calling the police right now.” The woman in the sunglasses said with an indifferent expression on her face. She really took out her cell phone, ready to call the police.

Xia Luoqing was not stupid and could naturally figure out that this was the excuse being used by the woman in the sunglasses. It was nothing more than following the course of the events and ridding herself of suspicion ahead of time to clear any connection with these people.

As for how it would work after that, it was none of his business.

Anyway, he was well aware that Xu Que would soon be met with an unfortunate accidental death during this armed robbery. The murderer would be arrested, but the restaurant would be fine, and Boss Lin would be okay too. He, Xia Luoqing, would definitely be fine as well.

But the problem was that Xu Que was still live-streaming, and no one had any way of knowing how many people were witnessing everything that was going on.

Xia Luoqing knew, and Boss Lin also knew, but they seemed to not care about it.

Xu Que, however, did not take it seriously.

He stood up with a smile and also didn’t forget to take his cell phone as he said, “I can’t seem to really be comfortable in this room. Shall we go outside?”

“Young man, can’t you see that my restaurant is being held hostage by these people? You’d better not move about randomly, lest you annoy these robbers and injure yourself.” At this time, the woman in the sunglasses opened her mouth again to coldly remind him of what was going on.

And as soon as these words were out of her mouth, the guns in the hands of these men in suits at the door were raised and aimed at Xu Que one by one.

“Erm, we can talk things over nicely. Don’t get so worked up. It’s only a robbery. There’s no need to kill anyone.” Xu Que immediately held up both his hands and sat back in his chair, admitting his terror.

Truthfully speaking, he really hadn’t expected things to evolve to this point.

Originally he’d only wanted to pretend to Act Tough, but he hadn’t expected to provoke a crazy woman. “What a nutcase, ah!

“All I did was to just make the remark, you call for your people too.

“Did you have to summon so many people with guns to scare me?

“My Eighteen Dragon Palms is not the Golden Shield Iron Gown!”

At the same time, the bullet comments in the live-streaming room had already gone through the roof.

“F*ck, f*ck, the live-streamer has invested big in the script. So many people have appeared.”

“What the f*ck, where did he get so many fake guns. They look like the real thing.”

“But this group of men really look the part. I don’t know why. They don’t look like they are acting at all.”

“This is only because you’ve been brainwashed by lousy movies. Isn’t this bad acting?”

…..

“Young man, are you still in the mood to play with your cell phone?” At this time, Boss Lin looked at Xu Que and suddenly made a comment.

The unspoken implication was to warn Xu Que to turn off his cell phone.

Xia Luoqing, on the other hand, suddenly realized that something seemed a little off.

Although this woman was capable of anything, there was no reason to send so many people to point guns at him just because of Xu Que’s single remark. Moreover, she had been procrastinating and slow to make her move. It didn’t seem to be in line with this woman’s style.

Unless…

“F*ck, this woman has her eye on Xu Que and wants to get those martial arts secrets from him. This group of people are here to catch him.”

Xia Luoqing finally snapped to attention and immediately couldn’t sit still.

He should’ve thought of this at the first instant, but because this woman had done a lot of crazy things in the past, it had led to his clouded judgment.

But no matter whether he’d thought of it first or was only realizing it now, it seemed there was no difference, because it was useless now.

This was after all, the territory of the woman in sunglasses. Since she’d discovered Xu Que’s secret and also developed an interest, then perhaps it would be very difficult for him, Xia Luoqing, to get rid of Xu Que.

“What’s it got to do with you whether I’m in the mood to play with my cell phone or not? Don’t tell me they are here with their guns just so they can grab my cell phone?” At this time, Xu Que spoke up and decided to go head to head with the woman in the sunglasses. He was suddenly not terrified anymore.

The woman in the sunglasses stared blankly at him for a while. Initially, Xu Que had been acting afraid just now, which gave her the self-confidence to think that she had the upper hand over Xu Que. Who would’ve thought that it had only taken a moment for this guy to work up his courage?

“Are you sure?” The woman in the sunglasses asked Xu Que a question again.

Immediately after, a few of the armed burly chaps in suits outside the door marched forward. They pointed the muzzles of their guns at Xu Que, while they reached out to grab his cell phone.

Xu Que narrowed his eyes and directly threw his cell phone on the table with a BANG sound.

The burly chaps were immediately startled.

The next moment, Xu Que suddenly reached his hand out to point at the cell phone on the table and loudly said, “Come on, the cell phone is here. I want to see today, who would f*cking dare touch my cell phone? I’ll rip his dick off!”

Xu Que’s voice was full of confidence and his imposing manner was extraordinary.

Several of the burly chaps in suits stared blankly and were struck dumb.

“What’s going on?”

“Clearly we’re the ones holding the guns. How come this fool is more arrogant than we are?”

They were baffled and all looked to the woman in the sunglasses at the same time, as if they were waiting for instructions.

The woman in the sunglasses directly extended a slim finger and in front of Xu Que, in front of everyone, her finger gently touched the cell phone.

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1527 - The Men Are Here
chapters.body:
Chapter 1527 - The Men Are Here

At this time, in the shadows of the tall, magnificent buildings, a car drove toward a hotel entrance. The car door opened, and every man who got out of the car was impeccably attired in the same Western-style suits. The expressions in their eyes were ice-cold. They looked as if they were killers for hire.

Several black cars arrived shortly after, and a few old people got out of these cars wearing typical Chinese tunic suits. They all had white hair, but they didn’t look old-fashioned or tired at all. Instead, they appeared to be particularly spirited. They walked tall and straight. At a glance, their momentum looked firmer even than the men in the Western suits.

“So many masters?”

Not too far away, Xuanyuan Wanrong had already bought some new clothes and changed her look. Then she had headed back to the hotel with Lin Yuxi. She couldn’t help but feel astonished, chancing upon this scene.

Although her cultivation was gone, Xuanyuan Wanrong’s ability to make discerning judgments was still strong. She could tell at a glance that this group of people were not ordinary people, but martial arts practitioners.

With the appearance of so many experts at this moment combined with the trap set previously by Xia Luoqing, Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly understood that this group of people most likely had been rushed here to deal with Xu Que.

“What masters?” Lin Yuxi was standing next to her and heard Xuanyuan Wanrong’s mumblings. She couldn’t help but feel startled as she looked to where Xuanyuan Wanrong had been looking.

She couldn’t see anything different about those people other than the fact that there were suddenly so many people arriving outside the hotel. She unconsciously thought it must be presaging the arrival of some big shot.

Any normal person would think that those men in the Western suits and the ice-cold expressions were bodyguards just by looking at them.

This hotel often had stars or important figures staying there, so she didn’t think too much about why there were all these guys outside the hotel.

“Oh, it’s nothing. Why don’t we go somewhere else to shop?” Xuanyuan Wanrong shook her head and asked.

At this time, she was being very rational about it. Even if she went to find Xu Que, not only could she not help, she could also cause trouble for him by distracting him.

So she asked Lin Yuxi to take her somewhere else shopping in order to get away from the place.

“Are you sure? Xu Que and Xia are still waiting for us, or shall I call him to let him know?” Lin Yuxi was a little hesitant and felt that they shouldn’t stand up their friends in this way.

Xuanyuan Wanrong muttered to herself. Her eyes also followed intently the group of men in Western suits and the old people as they walked into the hotel. She suddenly changed her mind, shook her head, and said, “Never mind. Let’s just head up there.”

With that, she walked forward. She’d decided that she wanted to go up to have a look.

After all, too many experts had come this time. Before, when he’d been at the school, Xu Que had been able to deal with more than one enemy because those opponents hadn’t been that strong.

But the people who’d come this time… These people didn’t look like pushovers.

Xuanyuan Wanrong felt that nothing boded well for Xu Que. If he died, then it didn’t matter how far she tried to run away. She would also have to follow suit and die. So she might as well go up to take a look.

Besides, she honestly felt that this matter still had something to do with her.

If it hadn’t been for her appearance, then Xia Luoqing wouldn’t have had designs on her and probably wouldn’t have set up a trap to deal with Xu Que.

Xu Que was caught in this situation now in order to protect her. If she were to deliberately avoid the situation even though she knew exactly what was going to happen, then it would be rather too much.

So, after giving it much thought, Xuanyuan Wanrong decided to go to the scene to take a look. Although she couldn’t be of any help, at least she would know what was happening.

After all, from the very beginning, when she had been dragged in by the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi, she had basically given up hope. She had no confidence when it came to the matter of traversing the Relationship Tribulations with Xu Que.

…..

Meanwhile, in the restaurant at the top of the hotel, most of the people had been cleared out or had left on their own voluntarily. Xu Que had also left the private room, and he was sitting in the main hall of the restaurant fiddling with his cell phone. He was chatting with his online friends in the live-streaming room after he had fixed his hairstyle so that he would appear more photogenic.

Xia Luoqing and the middle-aged man were sitting near him, with the fire of revenge raging inside of them. They were also rather excited. Because a minute ago, their cell phones had gotten texts at the same time informing them that help had arrived.

Xia Luoqing stayed quite calm. After all, the people who had arrived to help him were hired thugs sent by his family. They were the kind of hired thugs who could do vicious things.

But the middle-aged man hadn’t done the same. He’d reported the entire situation to his sect. He’d even exaggerated a little, in order for his master to step forward.

As a result, he’d really startled his master, and so his master had summoned elders and masters of other sects to come with him and help.

Now this situation had become huge. If it had been put in a martial arts novel, this battle would be considered equivalent to the six major factions besieging Bright Peak or some major martial arts convention.

“This boy isn’t going to be able to stay arrogant for too much longer now. When my master and the masters of several other major sects show up, no matter how good he is, this will be the end for him.” The middle-aged man glowered at Xu Que’s back and spoke in a low voice.

Xia Luoqing’s face had a completely indifferent expression. He didn’t care much about what the middle-aged man had just said, and, in fact, he even thought it beneath his dignity to talk to the guy.

So what if they had good kung fu? So what if their Inner Power was profound? So what if they could magically shoot out a dragon?

After all, none of this compared to a single bullet from a gun.

Boss Lin had only brought out the guns earlier as a threat because she had developed an interest in Xu Que.

But that was only a threat. She hadn’t really wanted to kill Xu Que, and that had given Xu Que a chance to poison her, forcing her to leave.

But his Xia family was not like this at all. Once his people were here, they would not talk nonsense with Xu Que. They would just directly shoot and kill him. They wouldn’t even give him half a chance.

“Yo, why do I feel that both of your murderous auras have become a lot stronger all of a sudden? Is it because your men have arrived?” At this time, Xu Que turned his head sharply and grinned at Xia Luoqing and the middle-aged man.

The eyes of the two men twitched. “D*mn, you can also feel murderous auras?”

“Yes, they are already in the elevator, if you must know,” Xia Luoqing felt that it would be beneath him to hide it, so he directly nodded and replied.

“Do they have guns?” Xu Que asked calmly.

“…..” Xia Luoqing suddenly glanced at the cell phone in Xu Que’s hand as he calmly asked, “Are you live-streaming?”

“Yeah, it’s fine. Go ahead and say it. I’m not afraid, so what are you afraid of?” Xu Que laughed.

“I’m afraid?” Xia Luoqing sneered and growled, “Yes, they brought guns with them.”

“Well, that’s good. What about you? Are your master and the other masters here also?” Xu Que turned his head and asked the middle-aged man.

“They are here and also in the elevator.” The middle-aged man nodded.

“Very good.” Xu Que immediately stood up and walked toward the door.

Xia Luoqing and the middle-aged man both stared blankly. “Why was he so eager? Was he actually going out to meet them at the door?”

However, Xu Que walked out of the restaurant and went straight into the surveillance room, which was in a nearby corner of the floor.

Boss Lin was sitting inside the surveillance room, and she was still concerned about what was going on inside her restaurant. She hadn’t expected that Xu Que would suddenly come looking for her.

BANG!

Without waiting for the people inside to respond to his knock, Xu Que pushed open the door of the surveillance room and asked, “Tell me which elevators the Xia family’s people and the martial arts masters are in.”

“What?” Boss Lin stared blankly at him and was startled. “What was this fool planning to do and what did he mean by asking this question?”

“Never mind, no need to tell me. I can see them myself.” Xu Que had caught a glimpse of the surveillance video and had immediately identified the men in suits and the several other old men.

These men were in three different elevators, with no one else but them inside.

“Heh, heh, heh, that’s perfect! Now I can have some fun.” Xu Que’s eyes suddenly lit up. He turned around and left the surveillance room.

Xia Luoqing and the middle-aged man had followed him at a distance. Before they could understand what he was planning to do, they saw him headed toward the elevators in high spirits.

Boss Lin also seemed to realize that something was going on and hurried out of the surveillance room.

Xu Que put his cell phone down on the floor. He continued his live-streaming. Then he walked toward the elevator and directly opened the elevator door using brute force. He nimbly jumped into the elevator shaft.

“F*ck, this guy’s crazy? Is he trying to kill himself?” Boss Lin was shocked.

The elevator was climbing now, and this guy had jumped in. He would either fall and be cut into pieces or be wedged between the elevator and the roof and turned into mincemeat. He was dead either way.

But in the next moment, they were stupefied.

Like Spider-Man, Xu Que propped his legs against the walls of the elevator shaft. He pulled out an enormous cable cutter from the midsection of his body and pulled on the elevator cable. His plan was to cut it.
