chapters.title: Chapter 1537 - Xu Que“S Furious!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1537 - Xu Que“S Furious!

Xu Que retreated, ending the kiss.

“Are you crazy?” He stared at Xuanyuan Wanrong.

“Eh?” Xuanyuan Wanrong was surprised. From Xu Que’s expression, she could see that he didn’t seem to like her.

“That didn’t work?” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s brows knit in concentration and confusion, and her beautiful eyes were full of anger. She clenched her small fists and said coldly, “The website has deceived me.”

Xu Que rolled his eyes, speechless.

“Xu… Xu Que…” Lin Yuxi suddenly called Xu Que, her voice trembling.

Xu Que was stunned and turned quickly to look at Lin Yuxi. She was covering her forehead with one hand. Her face was pale, and she seemed to be in a lot of pain.

“What’s wrong?” Xu Que asked.

“My… my head hurts a lot. It’s killing me,” Lin Yuxi said with much difficulty. “It seems that there are a lot of strange messages in my head. There are…there are Demons, there are fairies, there is a lot of blood. I seem to be in danger…”

WHOOSH!

Suddenly, she abruptly raised her head and looked at Xu Que, her face full of astonishment. “Xu Que?”

“Ah?” Xu Que was a little dazed. At that moment, Lin Yuxi seemed to have changed. Just a second ago, she had been panicking and having a headache. Now, she seemed very calm and her eyes were clear.

“Oh…” Suddenly, Lin Yuxi laughed bitterly, with a hint of self-deprecation, and said in a joyful voice, “I didn’t think that I’d ever see you again before dying… Hey, I must be dreaming.”

As she spoke, she looked at her surrounding environment and seemed to feel that something was wrong, but she didn’t give it much thought and attributed it to her dreaming.

“Forget it. Even if seeing you is only a dream, I have no regrets left. The Earth Continent is collapsing, and many people are in trouble. I thought that with a piece of enlightenment, I would be qualified to be back at your side again, but there was another twist of fate, eventually I… ”

CLICK! CLICK!

Before Lin Yuxi could finish speaking, her voice broke off into a noise similar to the static of an electric current. Following which, Lin Yuxi’s body in the car stiffened in place and became illusory like everyone else’s.

“This…” Xuanyuan Wanrong was shocked by Lin Yuxi’s sudden change.

Xu Que himself was also dumbfounded. But from listening to Lin Yuxi’s last few sentences, he had gotten several clues.

He was very shocked. Previously, the Lin Yuxi that he had seen was definitely from his world of memory, the Lin Yuxi from the school campus.

However, the Lin Yuxi he’d seen after she’d said that she had a headache, the Lin Yuxi now, seemed to have become the Lin Yuxi from the Earth Continent.

When Xu Que had returned to the Earth Continent, he had met Lin Yuxi again. She’d been taken from Earth by a superior, met Xu Que, and later left on her own, seeking the enlightenment left behind by her master.

Xu Que had also believed that he had let go of his feelings and grudges from back then, and he hadn’t gone to find her. He’d only sent people from the Heavenly Palace Academy to protect her secretly. After returning to the Heaven Continent, he’d never seen her again.

He hadn’t expected that he would meet her now like this. It seemed beyond belief. Lin Yuxi’s consciousness seemed to have been transmitted directly to the Lin Yuxi in this world of memory.

And from her last words, it wasn’t difficult to infer that she was facing a life-and-death crisis.

In addition, the Earth Continent had collapsed, proving that what Mo Junchen had said was correct. The Heaven Continent was a giant boat bound by shackles, and, once the shackles were unlocked, the Xuanhuang Continent and the Earth Continent would both collapse. Only by fleeing to the Heaven Continent and jumping on this giant boat would they remain alive.

“There is big trouble. Sh*t, why did this d*mn Heavenly Stone of Taiyi crap have to happen at this time…”

Xu Que felt like his head was about to explode. The Heaven Continent was in trouble, and he didn’t know what the situation was with Jiang Hongyan and the others. In addition, he had now learned that Lin Yuxi was in danger on the Earth Continent. These things were all interlinked.

Most important, he was still trapped in the world of memory of the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi, and there was no way for him to leave.

“Well, there are only two of us now,” Xuanyuan Wanrong said with no expression on her face.

Xu Que suddenly quivered and stared at Xuanyuan Wanrong. “You…what do you want to do?”

“Nothing. Since you have tried your best and there is no way for you to like me, let’s just wait for deaths together,” Xuanyuan Wanrong said indifferently.

Xu Que was relieved. He had been really afraid that Xuanyuan Wanrong would find a more drastic method. If she’d proposed that they start getting it on in the car, he didn’t know if he had the moral courage to refuse.

Most men were no different from beasts, and there were times when it was difficult to make a choice. After all, not everyone could be like that famous gentleman, Taishang Buy.

TSK! TSK! TSK!

“You worry too much. Who said that we would definitely die?” Xu Que looked at Xuanyuan Wanrong.

“Are you sure?” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s eyes lit up.

“I said before that I have a way out, but you didn’t let me finish talking and forcefully kissed me. You d*mn hooligan!” As Xu Que spoke, he rolled his eyes at Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly felt a chill run down her spine, and she had an unprecedented urge to beat someone up. But she suppressed this impulse and said in a low voice, “This world of memory is about to collapse. If we don’t pass the relationship tribulations, it is very likely that the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi will by default assume it has failed. Are you sure you can control the implications of this?”

“Yes, it will be fine.” Xu Que smiled confidently.

The sound of a System prompt appeared in his mind, indicating that the prohibition was about to be lifted in advance.

The System had detected that the reason that everything had been going haywire was that the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi had been impacted by external forces, which had caused the world of memory to be affected. This might’ve had something to do with the Heaven Continent’s shackles breaking, a momentary impact that had caused the prohibitions of the world of memory to be destroyed.

Because of this, the difficulty of lifting the prohibition was now greatly reduced, and it could be cracked directly in only a few hours.

“Soon? How soon?” Xuanyuan Wanrong was stunned and disbelieving.

PAH!

Xu Que smiled slightly and snapped his fingers. “Now!”

BOOM!

The next moment, a loud noise suddenly sounded all around, and the surroundings outside the car suddenly fell away swiftly like a painting that had hung high on the wall.

Following which, the car that the two of them had been sitting in also began to disintegrate and break down into small particles.

Immediately, the environment outside the two people disappeared, and their surroundings became a boundless white world of light and shadows.

“This…” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face was full of shock and disbelief.

Ever since the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi’s relationship tribulations had been around, no one had ever been able to control them, and no one had ever been able to escape by trickery.

But now Xu Que had actually done it, and they were actually out of that world of memory.

“How did you do it?” Xuanyuan Wanrong looked at Xu Que in surprise.

“By relying on this!” Xu Que tapped his finger on his head.

Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned. “By relying on your melon head?”

Xu Que rolled his eyes again. “This is called wisdom. By relying on my wisdom, do you understand?”

“It’s hard to believe!” Xuanyuan Wanrong shook her head and breathed a sigh of relief at the same time. “Since you have been able to crack the tribulations, then I don’t have to worry about the next level.”

“Ah?” Xu Que suddenly became surprised. “What are you talking about? The next level?”

“What are you asking? The first level involves going through your world of memory, then the next level will naturally involve going through my world of memory. Although I don’t know how you restored your memory, I don’t recommend that you help me restore mine. The situation could become messy.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked at Xu Que seriously and said solemnly, “Remember, don’t try to restore my memory, and don’t tell me anything about me. You just need to crack it like last time and pass the relationship tribulations.”

“What? Who cares about cracking these god d*mn tribulations? I mean, how can there be a next level? The priority now is to return to the Heaven Continent!” Xu Que immediately became anxious.

He’d thought that by lifting the prohibition, he could immediately return to the Heaven Continent.

Now that the Heaven Continent was in deep water and scorching fire, he was very worried about Jiang Hongyan and the others. Furthermore, Lin Yuxi was still on the Earth Continent and was in danger. As someone he’d known well and had a past narrative with, he couldn’t justify not saving her.

But at this critical moment, there was actually the next level of the relationship tribulations to go through?

“System!” Xu Que immediately shifted his thoughts, calling out to the System.

BOOM!

However, before he was able to access the System, a strong pulling feeling suddenly came from all directions and covered his whole body.

The bodies of Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong were instantly torn into pieces and turned into two streams of light, dissipating into the vast white space.

Not long after, the vast white space flashed and turned into the scenery of green mountains, clear waters, the intoxication of a beautiful spring day, and a vast world.

There was a towering mountain with a stone ladder leading upward.

At the top of the stone ladder, there was a mountain gate. There was a stone tablet at the entrance of the mountain gate. Three large characters were written in bold on it: Heavenly Palace Academy.

Xu Que was wearing a black robe and carrying a purple, gold, and black stick. He stood at the foot of the mountain, looking up at this beautiful scene, with an ugly expression on his face.

He was back, back on the Heaven Continent, and all his cultivation had been restored to its peak state.

But the problem was that he’d returned to the Heaven Continent tens of thousands of years ago. This was the world of memory of Xuanyuan Wanrong.

“Sh*t. Heavenly Stone of Taiyi, if I don’t throw you into a latrine once I finally get home, then my surname is not Xu.” Xu Que’s heart was raging with fury.

He didn’t like the feeling of being controlled, especially by a piece of rock.

DING! At this time, a clear System prompt sounded in Xu Que’s mind. “Welcome the return of the Host!”

Hearing this familiar System sound, Xu Que didn’t have to call out. He knew that the original acting tough System was back, not the replicated version of the System.

Because of this, he felt a little more stable.

DING! “It is detected that the host had previously temporarily disconnected from the System. The reason was that the System level was too low and unable to resist the God’s strength, hence the host was isolated. The System could only use a loophole to send a replicated version of the System to help the host.”

“To prevent this situation from occurring again, it is recommended that the host work hard, continue to act tough, and upgrade the level of the System as soon as possible.”

The System said a bunch of things in succession.

Xu Que spread his hands helplessly. It was blaming him for its low level?

However, it wasn’t that he didn’t care about upgrading the System now. At this time, his first priority was to lift the prohibitions of the relationship tribulations as soon as possible and return to the Heaven Continent.

He thought long and hard about it and prepared to communicate with the System.

DING!

Suddenly, the System prompt sounded again.

“Due to the influence of the God’s strength, the System and the host are temporarily disconnected. Although this is because the System level is too low, the action of the God’s strength could also be regarded as a provocation to the System. The host is angry, and the System is even angrier.”

HUH?

Xu Que was dumbfounded when he heard this. Was the System throwing a temper tantrum?

Sh*t, this was shocking news.

DING! “According to special System regulations, the host’s current surroundings are in a virtual prohibited world. In view of the high level of strength in this world, in order to ensure the survival of the host, all goods in the System store will be provided free of charge, and the revenge mechanism and other functions will be activated for free until you leave this world.”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1538 - Tyranny Of The Heaven Palace Academy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1538 - Tyranny Of The Heaven Palace Academy

All…all for free?

Hearing the System’s prompt, Xu Que’s eyes immediately widened in disbelief.

Since when had this profiteering System been so generous? This wasn’t rational.

Ever since the System had been upgraded, the prices of the items in the System store had all skyrocketed. Although Xu Que felt that most of the goods weren’t really usable, there were still many powerful items that Xu Que was interested in. But every time he looked at the prices of those items, he gave up.

After all, with his strength, after activating the System’s revenge mechanism that time in the Heaven Continent, it had been enough to crush countless people and even face the strongmen of the Celestial Cloud Continent without resistance.

Thus, at that time, Xu Que didn’t need to spend all his efforts and empty all his finances to exchange for any goods in the System.

But this time, the Heaven Continent where he was located was the Heaven Continent that had peaked tens of thousands of years ago. It belonged to the era of Xuanyuan Wanrong and supposedly contained Celestial Emperors. Hence, he definitely would need to rely on the revenge mechanism and other great items from the System to get through this.

For some reason, the System had now changed from its previous stinginess and became extremely generous, providing the goods in the System store for free, in addition to the revenge mechanism and other functions. After Xu Que got over his shock, he became ecstatic.

“Ha, ha, ha, System, I’m starting to begin to appreciate you.” Xu Que nodded appreciatively. If the System could have been materialized into a body, Xu Que would definitely have patted its shoulder and its head.

Xu Que called out the System, entered the System store interface, and started browsing.

When the System had been upgraded to version 11.0, it had entered a so-called second stage. In other words, version 11.0 of the System had undergone a thorough change and technically shouldn’t have really been called version 11.0. It would’ve been more appropriate to have described it as second stage System, level 1.

The items in the System store had also undergone major changes. Many of the Magic Arts that had previously made Xu Que envious were now swept to the bottom of the inventory, and the upper positions had been taken by a variety of top-level celestial powers and even many divine magic arts.

PFFT!

“Big Dipper 36 Changes, Evil Star 72 Changes…” Xu Que had just glanced at the column called Divine Magic Arts. As he saw the names of the first two divine magic arts, he couldn’t help but start laughing with glee.

These were really powerful divine arts. It was really great that these were all free now.

D*mn, he was so happy!

Xu Que’s face was filled with joy, and he continued to look further down the list of items that were available. There were even more divine magic arts, and his heart couldn’t help but jump with joy.

The thing that moved him the most was undoubtedly the ten divine magic arts that altogether were known as the “Ten Great Divine Magic Arts”. Examples of these were “The Heavenly Eye Which Sees Clearly with No Obstacles Art”, shortened to “Heavenly Eye Art”, and also the “Knowing His Mind Well Art”, shortened to “Knowing Mind Art”…

These famous Ten Great Divine Magic Arts, once cultivated, were first-rate attributes of the Celestial Stage, and the cultivator who used them would be known the Master of the Ten Arts. He wouldn’t just achieve the attainment of the Celestial Emperor Realm, but the Taoist Prime and Taoist Emperor Realms would be waiting just around the corner.

In the past, he’d wanted to purchase these Ten Great Divine Magic Arts, but was helpless as the amount of Acting Tough Points required to purchase them was astronomical. When he saw their value, Xu Que had immediately forgotten about them, but this time he could use them for free.

Even after he’d left this world and all of this would disappear, being able to have experienced it would turn out to have been very beneficial.

“It’s amazing! If I learned all of them, even a Celestial Emperor would be no match for me!” Xu Que was suddenly very excited, glancing at the column of celestial powers in the System store. He couldn’t help but laugh out loud.

Whether it was the divine magic arts or the other kinds of celestial powers, they were all extremely powerful. If he used any of them, it would be enough to break the heads of many cultivators. Now, he could use them all.

With these items, perhaps it would be a lot easier to survive in this world. He would be able to earn enough Acting Tough Points faster, crack the prohibition, and return to the Heaven Continent.

“With the System in hand, the world is mine!” Xu Que couldn’t hold back the excitement in his heart and let out a loud roar.

BOOM!

Suddenly, a powerful force echoed down from the stone steps.

“Who is this presumptuous fool, who is making such a ruckus outside the Heaven Palace Academy?” A strong, scolding voice could be heard.

Xu Que felt shocked. His chest felt pressured, his face became pale, and his heart was stunned.

That was the essence of a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven, but the strength of this Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven was far more powerful than all the Golden Celestials of the Great All-Embracing Heaven that he had ever met in the Heaven Continent.

With just this little bit of a display of strength, he’d actually felt so stressed.

Sure enough, those cultivators from tens of thousands of years ago were all evildoers…

Xu Que couldn’t help but smile bitterly. He was also a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven, and killing another Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven in the Heaven Continent was as easy as killing a chicken. He could even kill Celestial Kings that he had encountered. Who knew that tens of thousands of years ago, he would be so stressed by meeting a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven.

“Who are you, report your name!” At this time, the other party seemed to have discovered Xu Que’s strength. His tone was no longer aggressive as he asked in a deep voice.

Xu Que’s gaze changed and a polite and humble smile appeared on his face. He saluted and said lightly, “I am Xu Que from the Exploding Heavens Faction. I have heard about the reputation of the Heaven Palace Academy for a long time, and the admiration in my heart is like a surging river, flowing endlessly. It is like the flooding of the Yellow River, unstoppable. So I have deliberately come to pay a visit.”

Xu Que deliberately made himself seem inferior, trying to act like a pig to prey on a tiger.

Although he had a whole System store that he could try for free, he hadn’t had enough time to practice and control anything yet. If he rashly fought with the Heaven Palace Academy, it would alert Celestial Primes and Celestial Emperors, and he could suffer a huge loss.

What was more was that he hadn’t met Xuanyuan Wanrong yet, and it wouldn’t be good if he fought now with the Heaven Palace Academy.

After all, he was already here. It would be a pity not to take a look at what Xuanyuan Wanrong had been like tens of thousands of years ago.

HMPH!

The other party snorted. “What Exploding Heavens Faction? I’ve never heard of it. You’re just a trivial Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven, how could you have received the qualifications to visit the Heaven Palace Academy? If you’re not here to join our recruitment drive, please leave quickly, otherwise don’t blame me if I don’t go easy on you.”

Sh*t!

Xu Que was momentarily stunned. The Heaven Palace Academy was so overbearing?

Sh*t, he’d come to visit them so politely, and they’d responded in such an aggressive manner. This was a form of bullying, how preposterous!

“Okay, I’ll leave!” Xu Que saluted and turned to walk away. He was scared.

It wasn’t that the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven was too strong, but that some other beings had appeared on the stone ladder. He couldn’t afford to provoke Elders of the Celestial Prime Realm.

“What’s going on here?” A gentle and elegant voice said forcefully but not angrily.

Although Xu Que was already walking down the mountain, he could still clearly hear their conversation.

The Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven respectfully responded, “Elder Liu, there was a small cultivator who was boasting shamelessly and wanted to visit the Heaven Palace Academy, so I reprimanded him.”

“Did you hurt anyone?” An elegant voice asked.

The Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven hurriedly responded, “I didn’t dare!”

“Not bad, you handled it very well. In the future, if you encounter such a scenario again, you can just scold them. If you take physical action, the people outside will say that the Heaven Palace Academy is too unreasonable and is a bully. All right, continue to guard the mountain gate. Our academy is recruiting new people today, there mustn’t be any trouble.” The elegant voice gradually drifted away.

The Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven also respectfully sent off the other party with these words, “The disciple will follow the Elder’s instructions!”

“…..” As Xu Que heard this, his footsteps stopped, and a strange expression crept onto his face.

How annoying!

Just scold, and any physical action would be considered unreasonable bullying?

Sh*t, was the Heaven Palace Academy so domineering back then? It was even more arrogant than his Exploding Heavens Faction.

Xu Que was very annoyed, but the reason wasn’t that the other party had been so overbearing, but that the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven had actually been just a gatekeeper.

D*mn, by comparison, he wasn’t even as good as a gatekeeper?

No, this was absolutely unbearable.

The Heaven Palace Academy was recruiting new people, right? Today, he would make trouble in the Heaven Palace Academy.

“System, quick, give me celestial powers, give me Divine Magic Arts, and also give me tens of High-Grade Celestial Artifacts. I’m going to act tough now!”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1539 - Divine Magic Arts Displayed
chapters.body:
Chapter 1539 - Divine Magic Arts Displayed

After spending two long hours contemplating all the items in the System store, Xu Que had finally decided on his divine and celestial magic choices.

While everything in the System store was being provided to him free of charge, a fantastic opportunity, where divine and celestial magic arts were concerned, one couldn’t be too careful.

Xu Que was very clear on the principle that it didn’t serve one well to be greedy, nor to bite off more than one could chew.

In the process of skill cultivation, any minor mishap could quite possibly result in conflicts in the celestial arts and, ultimately, a Qi deviation. Hence, there was a need to be cautious.

Of course, with the System with him at all times, Xu Que didn’t have to worry too much about any potential conflicts.

What he was truly concerned about was pursuing the pinnacle of perfection. This required him to combine his strengths and weaknesses in the process of skill cultivation, in order to make himself more well-rounded and more powerful.

That explained why he had spent two hours picking out 23 different types of divine magic arts and eight of the top celestial arts: ST23 and D8 for short. Once the letters and numbers had been sorted out and paired accordingly, the result would be simply horrifying, mysterious, and unpredictable.

Upon confirmation, the selected divine and celestial magic arts were directly sent to his inventory by the System.

Overcome with desire, Xu Que clicked on the “Select all” and “Apply” buttons in one swift motion, acquiring the skills instantly.

He stood at the foot of the stairs to the Heaven Palace Sect, maintaining his distance but not once leaving his spot.

He closed his eyes and, with his robe swaying gently in the wind, he stood motionless as a statue.

In less than a minute, every divine and celestial magic art that Xu Que had selected from the System store began to take form in his mind and evolved from an unfamiliar skill to a well-rehearsed one.

After taking a few deep breaths, Xu Que opened his eyes in a flash. His eyes were now as vast and deep as orbiting planets, but before long, they reverted to their normal appearance. Similarly, his ears shuddered slightly before they became still again.

Yet, with a single glance and a single sound, he could see a glimpse of the future.

“Now this is interesting!”

The corners of Xu Que’s mouth turned up in a smile.

He had just tried to use two divine magic arts, “the art of foreseeing all future calamities” and “the art of unfettered divine hearing” (“calamity-foreseeing art” and “divine hearing art” for short).

The former enabled one to learn all about upcoming disasters, even the most unspeakable calamities.

The latter, on the other hand, allowed one to enjoy unfettered divine hearing anywhere and everywhere. All the sounds in the world could be heard by the person who owned the art, and it was up to them whether or not they wanted to listen to those sounds.

To put it simply, the single glance he’d taken just now had enabled him to foresee an imminent incident that had something to do with people and, more important, him.

From what he had heard just now, he could tell from thousands of miles away, that the person who was present in his premonition was about to appear.

TSK! TSK! TSK!

The ten great celestial magic arts are indeed as powerful as they are said to be. Should I be able to master all of the ten great celestial arts someday, I could be the almighty ruler of heaven and earth. Xu Que felt an upsurge of emotion in his heart. He had merely experienced two of the ten great celestial arts, but he already knew how mighty and formidable they were, and he still possessed eight other celestial arts.

But, at the moment, it was critical to do some preparation.

The person who was coming from thousands of miles away and was about to be involved in an incident with him was already on the way here.

The image that Xu Que had foreseen just now was one of him waiting at the foot of the mountain, thinking of a way to sneak into the Heaven Palace Sect to join the recruiting conference.

In the end, a cultivator at the Celestial King stage had descended from the sky at full speed and landed right beside Xu Que. After darting a glance at Xu Que, the cultivator had frowned and asked Xu Que if he had come to take part in the Heaven Palace Sect’s disciple-recruiting conference.

In his premonition, Xu Que had lied, saying yes to the cultivator’s question without even batting an eye.

Unexpectedly, upon hearing Xu Que’s reply, the cultivator had instantly summoned a middle-grade Celestial Artifact, a flying sword, and swung it at Xu Que.

Xu Que dodged the blow by a hair’s breadth and interrogated the cultivator on his motive for attacking him. In response to this, the cultivator explained his reasons for doing so, all the while continuing to attack Xu Que.

It turned out that a recruitment pass was required for one to gain admission to the Heaven Palace Sect’s recruiting conference. The Celestial King cultivator had made plans with a confidante of his to enter the Heaven Palace Sect to further cultivate their skills together. But alas, despite his greatest efforts, he had only managed to acquire a single recruitment pass. Ultimately, following a series of exchanges in which both parties offered to give up the pass to each other, it was decided that this Celestial King cultivator would enter the Heaven Palace Sect alone.

But as it happened, this cultivator had bumped into Xu Que at the foot of the mountain and found out that Xu Que was also there to attend the recruiting conference. This information made him reach the conclusion that Xu Que had a recruitment pass on him too. Moreover, Xu Que was only at the level of a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven in his cultivation stage. Hence, an impulse to kill Xu Que in order to obtain his recruitment pass had risen within the Celestial King cultivator.

As for the final outcome, Xu Que’s cultivation stage was too low for him to have gained a full view of the future using the calamity-foreseeing art, but it had been sufficient that he had been informed about the incident in advance.

This meant that he could do a little preparation in advance to employ the most energy-saving method in dealing with his opponent.

“Hee, hee, hee, System: bring me the top death spells. Oh, and the materials for the spells too (since they’re all free anyway), please. Ummm, bring me a packet of cigarettes too, while you’re at it.”

In no time, Xu Que made a series of arrangements swiftly.

Following a number of modifications, the death spells that Xu Que had acquired from the System overlapped one another and let out a bright glow that covered every surface before dimming immediately after.

…..

While all this was happening, situated in a small cave at the foot of a mountain near the South Tower of the Heaven Palace Sect, a young lady was suspended in the air with her legs crossed in the midst of a skill cultivation.

She was wearing immaculate white clothing, which was no match for her snow-white complexion, and she had an attractive face with both hints of infantile tenderness and a tinge of coldness…

All of a sudden, she awoke from her cultivation state. Her eyes snapped open and she frowned.

“Was that an illusion? Why does it feel as though a strong Celestial Core Wave just flashed by?” She muttered to herself with uncertainty as her body gently landed on the ground.

If this had happened in the past, she wouldn’t have been too bothered. Even if it hadn’t been an illusion and there had indeed been a Celestial Core Wave, it was a very normal occurrence.

After all, this was the Heaven Palace Sect, the strongest power in the entire Heaven Continent where countless masters resided, so any occurrence like this was nothing out of the ordinary.

But what had baffled her was the fact that the Celestial Core Wave had appeared where she was, when she had made such deliberate efforts to choose a remote cave to refine her skills in.

Besides, it seemed as if the wave had come from the foot of the mountain.

“Forget it. There hasn’t been any progress in my skill cultivation even after so many days of seclusion. Anyway, I haven’t been out in a couple of years…” The young lady mumbled to herself while waving her hand gently to remove the restrictive barrier she had imposed on the cave.

She wanted to go out for a walk!

…..

Hundreds of feet above, at a high altitude, a middle-aged man in a blue shirt was controlling a Celestial Sword. Having become one with the sword, he’d transformed into time itself and sped toward the Heaven Palace Sect.

With every step that he took toward the Heaven Palace Sect, his feelings grew increasingly complicated.

He had spent many years in cultivation and experienced numerous trials and tribulations to attain the cultivation level of a Celestial King. Today, he was preparing to enter the Heaven Palace Sect, which should have been a matter worth celebrating, but he couldn’t bring himself to be happy.

Deep down in his heart, he was still preoccupied with thoughts of her. The two of them had gone through thick and thin for many years and admired each other. On a lovely night, the two had even made pinkie promises to enter the Heaven Palace Sect together to refine their skills at the same time, seek enlightenment together, and become a power couple worthy of everyone’s admiration.

Who knew that heaven would make fools of them? Despite their greatest efforts, they had only managed to obtain one recruitment pass.

At present, as he approached the Heaven Palace Sect, he became incomparably disconsolate, as he was reminded of the long period of time he would be separated from her.

“Don’t worry, Xiaoli. Your godfather will soon devise a method to bring you into the Heaven Palace Sect also.” The man balled up his fists tightly, his heart filled with resolution. As he set such an ambitious goal for himself, he accelerated and flew toward the Heaven Palace Sect.

Before long, he’d reached the foot of the mountain. Before he landed on the ground, he had already noticed someone else at the foot of the mountain.

The middle-aged man shuddered slightly. Looking steadily ahead, he saw that a handsome and sophisticated-looking young man dressed in black robes was sitting under a tree for shade. He was even holding a strange object in his mouth and spitting out smoke from time to time.

Beside the man in black robes was a small tin can, with 82-year-old Sprite written on it.

Be it releasing smoke from his mouth or drinking from that can of 82-year-old Sprite, the actions of the man in black robes were unparalleled in their elegance and were suggestive of the disposition of an aristocrat.

“His cultivation stage is the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven. He’s that weak and he dares to come to the Heaven Palace Sect on his own.” The middle-aged man was extremely surprised. Ecstasy soon followed.

Xiaoli, may God bless your godfather. We’ll be reunited in no time!

SWOOSH!

All at once, the middle-aged man stomped the air and his silhouette could be seen making a dive for the foot of the mountain.

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1540 - Take It Easy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1540 - Take It Easy

Just as Xu Que had foreseen in his vision with the help of the “calamity-foreseeing art”, the middle-aged man’s gaze landed on Xu Que the moment he touched the ground.

With his back against a tree, Xu Que sat in a leisurely fashion, his eyes glazing over. With a trace of melancholy, he took a nonchalant drag of the cigarette, while his other hand gently swirled the can of Sprite before raising it to his mouth to take in the scent of the drink. He then took a sip from it, holding it in his mouth to let his tongue experience the full impact of the carbon dioxide until a subtle sweetness filled his mouth even after he had swallowed the liquid.

Upon seeing this, the middle-aged man frowned and began to hesitate.

This man in black robes before him was utterly beautiful, but the crucial thing was that he was so young. Judging from his bone age, he certainly couldn’t have been more than 100 years old.

A young Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven had had the audacity to come to the Heaven Palace Sect unaccompanied. Even in a place like this, he’d still managed to maintain such a gracious disposition in tasting a liquid of some kind.

A person with such qualities must have been cultivated by someone of great influence. Anyone could tell at a glance that this was no ordinary person but a wealthy or respectable person of some kind.

Thus, there was a possibility that laying a finger on such a person in broad daylight could be a source of trouble in the future…

“Fellow cultivator, are you here to attend the Heaven Palace Sect’s recruiting conference?” Xu Que had asked enthusiastically with a bright and innocent smile before the middle-aged man could even finish processing his thoughts.

Looking at his innocent face, the middle-aged man was stunned for a moment. Memories from a long time ago began to resurface in his mind uncontrollably.

Once upon a time, when he was still a child starting on his cultivation journey, wasn’t he this kind and innocent too?

But alas, those innate qualities of authenticity, kindness, and goodness had long disappeared after the numerous perils and temptations he had experienced throughout so many years.

Those simple yet fine things had constituted his lost youth.

Thinking of this, the middle-aged man sighed inwardly but, at the same time, he had also become resolute about a certain idea.

Sorry, young man, while it isn’t a crime to be innocent, you deserve what I’m going to give you for having the audacity to mess around out here despite your innocence. Don’t blame me for being brutal.

“Indeed. Are you here to take part in the recruiting conference as well?” replied the middle-aged man in an indifferent tone. Yet, his eyes flashed intimidatingly. His impulse to kill was waking up.

As long as Xu Que nodded, he would be able to confirm that Xu Que had a recruiting pass on him and effectively steal that pass by killing him instantly.

SWOOSH!

Yet, the middle-aged man did not receive an affirmation or a denial from Xu Que.

Instead, he only saw Xu Que transform into a shadow, before hurtling toward him.

Xu Que’s remarkable speed broke the sound barrier and gave rise to deafening explosive noises.

“Wh…what?” The middle-aged man could hardly react in time. What on earth was happening?

BOOM!

The next moment, a loud roar sounded.

Just then, the middle-aged man’s facial expression changed. He had finally regained his senses.

Xu Que had already appeared before him, with a sinister expression on his face and his Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Rod in his hands. The rod was resplendent, and it burned with black-and-white flames. At the same time, a few crashes of lightning strikes flashed and crackled, as though a horrifying Heavenly Tribulation was about to descend.

This was a terrifying deadly move. This was a rod filled with divine condemnation. In the face of such a deadly rod, even a Celestial King cultivator would tremble with fear in the deepest part of his soul.

“F*ck!” The middle-aged man swore at once.

What innocence, what kindness, what simple-minded youth, what graceful disposition! To h*ll with your so-called innocence!

At the end of the day, he had been the naive one.

He frantically summoned the Celestial Core Power from every part of his body, put it beneath his feet, and even activated the secret technique of a blood sacrifice to retreat at the fastest speed possible so as to avoid the rod.

After all, he was still a cultivator of the mighty Celestial King stage. Even with his slowest reaction, he’d still managed to dodge Xu Que’s attack successfully after displaying his full prowess.

In spite of this, he didn’t manage to change his direction in time. He had retreated in a straight line, so while Xu Que’s attack didn’t crash into his body solidly, the sheer strength of the rod had torn the air and struck his head directly.

With a terrifying sound, the rod drove a hole into the head of the middle-aged man, sending blood everywhere.

“Despicable!” The middle-aged man roared angrily. On the inside, though, he was panic-stricken.

The might of this rod had far exceeded his imagination. Even though the injury didn’t count for much and was just a superficial wound, the mere strength of the rod had injured his physical body.

If the sheer strength of the rod could cause damage to his head, wouldn’t his head have exploded on the spot had he been impaled by the rod?

“Scoundrel. You dare to commit assault in broad daylight, right outside the Heaven Palace Sect?” The middle-aged man exclaimed vehemently while taking further steps backward. He didn’t wish to continue going up against Xu Que.

Xu Que’s capabilities had surpassed his expectations and, what’s more, he had also lost the chance to strike first. He’d been prepared to create a ruckus to attract the attention of the Heaven Palace Sect. Then, he was going to make up a story that Xu Que had stolen his recruiting pass.

“Ha, ha, ha, why are you shouting so loudly? Are you trying to get people from the Heaven Palace Sect to come to your aid? It’s useless. No matter how loud you shout, and even if you shout till your throat dies, no one will pay any heed to you.” Xu Que laughed coldly. A golden light flashed beneath his feet, and,with a shake of his body, he closed in on the middle-aged man.

At the same time, he kept the Tough-Acting King’s Purple-Gold Rod handy. With a pressing motion from his hands, the empty space before him instantly caved in to form a big depression.

BOOM!

An incredibly huge shadow covered the entire vault of the heaven. It was a huge black palm print that radiated a monstrous Lifeless Qi and Yin chills that began to roll toward the middle-aged man.

“What…what Demonic skill is this?” The middle-aged man shrieked instantly. He was scared out of his wits.

In the face of this palm print, he detected an acute sense of danger. He could not help but shudder inwardly. This palm print was much stronger than that rod had been just now.

“Oh, it’s nothing. I just learned this, the Great Palm Print of the Netherworld, while waiting for you. It’s just a minor celestial art, relax!” Xu Que replied cheerily. That smile of his was as despicable as one could possibly imagine. He spoke as if he was just talking about a trivial matter.

The middle-aged man was so mad that he nearly vomited blood.

A minor celestial art? Relax?

“D*mn it, would you be able to remain calm if you were in my shoes?”

At the same time, he was utterly horrified inside.

“This punk had just said that he’d been waiting for him here? Could it be that he had long known about his arrival and thus had lain here in an ambush to kill him?”

No, that couldn’t be it. He hadn’t revealed the news to anyone ever since he had acquired the recruiting pass and his trip to the Heaven Palace Sect had been a rushed journey on the down low. So how could this punk have known about his each and every move?

“Could it be…Xiaoli?”

That must be it, it couldn’t be anyone else besides Xiaoli.

Xiaoli, oh Xiaoli, your godfather has always treated you with nothing but a genuine heart. I can’t believe you are this shallow, falling in love with a young man who has nothing to show for himself but his good looks, and having no qualms about betraying your godfather to him.

AAHHH!

The more the middle-aged man thought about it, the angrier he grew. He clenched his fists tightly, turned towards the sky, and let out a roar.

BOOM!

At such a time of crisis, his body radiated a boundless Qi that rose toward the sky.

The extreme rage he felt had unleashed his never-before-seen potential and from his diaphragm came strong Celestial Core powers one after another. Before him, these powers instantly gathered to form a huge, light-blue sword.

“I summon the Destroy All Life Sword!” the middle-aged man snarled as he pointed two fingers.

The huge, light-blue sword flew toward the big black palm print in the sky, bringing with it a strong destructive energy.

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1541 - I Want To Know The Truth!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1541 - I Want To Know The Truth!

Chapter 1541 I Want to Know the Truth!

BOOM!

Suddenly a deafening noise resounded all around the area where Xu Que had been standing, and the earth shook with massive tremors as if there had been an earthquake.

The explosion had set the sky ablaze, and a blinding glow was spreading everywhere.

A light blue sword had ripped a huge chunk out of the Great Palm Print of the Netherworld that Xu Que had summoned.

The next moment, the mutilated palm print came crashing down, causing the ground to shake even more violently and sending myriad particles of debris flying into the air. The entire area was razed by the force of the attack.

“F*ck. This seems way too strong, even for a Celestial King who’s thousands of years old.” Xu Que was utterly stupefied.

He had just witnessed what had happened very clearly. The great palm print had been torn apart, and, after it had fallen, a middle-aged man had happened to be right where the tear had been.

This was absolutely beyond Xu Que’s comprehension. He had thought that the Great Palm Print of the Netherworld, coupled with the power of a few Obliterating Spells, would be sufficient to finish this Celestial King off.

He had definitely not expected that this Celestial King would be strong enough to cause a massive tear in the Great Palm Print of the Netherworld.

“Impressive, impressive. With this sort of competence, you would totally be able to match up to the masters of the Celestial Prime cultivation stage even thousands of years from now.” Xu Que was overwhelmed. This Celestial King from thousands of years ago was indeed as strong as his reputation had suggested. He had underestimated Celestial Kings, and, in particular, their ability to produce such a sudden burst of power. It was too shocking.

SWOOSH!

Overcoming his emotions, Xu Que pushed his palm forward.

All of the debris instantly disappeared, bringing the sky back to its original pristine state.

Where towering trees and green grass had once grown in abundance, all that remained was barren land. A visible depression in the shape of a large palm print could be seen in the ground.

Getting down on one knee, the middle-aged man Celestial King panted heavily, his face as white as a sheet.

That single sword move of his had taken a lot out of him. Not only had he spent a lot of his energy on it, but he had also taken a big hit to his diaphragm area, causing great damage to his meridians. He had been severely injured.

This had made his fear of Xu Que even more acute. He had only managed to unleash this enormous mighty strength after squandering all of his Celestial Core Power and damaging his source of vitality. Even then, he had only managed to parry Xu Que’s move. Now both of them seemed to have been drained of a significant amount of their energy.

But this young man seemed completely unaffected by losing so much energy displaying his move. Clearly, he had yet to give it his all.

“Ha, ha, ha…” The middle-aged man couldn’t help himself. He let out a bitter laugh. He didn’t have the strength to resist any further blows. He’d given up. There was no way he could triumph over this young man.

Besides, he could tell that this entire area had been placed under a restrictive spell. Everything that happened here, no matter how destructive or loud, would never be known by the outside world.

The scariest thing was that there were still a couple of strong Obliterating Spells in the area, which served to multiply the young man’s celestial might.

How could anyone put up a fight against this?

“Never mind, never mind! Losers are always in the wrong. Young man, before I die, I just want to ask you one question,” the middle-aged man said wearily, his voice filled with desolation. By then, he had resorted to sitting on the ground.

“Oh? What question is that?” Xu Que narrowed his eyes, keeping them focused on the middle-aged man lest he was trying to plot some kind of a trick.

The middle-aged man only raised his head and looked at Xu Que as he asked, “How long have you and Xiaoli been together, and when did you start planning this?”

“???”

At this moment, several questions surfaced in Xu Que’s mind. With a puzzled look on his face, he responded, “Who…who is Xiaoli?”

“Who is Xiaoli?”

Upon hearing this, the middle-aged man flew into a rage. “Even at a time like this, when I am surrendering, you aren’t willing to give me the answer to such a simple question?”

“Wang Meili, of course,” he answered angrily.

“Huh? Bro, you seem to be laboring under some kind of misunderstanding. I don’t know anyone named Wang Meili. I only knew that you were going to attack me, so I simply lay in wait to attack you instead.” Xu Que replied, feeling quite dazed and shaking his head at the complexity of the entire situation.

“You knew I was going to attack you?” The middle-aged man froze. Then he immediately turned bright red from anger. His eyes seemed to even be turning black from the rage burning bright in his heart.

“D*mn it, who are you trying to fool? I attacked you on the spur of the moment, and now you’re saying that you knew about it in advance and were lying in ambush? What nonsense! You knew nothing in advance.”

PFTT!

At last, overcome by his rage, the middle-aged man couldn’t help but spit out a mouthful of blood.

He simply couldn’t tolerate this young man cuckolding him and, on top of that, humiliating him by refusing to admit any bit of the truth.

But he wouldn’t take it lying down. He just couldn’t understand why he had been betrayed by his beloved Xiaoli. This had all happened way too quickly. Before his death, he just wanted to know the reason behind this entire episode.

“Fellow cultivator, I’m begging you to tell me the truth. I just want to know why Xiaoli had decided to treat me in this way. I have acknowledged my part in all of this, and I only wish to learn the truth so that I may rest in peace.” After his violent outburst of anger, the middle-aged man had now become extremely despondent and distressed.

At this point, Xu Que was also becoming a little dumbfounded. This middle-aged man couldn’t have been mentally damaged after being hit by him, could he?

Admittedly, he appeared quite pitiful. Perhaps he had been hurt in a relationship before and still hadn’t gotten over it. Maybe the heartache from that relationship had caused his inner Demons to appear and made him deranged.

SIGH!

“Forget it. Let me help him with these Demons and do some good at the same time.”

Xu Que had held onto the Asura Mad Demon Finger he had originally planned to use. Looking at the middle-aged man calmly, Xu Que said sincerely, “All right. Seeing as things have come to this, I’ll tell you everything. What do you wish to know?”

Indeed…

The middle-aged man’s heart sank. Filled with sorrow and bitterness, he said hoarsely, “I want to know why Xiaoli is doing this to me…”

While keeping his gaze on the middle-aged man, Xu Que stayed silent for a few moments before he replied in an earnest way, “To be honest, it’s probably because you’re ugly, but that’s okay. It doesn’t matter if a man is old and ugly. Even though you won’t be able to be liked by everyone at first sight like I am, as long as you persevere, conduct yourself virtuously, and possess talent, you’ll soon realize that there still won’t be a woman who’s interested in you.”

As soon as Xu Que had finished speaking, the middle-aged man was completely stunned.

And so was Xu Que.

“Oops, it seems as if I’ve said something wrong. My chicken soup for the soul has accidentally become poisonous soup for the soul.

“But then again, seeing as this middle-aged man is already totally deranged, he probably won’t care about such a tiny detail, right?”

“I…”

All of a sudden, the middle-aged man opened his mouth and said only a single word before a huge fountain of blood spurted out of his mouth.

Following that, his body fell forward stiffly as he collapsed on the ground.

“Screw your mother…” He spat out his last three words half-heartedly, before closing his eyes. The vitality within him died out and, just like that, he breathed his last.

“F*ck!” Xu Que swore at once.

This middle-aged man had died too abruptly, and he had cursed Xu Que before his last breath. How infuriating!

However, Xu Que didn’t have any intention of bearing a grudge against a deceased person. He wasn’t going to go to the extent of whipping a corpse or anything to that effect.

In the World of Cultivators, it was commonplace for someone to fail at killing another person or stealing another’s possessions, just as it was common for someone to be killed by the person they were seeking to destroy. If Xu Que hadn’t known about this incident in advance and had had to fight with this middle-aged man Celestial King without any preparation beforehand, he could very well have died.

As for the final sword summoned by this man, Xu Que knew that there was no way he could’ve survived it. It was only with the help of the few Obliterating Spells that his Great Palm Print of the Netherworld was able to match up to the might of that sword.

Thus, it was most of all thanks to the calamity-foreseeing art of the ten great divine magic arts that Xu Que had received from the System that he was able to experience such a positive outcome.

Finally, Xu Que stepped forward and took the storage ring from the hands of the middle-aged man. Inside, he found a token with the mark of the Heaven Palace Sect engraved on it.

There was no mistaking it. This was the recruitment pass that he needed.

Xu Que took the recruitment pass and turned toward the stone steps nearby. The corners of his mouth turned upward into a smile. At last, he could make it into the Heaven Palace Sect.

But the next instant, his face fell and his eyes got wide.

At the bottom of the steps, where the restrictive spell was still in effect, stood a woman dressed in white. Judging from her stance, she had clearly been there for quite some time, yet he hadn’t detected her presence before in the least little bit.

“About your palm print earlier, where did you learn it?” As their eyes met, the woman dressed in white stayed composed and spoke to him in a calm, quiet voice.

At this moment, Xu Que smiled to himself. He hadn’t expected to meet Xuanyuan Wanrong, a cultivator from thousands of years ago, in such a way and so soon.

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1542 - This Tool Was Here!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1542 - This Tool Was Here!

Xu Que had long imagined what this version of Xuanyuan Wanrong from thousands of years ago would look like. After all, since this version would be from thousands of years ago, he felt fairly certain that she would be a little girl, still innocent, or a bashful young lady.

As for her appearance, Xu Que thought that there wouldn’t be much of a change. After all, the Xuanyuan Wanrong he knew still looked as if she was in her 20s.

Nevertheless, seeing the Xuanyuan Wanrong from thousands of years ago at this instant, Xu Que felt a bit dumbfounded. He had been completely wrong.

This version of Xuanyuan Wanrong as a young person had the same cold demeanor that she had in the present. At first glance, it was clear that she had no regard for the lowly feelings of mortals. She seemed pretty much akin to an icy mountain.

And, on the contrary, it was her looks that were different. She had more of an infantile softness about her. To Xu Que’s surprise, her exquisite face still seemed to have a little baby fat. It wasn’t that she appeared fat, but that she had just an adorable touch of being chubby.

TSK.

Xu Que couldn’t help it. He felt an acute sense of regret.

And that was because the Xuanyuan Wanrong from this period was already a Celestial King cultivator. If she would’ve been a little weaker, he could’ve pinched her cheeks now, or even placed both of his hands on her face and caressed it repeatedly…

Ah, speaking of caressing (pronounced “rou” in Chinese), Xu Que was reminded of Xiao Nuo again.

Xu Que’s thoughts were scattered, so that he didn’t have to pay too much attention to Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Yet, this didn’t affect Xuanyuan Wanrong’s emotions one bit. She remained where she was, as calm as ever, sizing Xu Que up.

She had been here from the very beginning, even before the middle-aged man had arrived.

Initially, when she saw that Xu Que had cast a restriction spell at the bottom of the hill, she had already decided to herself to condemn him.

Seeing that he’d had the audacity to cast a restriction spell and lie in ambush at the foot of the Heaven Palace Sect, he clearly had no respect for the Heaven Palace Sect. Furthermore, she, Xuanyuan Wanrong, had always had zero tolerance for despicable acts like these.

But after the middle-aged man had appeared, Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t step forward to stop Xu Que. She could tell that the middle-aged man had come with an intention to kill, and that his target was Xu Que.

This had led her to an understanding that the two of them, Xu Que and the middle-aged man, weren’t any good. This was a dog-eat-dog show.

Thus Xuanyuan Wanrong had prepared to leave. She definitely had no plans to concern herself with such a pointless matter. Yet, because of Xu Que’s restriction spells, she had been given no choice but to stay.

She was stunned by Xu Que’s capabilities. It was incredible that a cultivator who was only at the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven stage could be this powerful and strike with so much conviction. The palm print that Xu Que had summoned with ease was particularly impressive. Even she had felt pressured by it.

Generally speaking, when it came to celestial magic of this strength, the Heaven Palace Sect, as the greatest powerhouse in the Heaven Continent, should possess it too. Yet, she had never seen a palm print of this might in the multiple years she had spent at the Heaven Palace Sect.

Thus, after the battle had ended, Xuanyuan Wanrong couldn’t help but ask Xu Que where he had learned that palm print technique.

But alas, seeing that the young man didn’t respond, Xuanyuan Wanrong thought that he was unwilling to reveal the answer to her so she didn’t ask him any further questions.

She turned around and spoke to him indifferently, “Before I go, please lift your restriction spell. Oh, and don’t come to the Heaven Palace Sect anymore. We don’t welcome people like you.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t have any intention of getting back at Xu Que with her words. Instead, she said them solely because she couldn’t stand Xu Que’s act of lying in ambush to kill someone and then stealing their recruitment pass.

She also knew full well that in the world of cultivators, no one could be completely clean or upright in accomplishing the many difficult tasks that they encountered every day.

Even if there were many people like Xu Que in the Heaven Palace Sect, or even people who were more morally corrupt, she didn’t care because she hadn’t run into them.

But this time, she had caught Xu Que in the middle of his evil doings, so she had given him a warning to make sure he would give up on attending the recruiting conference of the Heaven Palace Sect.

At first, Xu Que continued to be slightly dazed, but upon hearing Xuanyuan Wanrong’s words, he instantly raised his brows and rolled his eyes. He was speechless.

It turned out that the Xuanyuan Wanrong from thousands of years ago was just as annoying as she was in the present.

HMPH! “Lass, I don’t like what you just said. Do you think I care what you or the Heaven Palace Sect thinks?”

Pointing at the foot of the hill, Xu Que said with rancor, “Even if I, Xu Que, were to starve to death, to die outside from the cold, or to be forced to jump from here, I would never go to your Heaven Palace Sect.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong stopped in her tracks, turned around to look at Xu Que, and said expressionlessly, “If you don’t care about entering the Heaven Palace Sect, why would you lie in ambush here and kill someone to get their recruitment pass?”

“Couldn’t I sell it?” Xu Que replied, glaring at her.

Xuanyuan Wanrong thought about it for a while and nodded. “Sure, you can!”

She felt that it didn’t concern her anymore if Xu Que had only intended to sell the recruiting pass and hadn’t planned to enter the Heaven Palace Sect.

“I hope you’ll practice what you preach. I don’t wish to see you at the Heaven Palace Sect!” As soon as she’d finished speaking, she turned around to leave. Her silhouette faded rapidly as she disappeared.

“Don’t worry about it! You won’t see me for sure. I, Xu Que, have always lived up to my word.” Xu Que yelled toward her vanishing silhouette.

Following that, a wide grin made its way onto Xu Que’s face again.

“If I, Xu Que, don’t go, then surely I can cause the heavens to explode and help Xue Zhiqian to go?

“And if I can’t do that, then surely I can blow up the heavens to help Zhang Wuji to go?

“Hee, hee, hee, how naive! There are so many people I can help by blowing up the heavens!”

Soon, Xu Que got rid of the restriction spell that he had cast on the surroundings and made his way toward the mountain forest nearby.

…..

Before long, an elegant man wearing white robes emerged from the mountain forest.

Dressed in the finest clothes with a jade crown on his head and the good looks to match, he exuded sophistication and elegance from head to toe. If it had not been for the brutish smile on his face, anyone would have believed that this man was a learned and refined scholar.

Nevertheless, it was still Xu Que.

To Xu Que, this matter of changing his identity, appearance, and aura was an easy task that could be accomplished by the use of a Disguise Puppet. There was no need to even use divine arts like the 72 Polymorphic Transformations.

At first, there hadn’t been a need for him to change his identity, but now he no longer had a choice since he had been seen by Xuanyuan Wanrong. Now he had to keep a low profile for a while in order to have a chance at entering the Heaven Palace Sect. After that, he would try to find the right time to gain a ton of Acting Tough Points from the System so that he could break the restrictions set by the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi and successfully leave this memory world.

“Wondrous hope is right in front of me!”

With that, Xu Que’s spirits lifted, and he took huge strides in the direction of the stone steps at the entrance to the Heaven Palace Sect.

However, he had only taken a few strides when from afar came a loud boom, and there was a wave in the magic field that resonated throughout the mountain forest.

HMMM? “Are there people fighting?” Xu Que was taken aback, but, shortly after, he began to rejoice. It appeared that there were many people who were lying in ambush in the vicinity of the Heaven Palace to murder and steal recruitment passes!

A thought came to him, and a majestic aura covered him from head to toe. With a slight wriggling of his ears, he activated the divine hearing art.

With the divine hearing art activated, one could enjoy unfettered, divine hearing anywhere and everywhere. It was up to the one who owned the art whether or not they wanted to listen to all the sounds in the world.

Xu Que focused intently on listening to the tussle from afar. Immediately, he could hear clearly the sounds of a conversation taking place.

“D*mn it! You beasts are despicable, and yet you still dare to call yourselves disciples of the Heaven Palace Sect? Your Holiness despises you!”

HMPH! “Mighty King, you have committed countless evil doings. In the last ten years, you have embezzled numerous objects from the Heaven Palace Sect’s Treasure Cove more than 100 times, stolen more than ten celestial artifacts, and more than 100 celestial arts. Quick, surrender!”

“Nonsense! Your Holiness has never done such lowly things. This is slander! He who has a mind to beat a dog will easily find a stick!”

“How dare you argue? Die!”

…..

At this point, there was another BOOM created by a magic art that sounded again.

Xu Que’s eyes widened. He was appalled.

“Your Holiness? Mighty King?

“D*mn it, wasn’t that Buttface?

“F*ck, just as he’d expected, this tool was also here thousands of years ago!
