chapters.title: Chapter 1545 - Good Brothers
chapters.body:
Chapter 1545 - Good Brothers

In the same forest, on the same mountain, in the other direction, the corners of Xu Que’s mouth ticked up as he listened to Buttface’s voice reverberating in the distance.

“Buttface, you wanna play with me? You’re still not up to scratch…”

“Boy, you’d better come out soon. We were so close in our previous lives. Can you bear to watch Your Holiness being bullied and humiliated by other people?” Buttface’s voice rang out, echoing off the mountain.

Xu Que shook his head and smiled without saying a word. The moment he’d heard it, he’d known that this fool had been trying to lure him to reply so he could lock in on his location and drag him into this mess, and then run away at his first opportunity.

“Ah, Brother Xu, please come out here quickly!

“Lord Brother, don’t tell me you’ve forgotten Buttface?

“Don’t you remember all the days when we fought alongside one another?”

Buttface continued to shout, trying to use Xu Que’s words from before to influence Xu Que.

Xu Que wasn’t moved at all as he listened to Buttface. It even made him want to laugh a little…

PAH!

“Sorry, I couldn’t hold back. I’m already laughing!”

However, he really didn’t intend to watch Buttface being hunted down by Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Originally he had been prepared to use the Celestial Grade Escape Emblem to take Buttface and escape. But in order to guard against Buttface’s tricks, Xu Que had decided to accomplish this in another way.

So, from the beginning, when he’d begun to prepare the setup of the formation, he’d laid out an Illusory Spell in a small area of the forest. Although it couldn’t completely trap Xuanyuan Wanrong and the others, it would still bring no small amount of trouble to her and the Heaven Palace Sect disciples.

It was precisely because of this formation that Buttface had had the time to shout at Xu Que. Otherwise, he would’ve been caught long ago by Xuanyuan Wanrong and the others and probably beaten to death.

Meanwhile, as Buttface ran, he also detected something was fishy. The great danger that Xuanyuan Wanrong and the Heaven Palace Sect disciples presented was getting farther and farther away. He was even beginning to not sense it anymore.

In this case, there were only two possibilities.

Either Xuanyuan Wanrong and the disciples were too powerful and were able to hide their murderous auras to a perfect level. Or else, the distance between the two sides was being pulled farther and farther apart. Perhaps the murderous aura would gradually disappear.

“Huh, an Illusory Spell?”

Buttface couldn’t help but turn his head to take a look. He instantly discovered the fluctuations in the Celestial Core Power that were caused by the spell. He recognized that it was an Illusory Spell.

“Buttface, come here quickly!” Almost simultaneously, Xu Que’s voice sounded out.

Buttface’s eyes brightened as he said, “F*ck, will do, big brother!”

With a SWISH, he sped in Xu Que’s direction.

Not long after, the two of them met again, holding each other’s hands tightly.

“Lord Brother!”

“Buttface!”

Xu Que and Buttface appeared righteous-looking and showed total devotion while they shouted in unison, “Good brothers!”

“You really scared Your Holiness to death just now. I thought Brother Xu had betrayed me, so I said some impulsive words. I hope that you, my brother, aren’t angry.” Buttface explained unashamedly.

“You fool, how could I mind? The situation just now was too dangerous, so I didn’t have time to explain the plan to you. I hope you don’t mind, Brother Buttface.” Xu Que flashed an amazing smile.

“You’ve proved yourself to be Your Holiness’s good brother. Let’s go, we’d better get out of this place right away.”

Buttface finished speaking and took the initiative to lead the way. Apparently he was very familiar with this forest on the mountain.

But a few steps later, he said again, “By the way, Brother Xu, let’s discuss something.”

“What’s the matter?” Xu Que asked.

“In the previous life, you called me Buttface and I called you Lord Brother. You see, you are so much younger than Your Holiness in this life. Why don’t we change what we call each other?”

“How do you want to change it?”

“Your Holiness is older than you by a few thousand years in this world. With our friendship, can we address each other as peers of the same generation and call each other by our own names. How about it?”

“Sure!”

“Good, Brother Xu, you’re frank and straightforward. That settles it then. From now on, you will call Your Holiness the Mighty King and Your Holiness will call you Master Lord!”

“No problem, Mighty King!”

“That’s great, Master Lord!”

Buttface suddenly beamed happily and looked as if he were over the moon. Finally, he no longer had to shout to another person as older brother.

…..

After a while, Xu Que and Buttface finally stepped out of the forest on the mountain. They quickly covered up their presence to avoid being tracked and pursued again by Xuanyuan Wanrong and the others.

After determining that it was safe in the surroundings, Buttface also immediately pulled out a palm-sized Spell Disk from his bosom. He placed it on the ground and started fiddling with it.

“What are you doing?” Xu Que asked with a smile.

“Humph! Your Holiness has always been about an eye for an eye, a tooth for a tooth. Those people from the Heaven Palace Sect have dared to vilify Your Holiness and say that he dallies with women. Now Your Holiness is ready to sneak into their treasure trove to carry out a vicious retaliation.” Buttface spoke with the courage of his convictions.

PFFT!

“It just so happens that I’m also getting ready to go to the Heaven Palace Sect. Shall we work together on this round?” Xu Que said with a laugh.

“Work together? How should we work together?” Buttface became interested.

“As far as I know, they’re having a general assembly to recruit new people today, and I happen to have received a recruitment invitation. I will go and make a mess of the recruitment assembly first to distract their attention. At that time, you will enter the treasure house, and then you can…”

“Do whatever I want!” With a smirk on his face, Buttface finished the sentence

with words that Xu Que hadn’t yet spoken.

“That’s right. But for us to share the spoils from this treasure house, are we going to follow the old rules, or should we set a new rule?” Xu Que asked with a smile.

“Old rules?” Buttface stared blankly.

“The old rules from our previous lives. Ten-90 split: ten for you and 90 for me,” Xu Que replied.

“F*ck!” Buttface jumped up in agitation and said, “Not cool at all. We must make new rules.”

“Then how about 20-80 split? 20 for you and 80 for me?”

“Come on, boy, are you so wicked? Let’s be fair. How about a 50-50 split?”

“50-50?” Xu Que hesitated for a moment and finally nodded.”All right then. After all, this is the first time we are working together in this world. 50-50 split it is then!”

“You’re a good brother!” Buttface was full of smiles again.

“50-50 split? In your dreams! When the times comes, Your Holiness will scrape clean the treasure house and directly slip away.”

…..

Soon, they separated. Buttface fiddled with the teleportation device and got ready to be teleported to the Heaven Palace Sect’s treasure house.

Xu Que continued on his way alone and walked out from the other side of the forest on the mountain. Using the Disguise Puppet again, he transformed into his previous appearance of a beautiful man clad in elegant white clothes. He carried the recruitment ticket and set foot on the stone steps leading to the Heaven Palace Sect’s gate.

With his disguise, Xu Que’s presence and appearance had completely changed.

The Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven who was guarding the main gate didn’t recognize Xu Que, but sensed the presence of the recruitment ticket Xu Que had on him. He didn’t release any powerful pressure to block Xu Que.

Just as Xu Que arrived in front of the main gate, a tall, sturdy man walked out, blocking his way, as he asked, “Fellow cultivator, please stop and identify yourself first.”

Apparently, this tall, sturdy man was the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven who had been guarding the main gate.

Xu Que smiled slightly and politely bowed with his hands cupped in greeting, “I’m Slayer Lord from the Exploding Heavens Faction.”

“Slayer Lord?” The tall, sturdy man frowned. He didn’t think the name was strange, but he felt that the name and the image of this graceful young man in front of him somehow didn’t match.

But he didn’t care much. He reached out with a flourish and took the recruitment ticket from Xu Que. He plucked a jade tile from midair. After he’d engraved the two words, Slayer Lord, on top, he tossed it to Xu Que.

“Go in, go straight and then turn right. Someone will take you to the martial arts hall to report.”

“Thank you, Senior Brother.” Xu Que took the jade tile and cupped his hands in thanks. He continued, “By the way, Senior Brother, when I came up the mountain just now, I inadvertently saw a Kylin named Mighty King fiddling with a teleportation device, saying that he was getting ready to sneak into the Heaven Palace Sect’s treasure house to carry out a theft.”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1546 - Differences In Tao Aura
chapters.body:
Chapter 1546 - Differences In Tao Aura

“What? You say you’ve met the Mighty King?”

The tall, sturdy man heard his words, and his face became instantly alarmed.

“That’s right. At the time when I heard him say that he intended to ransack the Heaven Palace Sect’s treasure house, I rushed up to him, wanting to stop him immediately. But, unfortunately, I was a step too late. He had teleported and left. If I’m not wrong, he is now already in the treasure house.” Xu Que looked full of regret.

“D*mn, why didn’t you say so earlier?” The tall, sturdy man stared at Xu Que, extremely annoyed.

“But you didn’t ask.” Xu Que retorted self-righteously.

“You…” The tall, sturdy man suddenly stopped arguing with Xu Que and said, “Forget about it. It’s still not too late. I’ll report the matter to the Elders. You’d better hurry to the martial arts training field. If I can catch the Mighty King this time, I’ll cite you for meritorious service.”

Having said that, the tall, sturdy man left in a hurry and completely forgot about his job guarding the main gate.

It went without saying that capturing Buttface seemed more important than guarding the main gate.

With the present status of the Heaven Palace Sect, it was irrelevant whether the main gate was guarded or not. In the Heaven Continent of this era, perhaps no one would dare to directly crash the Heaven Palace Sect’s main gate. The reason why the tall, sturdy man was here was probably only to receive and greet the cultivators who were attending the recruitment congregation.

However, the corners of Xu Que’s mouth curled up into a smirk as he watched the tall, sturdy man go.

The wheels in his mind turned, and he summoned the System interface, from which he retrieved a few small objects.

WHOOSH!

The few small objects he’d retrieved suddenly turned into a flowing light and swept around the main gate to merge into the spell formation on the ground. The Mountain’s protective spell at the main gate wobbled a little. The movement was minimal, and absolutely no one noticed.

“Done, I can now have some fun with peace of mind!” Xu Que smiled. He turned around and walked briskly in the direction of the martial arts training field.

He didn’t need anyone else to lead the way for him in this place. He’d been here once tens of thousands of years from now. At that time, this place had been holding a Chosen by Heaven Ceremony, and he’d come here and stolen the Heavenly Stone of Taiyi .

But Xu Que was shocked now as he returned to this slightly familiar place.

When he’d first entered this place previously, even though everything was still sparkling and intact, it had appeared empty and desolate with a pervasive sense of lifeless isolation.

The large Heaven Palace Sect had by now only consisted of a dozen old Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes who he’d released by lifting a seal.

But the Heaven Palace Sect that he was visiting today, which actually was tens of thousands of years ago, was at its peak period. Even Xuanyuan Wanrong had not yet fully grown up, but this Heaven Palace Sect had already controlled and ruled the Heaven Continent by force. They were a single large entity, looking down disdainfully on the whole world.

When Xu Que had first heard of this, he hadn’t believed it. Now that he had personally witnessed it, he was totally stunned.

Just passing through the main gate and stepping in the direction of the martial arts training field, Xu Que had already seen hundreds of Heaven Palace Sect disciples at the Taiyi Genuine Celestial Stage.

“What are those guys doing?

“Come on, it looks like they’re sweeping the floors and wiping the building clean.”

Next to him was a man who was a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven, who was obviously a supervisor. He would expressionlessly berate them from time to time.

“What’s wrong with you. Do you know how to sweep? Do you know how to wipe?

“How can my Heaven Palace Sect produce a group of useless individuals like you? You can’t even kill and behead 100 Demonic Beasts of the same cultivation in ten days. The other several hundreds of disciples who were admitted at the same period as you have at least cut off 150 heads. There are also ten outstanding disciples who have subdued and killed more than 800 Demonic Beasts.

“You should ask yourselves honestly: Do you feel ashamed? Are you worthy of the cultivation the Heaven Palace Sect has given you?

“The Elders have sealed your cultivation and punished you for your own good, so that you can cultivate your state of mind and have the opportunity to comprehend a higher Tao Aura…”

…..

Listening to the words of this man at the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven stage, the 100 Taiyi Genuine Celestial disciples bowed their heads in shame.

When Xu Que passed by them, he also bowed his head and almost cried just listening to it.

“D*mn, was the Heaven Palace Sect so evil tens of thousands of years ago?”

However, as he walked farther, Xu Que saw another 100 disciples at the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven stage who went from controlling magic weapons to transforming into streams of light to fly across the sky in a great hurry.

Behind the group of disciples at the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven stage, there was someone at the Celestial King stage, wearing a black-and-green robe who appeared to be an elite disciple cultivator. He was chasing after them.

“Senior Brother, have mercy, we admit defeat for this assessment,” the 100 Golden Celestials of the Great All-Embracing Heaven shouted as they fled.

“Yes, Senior Brother, we are from the third-class compound. How strong can we be? Can’t you spare some feeling for us?”

The elite Celestial King snorted, “The Elders have orders that the criterion for you people from the third-class compound is ten moves. If you can’t even withstand ten moves from me, you have to continue with the assessment. Those who are hit hard will be demoted into the fourth-class compound.”

“Come on!”

Xu Que looked at the scene and just wanted to vomit blood.

“The criterion was ten moves from a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven? And that was just the criterion of the third-class compound?

“Further up the ranks would be the second-class compound and the first-class compound. Would those Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven disciples not be more powerful?

“Holy sh*t!”

As Xu Que walked along, he increased his knowledge. After all, he really couldn’t see where he would have fit in in this era.

There were so many Taiyi Celestials and Celestials of the Great All-Embracing Heaven, as well as so many elite disciples of the Celestial King stage. The key was that the strength of these people was far more powerful than those cultivators of the same cultivation stage in later generations.

“Even the Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven who had guarded the main gate earlier was so strong, Xu Que had realized that it would have been almost a 30-70 split between them if he hadn’t been able to launch the System’s retaliatory mechanism.

“Of course, he would be 70 and the other guy 30. The odds of winning would still be high. But compared to those Golden Celestials of the Great All-Embracing Heaven who he’d killed easily with one move, the main gate guard had seemed very strong.”

“Fellow cultivator, you’re in the wrong place!” At this time, a voice came from not far away.

Xu Que stared blankly for a moment and looked over to the voice. A slender young man, clad in a blue shirt, was talking to him. “Over there is the assessment area for the Taiyi Celestial Stage. Our Celestial Stage of the Great All-Embracing Heaven assessment area is over here.”

When Xu Que heard this, he realized that he’d indeed gone the wrong way since he’d been in kind of a daze.

He had unwittingly come to the martial arts training field. The ground was also marked with the assessment areas for various cultivation stages. There were three areas. There were respectively: the Taiyi Celestial Stage area, the Celestial Stage of the Great All-Embracing Heaven area, as well as the Celestial King stage area.

In other words, the lowest cultivation stage requirement for this recruitment of new disciples was the Taiyi Celestial Stage.

And the slender young man’s position was in the assessment area of the Celestial Stage of the Great All-Embracing Heaven. At this time, thousands of cultivators had gathered there.

“Thank you, fellow cultivator.” Since the other party had kindly called his attention to it, Xu Que cupped his hands in thanks with a smile.

“No problem, who knows, maybe after today, we may be in the same sect.” The slender young man casually waved his hand, while also sizing up Xu Que. The corners of his mouth ticked up as he asked, “How should I address you, fellow cultivator?”

“Slayer Lord of the Exploding Heavens Faction.” Xu Que maintained his polite and refined image. He cupped his hands in reply, “What do I call your distinguished self?”

“Hey, don’t be so formal. Just call me Ah Qi!” The slender young man said with a smile.

Xu Que originally hadn’t felt that the slender young man was anything special. But when the other party smiled, Xu Que couldn’t help staring blankly for a moment. This smiling expression was inexplicably a little familiar, as if they’d known each other but he couldn’t remember where he’d seen him.

“Cr*p, can this be someone I’ll know tens of thousands of years from now?

“But among the people I know, it doesn’t seem there’s someone with the name Ah Qi.”

“Brother Slayer, the force that you belong to seems a little unusual. The name Exploding Heavens Faction is cheeky to dare to despise the heavenly law. I, Ah Qi, have walked the World of Cultivators for so many years, but I’ve never heard of this name for a force,” Ah Qi said, chuckling.

“It’s only a small faction. It’s normal that Brother Qi wouldn’t know of it.” Xu Que politely responded with a smile. His mind was still trying to recall this guy’s identity.

However, as he turned it over his mind, he couldn’t think of where he’d known this guy at all.

Ah Qi didn’t realize that Xu Que was distracted. He continued warmly, “All right, Slayer brother, don’t just stand here. I’ll take you to that side to report. I’ve just arrived not long ago myself. Wait till I’m done with my assessment. It’ll be your turn after.”

Having said that, he turned around and walked toward the crowd, leading the way for Xu Que.

Xu Que looked ahead and saw a wooden table placed there. An old man at the Celestial Prime stage was sitting there, staring at the central position within the crowd.

After a while, the old man started to speak without any expression and with a tone of indifference, “Three stage for Tao Aura, basic level.”

PFFT!

Xu Que almost laughed out loud. Such a familiar line.

He quickly swept his eyes to the center of the crowd. All he could see was a young man with his head bowed and his fists clenched as he faced other people’s mocking gazes. The young man’s face fully revealed that he was not resigned.

“30 years…” The young man opened his mouth.

Xu Que was taken aback. Could it be…

“Give me another 30 years and I will be able to enter the Heaven Palace Sect.” With that, the young man directly turned around to squeeze his way through the crowd and left in anger.

Only then did Xu Que breathe a sigh of relief. “D*mn, I thought he was going to shout out that popular phrase, do not bully the poor, from the online fiction circle of those days.”

“Alas, the threshold for Tao Aura to enter the Heaven Palace Sect is too high.” At this time, Ah Qi sighed with regret.

When Xu Que heard it, he couldn’t help but snap back to attention.

Yes, the Heaven Palace Sect of this time recruited cultivators who had to be at least of the Taiyi Celestial Stage and above. To be able to cultivate to this stage, the spiritual root aptitude had to be superior. And now, what criteria are they using for the assessment?

Tao Aura?

Are there differences in Tao Aura?

chapters.title: Chapter 1547 - An Old Acquaintance
chapters.body:
Chapter 1547 - An Old Acquaintance

“Oh, by the way, Brother Slayer, have you ever tested your Tao Aura before?” Ah Qi suddenly asked.

Xu Que shook his head as he said, “No, I haven’t tested for this before. To be quite honest, I’ve been cultivating in other parts of the world for many years and have just recently returned here. I came here because of its sterling reputation, and I wanted to participate in the Heaven Palace Sect’s recruitment congregation this year.”

“Okay, I see. Then I’m relieved.” Ah Qi breathed a sigh of relief as if he’d felt a heavy burden had been lifted from his shoulders.

“Hey, what do you mean by that, Brother Qi?” Xu Que raised his eyebrows with a querying look.

“Oh, ha, ha, ha, Brother Slayer, don’t get me wrong,” Ah Qi said, smiling. “I’ve also never had the opportunity to test my own level of Tao Aura. I’m still rather apprehensive participating in the recruitment congregation this time. When I heard you say that you haven’t tested yours, I felt better. It means that I’m not alone. I feel more at ease.”

“No harm done at all,” Xu Que replied. “Brother Qi, is it very difficult to test the Tao Aura? How…is the rating done exactly?”

“Oh, you don’t even know about this?” Ah Qi stared blankly for a moment. He was a little taken aback.

“Brother Qi, have you forgotten? I just mentioned that I’ve been cultivating in many different parts of the world for many years, and I’m kind of the bashful type. When I first came back here, I saw a lot of things that were very hard for me to understand. But I didn’t want to draw too much attention to myself, so I didn’t ask too many questions.” Xu Que gave a slightly despondent sigh and shrugged his shoulders.

Ah Qi chuckled as he said, “Brother Slayer, you’re joking. You don’t seem like a bashful person at all. It’s true you don’t talk too much, but you have an impressive presence. No worries, I will explain it to you.”

Having said that, he immediately launched into an explanation about the Tao Aura’s test conditions and what the distinctions were between the high and low levels. Simply, the object that was used to analyze the Tao Aura was uncommon and rarely seen, so it was extremely valuable.

The object was a meteorite. But because it contained a God’s Strength that couldn’t be used, it was also called a God’s Stone. It’d been discovered that the God’s Strength in the stone simply couldn’t be extracted for any use. However, by chance, it had also been discovered that it could illuminate a cultivator’s Tao Aura. So the Heaven Palace Sect and other forces divided it up to use for that purpose, and thus they had also named it the Tao Test Stone at the same time.

Since the Heaven Palace Sect basically controlled the entire Heaven Continent at this time, their portion of the Tao Test Stone was the largest and so their ranking of the Tao Aura had become the most authoritative. The other forces’ Tao Test Stones were slightly smaller and their test for Tao Aura occasionally produced mistakes. However, there weren’t an enormous amount of mistakes.

Some small leftover materials from the Tao Test Stone had been scattered throughout the World of Cultivators. Some of the people who’d obtained these small bits and pieces had developed them into Tao Aura-testing businesses and charged fees to people who wanted to test their auras. Although the results couldn’t be guaranteed as 100 percent accurate, they could act as references for these people who wanted to prepare for joining the major forces.

If the ranking of one’s Tao Aura was too low, some people would choose to sell their recruitment invitation in exchange for a large amount of Spirit Stones or some other kind of natural treasure, lest they make the trip to the Heaven Palace Sect in vain.

However, the cost of testing one’s Tao Aura was not low. A disbanded cultivator like Ah Qi, who had been lucky enough to get a chance to test his Tao Aura by receiving a recruitment invitation, had no extra Spirit Stones to pay for a test.

Of course, there was another important factor surrounding these tests. Running a test on one’s Tao Aura would inevitably attract people’s attention. It could even lead to disaster.

As a result, many of the disbanded cultivators who had come to participate in the recruitment congregation hadn’t tested the rankings of their Tao Auras before.

As to the high or low ranking of the Tao Aura, in fact, it was decided by how strong the light of the Tao Test Stone was illuminated by each candidate.

When a person put his hand on the Tao Test Stone and released his Tao Aura, the Tao Test Stone would focus and illuminate the force of the Tao Aura, forming rays of light. The colors could be pale or dark and of high or low intensity. The two factors would be added together to produce the ranking of the Tao Aura.

“Brother Qi, how are the intensity of the colors as well as the strength of the radiance added up? What are the particular details involved?” Xu Que asked.

“The intensity of the colors represents the merits and drawbacks of the Tao Aura. Generally, there are three kinds of colors: pale, normal, and dark. Take a look at this person.” When Ah Qi had come to this point, he pointed to a cultivator who was standing before the Tao Test Stone in the middle of the field.

Xu Que turned his head and looked over. There was was a middle-aged man, who had one hand pressed against the Tao Test Stone at this moment. A pale red flow emerged from the surface of the stone, occupying half of the stone.

“Do you see that? The red color means that this person’s Tao Aura favors the Fire System. The color is fairly pale, indicating that this person’s Tao Aura is not considered profound.” Ah Qi shook his head. “Although the radiance has occupied half of the Tao Test Stone, which is the fifth stage of the Tao Aura, his Tao Aura color is too pale, so it will need to be dropped by one stage. As a result, once it is summed up, it will produce a result of the Tao Aura at the fourth stage, which cannot reach the Heaven Palace Sect’s recruitment standards.”

“So that’s how it works.” Only then did Xu Que understand the testing method. He said, nodding his head, “According to this reasoning, the strength of the radiance will be examined for its color, and another stage will automatically be added for a dark color, right?”

“That’s right, Brother Slayer is indeed a clever man!” Ah Qi looked at Xu Que in surprise.

“Brother Qi, you’re too kind.” Xu Que smiled and rolled his eyes to himself. “How is this f*cking clever? Even Buttface could have figured this out.”

But Xu Que thought that this Tao Aura test was quite interesting. He couldn’t help but feel curious about what ranking his own Tao Aura would be. And what color it would be as well…

After all, he had double-cultivated his Five Elements. But for his Tao Aura to exceed five elements, no…it was way more than five elements and had completely broken away from the traditional way of Tao.

“Next, Li Xuanqi!” At this point, a shout rang out from the testing area.

“Well, well, well?

“Li Xuanqi?”

The moment Xu Que heard that name, he couldn’t help but raise his eyebrows and look over.

He saw a handsome, bright young man, full of mettle, walking out of the crowd to step toward the Tao Test Stone.

Xu Que was suddenly very happy. “I’m actually going to be able to see an acquaintance again.”

Tens of thousands of years from now, after the Heaven Palace Sect had faded away, Li Xuanqi had been the founder who had single-handedly established the Heaven Palace Academy. But this man had been a disciple who had been abandoned by the Heaven Palace Sect. He didn’t know what he’d done to have been expelled.

Of course, none of this was important. The important thing was that this guy had been killed by Xu Que’s hands tens of thousands of years from now.

When Xu Que saw this young version of Li Xuanqi, he fell deeply into thought. He completely couldn’t understand that Li Xuanqi had actually come from the same era as Xuanyuan Wanrong.

However, in terms of strength, Xuanyuan Wanrong obviously left Li Xuanqi in the dust.

WHOOSH!

As Li Xuanqi pressed his hand on the Tao Test Stone, a brilliant burst of blue light lit up and occupied 70 percent of the Tao Test Stone.

“Wow, Tao Aura of the Water System, normal color at the seventh stage!” Ah Qi immediately exclaimed.

There was also a big commotion in the testing area. Many people were shocked.

“Tao Aura at the seventh stage is two stages higher than the Heaven Palace Sect’s admissions standard.”

“It looks like this person will most likely be nominated into the second-class compound.”

“So envious.”

Everyone was discussing this incident spiritedly.

But the old man responsible for the assessment of the recruitment remained leaning on the chair with a blank expression. He waved to retrieve Li Xuanqi’s tile and calmly said, “Tao Aura at the seventh stage, go report to the second-class compound.”

As soon as he’d finished speaking, the old man shot out a beam of light and a jade pendant with silver inlay, which was engraved with the word second, landed in the young version of Li Xuanqi’s arms.

“Thank you, Elder!” Li Xuanqi’s face looked triumphant, and he respectfully gave a bow before he lifted his head and puffed out his chest as he marched away.

TSK! TSK! TSK!

Xu Que’s eyes narrowed, and there was a hint of a smile at the corners of his mouth.”Was Li Xuanqi already so proud at such a young age? If I get a chance, I would like to take the time to mess with him in this world of memory.”

“Next!” At this time, a shout rang out from the testing field once again, “Duan Qide!”

“Whaaaat?” Xu Que almost jumped out of his skin when he heard that.

“Duan Qide? Does he f*cking have anything to do with Duan Jiude?”

He immediately stared and swept his gaze all around, muttering to himself about whether it was possible that it could be Duan Jiude appearing under a false name.

But it was wasn’t possible. Duan Jiude was only a few thousand years old and hadn’t been born at this time.

“Here!” Suddenly, Ah Qi raised his hand and shouted. He immediately looked full of excitement and nervously gushed to Xu Que, “Brother Slayer, it’s my turn now. You wait for me. I’ll be back soon!”

With that, he broke into a run and sprinted toward the testing area.

Xu Que was dumbfounded.

“Ah Qi? Duan Qide?

“D*mn, no wonder he always felt that this guy looked a little familiar. As it turned out, he did look like Duan Jiude.

Could he be Duan Jiude’s…grandfather?

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1548 - Ancient Divine Tex
chapters.body:
Chapter 1548 - Ancient Divine Tex

The first time Xu Que had met Ah Qi, he’d already felt as if he looked a little familiar. But he’d never been able to think of who he reminded him of.The first time Xu Que had met Ah Qi, he’d already felt as if he looked a little familiar. But he’d never been able to think of who he reminded him of.

After all, the Duan Jiude that he knew was already a rotten old man, whereas Ah Qi was an honest young man. Even though the facial features of the two men were similar, there was such a gap in age between them that it’d been rather difficult to associate Ah Qi with Duan Jiude at first.

But now, having learned Ah Qi’s full name, Xu Que had immediately arrived at the conclusion that Duan Qide absolutely was some kind of relation to Duan Jiude. Based on the inference in the name, Duan Qide could possibly be Duan Jiude’s grandfather, because there should have been a Duan Bade in between the two.

WHOOSH!

While Xu Que was getting over his astonishment, Duan Qide, in the testing area, had already pressed his hand on the Tao Test Stone.

The whole Tao Test Stone blossomed with a splendid glow. It was a bright red, not deep nor pale. It was normal! But the entire Tao Test Stone was almost completely covered with this red light, at least 80 percent of it.

“Tao Aura with Fire System at the eighth stage!” There was an instant cry from the crowd. Many people were shocked and couldn’t believe it.

This young man with an ordinary appearance actually had a Tao Aura at the eighth stage.

The old man in charge of the Heaven Palace Sect’s assessment also raised his eyes and swept a glance toward Duan Qide as he said indifferently, “Tao Aura at the eighth stage, go report to the second-class compound.”

With that, just as he had done before, he waved his hand and shot out a beam of light, which fell into Duan Qide’s arms.

Duan Qide looked extremely excited. Even he hadn’t anticipated that his Tao Aura ranking would be so high: actually at the eighth stage!

“Ha, ha, ha, eighth stage. My Tao Aura is actually at the eighth stage!” Duan Qide cried out excitedly.

He cheerfully looked over at Xu Que and shouted, “Brother Slayer, my Tao Aura is at the eighth stage. What a big man I am!”

Xu Que politely gave a smile and said, “Very good.”

Duan Jiude’s grandfather had had the same ridiculous urges that Duan Jiude would later have. BAH!

“Next!” There was another cry from the testing area, “Slayer…Slayer Lord?”

The person who read out the name obviously hesitated. “What kind of name was this?”

The surrounding cultivators were also startled. This kind of name was really uncommon. “Could it be a rare ancient family name?”

“Here!”

Xu Que immediately shouted and walked out from the crowd, bursting with life and eager to give the Tao Test Stone a try.

Finally, it’s my, the Act-Tough Saint’s, turn to try.

At long last I, the Act-Tough Saint, can take a look at the level of my Tao Aura, as well as its color.

“Is it multicolored and brilliant, or gorgeous and brightly colored? Or is it magnificent and amazingly luminous, so dazzling that it will blind everyone’s eyes…?”

Full of expectation and excitement, Xu Que stepped into the center of the testing area under everyone’s gazes and stood before the Tao Test Stone.

“Brother Slayer, come on, you absolutely can do it.” Duan Qide gave a cry of encouragement.

“Okay.” The corners of Xu Que’s mouth raised into a smile. It went without saying that he was full of confidence and could absolutely do it. Of course, the Act-Tough Saint’s Tao Aura would be able to do it.

With the infinite ways to achieve the Tao, I only had to cultivate according to my heart’s wishes.

To do as I please, Heaven can’t be without if I want it. If I don’t want it, then Heaven can’t have it.

If the Way of Heaven is lacking, the Way of Tao is changeable, but I only ask for Heaven and Earth to follow my wishes.

Look, so domineering, so cocky, so stylish…

Xu Que’s eyes sparkled and his clothes fluttered in the wind. He raised his hand and pressed his palm on the Tao Test Stone.

BANG!

The whole Tao Test Stone instantly shook.

He’d used great strength.

But…beyond that, the Tao Test Stone had had no response at all.

Everyone present opened their eyes wide and impatiently looked at him.

Duan Qide remained full of anticipation as he watched Xu Que.

One second…

Two seconds…

Three seconds…

“Well?”

Xu Que himself was somewhat taken aback. What’s going on? Why is there no reaction?

“Hurry up, don’t waste everyone’s time!” At this point, the old man glanced over and gave Xu Que a slightly impatient reminder.

“Eh, how do I hurry up?” Xu Que asked, blushing with embarrassment.

“Brother Slayer, quickly release your Tao Aura.” Duan Qide was also finding it difficult to watch and urged him on.

“I am releasing it.” Xu Que looked helpless.

I’ve indeed released my Tao Aura. At first, I was afraid of my Tao Aura being too strong, and I didn’t want to scare people so I didn’t use all my effort.

But since the Tao Test Stone hadn’t responded to his aura, Xu Que had long since completely released it. However, the Tao Test Stone remained silent.

“Hey, have you released your Tao Aura?”

“This can’t be. Even if his Tao Aura is too weak, there’s no reason it can’t be tested.”

“Can it be that this guy is playing tricks?”

“Look at his refined, honest appearance. He doesn’t look like a person who would play tricks.”

“Ah, could it be possible that he used too much strength just now and damaged the Tao Test Stone?”

“F*ck, let’s hope not or he’ll hammered to death by the Heaven Palace Sect.”

The crowd in the testing area was getting restless and talking among themselves.

The old man in charge of the assessments frowned at the moment as he realized that things weren’t so simple.

He believed that Xu Que wasn’t playing any tricks, because he had already felt the boundless power of his Tao Aura.

“But why couldn’t the Tao Test Stone detect it?

“Unless…it had been damaged…”

As he thought about this, the old man couldn’t stay calm and collected. He immediately reached out to Xu Que and said, “You stay where you are and don’t move. Who’s next? Come up for your test.”

“Next, Ming Tiangeng.” The announcer shouted a name.

“Here!” A man immediately raised his hand. He was a handsome young guy. He walked up with big strides and quickly came before the Tao Test Stone. He reached out his hand and pressed.

WHOOSH!

The Tao Test Stone lit up in an instant with a dark blue light that occupied 70 percent of the stone.

A dark-colored Tao Aura!

Everyone was surprised. According to the rules, this would add another stage by default, which was equivalent to his Tao Aura being at the eighth stage.

“Wait, the Tao Test Stone is normal.” Someone suddenly reacted.

The old man stared blankly for a moment. His figure shook and he instantly turned into a shadow that appeared in front of the Tao Test Stone. He didn’t pay any attention to Xu Que. He first took the measure of the Tao Test Stone and didn’t find anything peculiar about it before his gaze fell upon Xu Que.

“Young man, you try again.” He opened his mouth and said at last.

Xu Que nodded and once again reached out his hand to press against the Tao Test Stone, while releasing his Tao Aura.

He was also curious as to why his Tao Aura had gotten no reaction.

This time, however, the Tao Test Stone didn’t react, but stayed calm and showed no activity.

“Oh, this…” The old man was puzzled. This time, he’d clearly felt Xu Que’s Tao Aura rushing into the Tao Test Stone, but the Tao Test Stone had had no reaction at all.

This never should have happened!

Such an obvious strength of a Tao Aura would be at least at the sixth or seventh stage, or even above. Why wasn’t it showing?

The old man frowned and realized that the matter was not so simple.

“Young man, what kind of Tao Aura are you cultivating?” The old man immediately looked at Xu Que and asked.

“Whatever I please.” Xu Que replied.

“What?” The old man stared blankly as if he hadn’t heard clearly.

“Whatever I please.” Xu Que replied again.

“What’s whatever?” The old man was a little taken aback now. “What’s whatever? Whatever he pleases? I must have heard wrong. How can that be considered Tao Aura?”

“Just whatever.” Xu Que said again.

“I’m asking you what’s the whatever you mentioned just now?”

“I’ve said it, just whatever.”

Xu Que stared. At this time, his mind was basically not on the old man but fully concentrated on the Tao Test Stone.

He’d even summoned the System to let the System check what was up with the Tao Test Stone, but he hadn’t received any feedback yet.

“No way, I don’t believe it that my, the Act-Tough Saint’s, Tao Aura can’t be tested. I want to try again.” Xu Que was not going to wait for the System’s check. He reached his hand out and spat on his palm. He rubbed his hands and pressed again on the Tao Test Stone.

WHOOSH!

In an instant, the Tao Test Stone immediately lit up with a light. It finally had a reaction!

Xu Que’s face started to smile, but the smile hadn’t finished before it was frozen again.

The light on the Tao Test Stone was especially small, because it was only a line of luminous text. It was even a very strange text, which Xu Que couldn’t understand.

“Eh, this…this is…” The old man was shocked. He looked at the line of luminous text, and his face took on a look full of horror. He spoke in a trembling voice, “Divine Text, Ancient Divine Text has actually appeared on it.”

He became extremely excited as he said, “This is the text used by ancient Deities. Quickly ask the Dean to come over!”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1563 - Certainly Looking Forward To It
chapters.body:
Chapter 1563 - Certainly Looking Forward To It

In the end, Wang Chi and the others gave their consent to Xu Que’s request to set up the Divine Formation.

However, while letting Xu Que set up the Divine Formation, they surreptitiously removed about 100,000 middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones from the amount they were going to give Xu Que. They’d decided to do this while he was keeping busy with the Divine Formation.

In fact, they were trying to buy some time in order to confirm whether or not the so-called minor tribulation would appear in an hour’s time.

Even if it did appear, they were prepared this time and would try to withstand it with their own strength. If they could withstand it, then they wouldn’t need any so-called Sons of Light.

If they couldn’t, then…well, they would have to bear the pain of suffering such a loss of their Spirit Stones to avoid the calamity of the tribulation.

Xu Que got busy, placing the middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones around the spacious Taoist Sanctum, spreading them out as much as possible.

He spread out the type of spell formation that would gather up all the Celestial Core Power of the middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones.

“Oh, Slayer Lord, why does your spell formation look like a Soul-Gathering Array?” At this point, a nearby Elder, who was good at spell formations, frowned and asked Xu Que this question.

Xu Que calmly spread out his hands and said, “It certainly resembles it, but that doesn’t mean it is a Soul-Gathering Array. The principle is similar, after all. The purpose of this formation is to gather the Qi to search for those Sons of Light.”

“I get it.” The Elder understood what he’d said and felt that Xu Que’s words had made sense.

However, this was in fact really just a Soul-Gathering Array. The only difference was that the Qi Xu Que was going to gather led to the Spiritual Links that were under the ground.

These underground Spiritual Links were attached to the Qi for the Heaven Palace Sect’s Mountain’s Protective Spell Array. But Xu Que had used up to 1,000 spell formations to transform the Mountain’s Protective Spell Array into a death spell.

In other words, Xu Que had linked all of the Celestial Qi of the Soul-Gathering Array up to the death spell. The stronger the Celestial Qi, the more terrifying the power of the death spell would be.

“Elder, please take a look at these 100,000 Celestial Spirit Stones that have been laid out. Where are the others? The Dean and the other Elders said that they were going to bring out the remaining Spirit Stones. Why aren’t they here yet? It’s been such a long time.” Xu Que looked at the Heaven Palace Sect’s Elder who was with him and asked with a frown.

“Don’t worry, there’s no rush. The Dean said that he was going to retrieve the Spirit Stones, so he will naturally do that. Just be patient.” The Elder replied with a smile.

None of the top-ranking members of the Heaven Palace Sect wanted to take out so many Celestial Spirit Stones when they weren’t certain about the reason. But they couldn’t say anything in front of so many disciples because their first aim had to be the safety of the Heaven Palace Sect. So, they could only procrastinate for a while at the moment.

“Well, it’s almost time.” Xu Que’s expression still seemed very urgent, but he was smiling on the inside.

The 100,000 middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones were all concentrated within the group of death spells near the main gate of the Heaven Palace Sect. Once it exploded in a moment’s time, oh my, he didn’t even dare to imagine what would happen then.

A hint of a smile was apparent in Xu Que’s eyes. He certainly knew what those high-ranking people in the Heaven Palace Sect were up to. But it didn’t make any difference to him.

Now he would just wait for enough Celestial Spirit Stones to be here in order to detonate the Mountain’s Protective Spell Array, which had been transformed into a death spell. Then it would destroy the entire Heaven Palace Sect and at the same time shatter the world of memory. Then finally he would be able to smoothly traverse the Relationship Tribulations, and he could return to the Heaven Continent.

It was simple and primitive.

Soon, the hour that Xu Que had predicted to the Heaven Palace Sect as the time for the minor tribulation approached.

Dean Wang Chi and the other Elders hurriedly rushed over with urgent, grave expressions as they were cutting it very close to the tribulation time.

“How’s the setup of the formation coming along? Has the minor tribulation arrived yet?” Wang Chi immediately asked upon arrival.

“Oh, Dean Wang, you all have come in time. The minor tribulation will be here very soon.” The corners of Xu Que’s mouth curled up, and he reached out his hand to point toward the spot next to the main gate.

“The minor tribulation will land there?” Wang Chi was startled.

“Yes, it was the deity’s instructions.” Xu Que nodded.

“How much longer?” Wang Chi looked grim.

Xu Que looked up at the sky and raised his hand and he said, “Now!”

As soon as he spoke, he snapped his fingers with a POP sound.

As if it had been long arranged, with the snap of his fingers, a loud noise instantly came from the courtyard perimeter wall next to the main gate.

BOOM!

This time, the noise was far more earth-shattering than it had been the last time.

The whole perimeter wall, including the edge of the Taoist Sanctum, was instantly torn apart and shrouded in a ball of glowing brilliance.

“Go!” Dean Wang Chi and several of the Elders looked at each other and made their moves at the same time. They moved like lightning and swept toward the area of the explosion in the blink of an eye.

However, before they had time to cast their Magic Arts, a powerful wave of Qi unexpectedly swept several Elders away and blasted them up into the air.

“Oh no, quickly retreat!” Wang Chi’s face changed dramatically. The Suppression Magic Art he had originally prepared directly changed to an Escape Art.

They couldn’t have imagined that the mighty force of what looked like a normal explosion could be so terrifying.

They had only reached the outer periphery of the explosion and had been directly affected by the wave of Qi. The few Elders who had been blasted into the sky had been seriously weakened and were almost at their last gasps.

The many Heaven Palace Sect disciples who were present at this time looked dumbstruck as they watched.

“Are the Dean and the others crazy?”

“Rushing up to throw away their lives in vain?”

This is a tribulation from heaven and earth. Even the deity had issued a decree to teach them how to crack it. How could this be something that they could go up against forcibly?

Not far away, Xuanyuan Wanrong also looked astonished.

She hadn’t expected that Xu Que would have had the ability to instigate such a enormous undertaking. When the first spell exploded, the formidable power was startling enough. But now that first spell didn’t even compare to this formidable power. It was so formidable that even a Celestial Prime would’ve been seriously injured.

“Was it possible that this guy could really destroy the whole Heaven Palace Sect?”

“Dean Wang, Dean Wang, quickly come back here, it’s extremely dangerous.” At this time, Xu Que’s anxious voice could be heard.

Before Wang Chi and the several Elders who’d remained after the tribulation had landed and were able to calm their panicked states, they heard his voice, and blood almost spurted out of their mouths.

“Could you frigging warn us any later?”

“Save Elder Lin and the others,” Wang Chi said in a deep voice after he’d gotten his bearings.

He had evaded danger really fast just now, and he wasn’t hurt. However, he knew that he’d cut a sorry figure by rushing up and then retreating. The key was that all the disciples had seen it, which was damaging to his prestige. This made him extremely unhappy inside.

Xu Que looked very calm. This situation was going a lot better than he’d expected. He’d realized that a small part of the death spell was going to be able to hurt those Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes. But he hadn’t expected it to actually deal a heavy blow to the Elders.

It went without saying that it was to the credit of that 100,000 Celestial Spirit Stones. The explosive force had been extremely strong.

Nevertheless, without those 1,000 death spells exchanged from the System store, it would’ve been useless no matter how many Celestial Spirit Stones there had been. After all, all the costs of those death spells added up to more than 100 million Acting Tough Points.

If it hadn’t been for the System giving him them for free for a limited period of time, where would he ever have gotten hundreds of millions of Acting Tough Points? Of course, even if there had been hundreds of millions of Acting Tough Points, it would have been impossible for Xu Que to use them in exchange for so many death spells.

“Slayer Lord, quickly set up the Divine Formation and find the other Sons of Light.”

At this time, Wang Chi had already come up to Xu Que and thrown out a storage ring while he shouted in a deep voice.

He was in a very unhappy mood, but he had to admit that the formidable power of the minor tribulation had already exceeded the scope of their control as far as their capabilities could stretch.

If there was really the impending approach of a great tribulation, then the Heaven Palace Sect would truly be destroyed.

He couldn’t bear the risk and also could not afford to shoulder the blame. At present, he simply couldn’t find another way to deal with the sudden turn of events.

So he had to trust in Xu Que’s words and take out 10 million Celestial Spirit Stones to set up the Divine Formation.

“Well, rest assured, Dean Wang. I will definitely set up the Divine Formation properly before the arrival of the great tribulation,” Xu Que replied, feeling vigorous as he contemplated the 10 million Celestial Spirit Stones.

He took the storage ring from Wang Chi, and there was a pang of excitement in his heart.

Ah, 10 million middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones. It’s a pity that I can’t take them with me. I really only need a little bit more than 1 million Celestial Spirit Stones in order to make a death spell that will destroy everything.

But just imagine the formidable power of these 10 million Celestial Spirit Stones, all poured into the Trap & Kill Array that has transformed the Mountain’s Protective Spell Array?

Well…I’m certainly looking forward to it!

…..

Ch

chapters.title: Chapter 1564 - You’Re Done For
chapters.body:
Chapter 1564 - You’Re Done For

All the disciples of the Heaven Palace Sect were called together for a meeting.

After all, Xu Que had said that once the Divine Formation had been completely set up, a white light would immediately appear between heaven and earth, which was the vision of the Son of Light shrouded in light. They needed to send people to find the Sons of Light among them straight away.

Dean Wang and the others naturally also obeyed Xu Que’s words and gathered all the disciples to get ready.

However, the entire time Xu Que was setting up, they were looking over his shoulder, inspecting the whole process, under the guise of letting Xu Que set up with peace of mind and not disturbing him. In reality, they were afraid that Xu Que was going to defraud them of their 10 million middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones.

Of course, 10 million middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones were definitely not a small number. Even if they could really resist a great tribulation, they would feel the pain for a very a long time about having to pay the 10 million middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones.

Xu Que was not worried about their looking over his shoulder. He had always planned to use the 10 million middle-grade Celestial Spirit Stones in the Array. He wasn’t planning on stealing them. After all, it was the world of memory, and it was a false existence. Once he departed this world, everything would disappear.

Consequently, since he couldn’t take the 10 million Celestial Spirit Stones with him anyway, he’d decided to let someone else take advantage of the Heaven Palace Sect and do his dirty work.

He would use the Celestial Spirit Stones in this world of memory to urge and stir the spell formations exchanged from the System to destroy the balance of the world of memory. Afterward, he could break out of the world of the memory. The scheme was not brilliant, but simply a cheap trick to get what he wanted to achieve.

While Xu Que was setting up the Celestial Spirit Stones, he was deeply moved and considered himself truly the unrivaled and craftiest schemer of the highest of the heavens, an exceptional genius.

“I’m going to steal your Spirit Stones right in your presence and also borrow the foundation of your Mountain’s Protective Spell Array to complete a major death spell to destroy all of you. Aren’t you going to be enraged?”

Thinking of all this, Xu Que couldn’t help laughing even harder to himself, and he couldn’t help speeding up this process of setting up.

All the Celestial Spirit Stones had been set on the ground in a prescribed order. The formless spell formation gradually took shape.

Many of the Elders who had studied spell formations considerably could see that the spell formation seemed to have as its prototype the Soul Gathering Array. But the Elder who had previously raised this question immediately stepped forward to explain to his colleagues what Xu Que had explained to him. Soon, all the other Elders were exclaiming with their admiration over Xu Que’s work.

At the same time, Buttface and Duan Qide, who were on the top of the mountain watching everything that was going on, had already launched into action.

When they’d learned that this was a world of memory, they’d already planned to risk everything. Before the world of memory disappeared, they wanted to do something big and do whatever they wanted to just this once.

As a result, Buttface had proposed that they go to directly empty out the treasure house of the Heaven Palace Sect, as well as to defecate excessively inside.

Once he’d expressed this idea, he’d quickly become partners with Duan Qide. Thus, at this time, the man and the Kylin had hidden together on the top of a mountain peak. After witnessing Xu Que pull the wool over the eyes of all those people, they began to launch into action.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was still standing at the outer periphery of the Taoist Sanctum with a blank expression on her face. It was almost as if she were an outsider or a bystander, quietly watching everything.

No one went over and bothered her. She also didn’t reveal any abnormal behavior even though the murderous aura had increased sharply in her heart at this moment. She really desired strongly to use a sword to cut down Wang Chi and those Elders who’d surrounded and killed her parents in the incident she’d witnessed in the memory pearl.

But she was well aware that she couldn’t do so at present. Coupled with Xu Que repeatedly stressing that this place was just the world of memory, even if she did take revenge here, she would only vent her fury and not really take revenge.

Therefore, she waited and acted as a bystander for the time being. The only thing she could do was to conceal herself and not be detected by Wang Chi and the others. She didn’t want to give them any warning about what was coming.

However, she didn’t know that whether she’d exposed any clues or not, Wang Chi and the others had secretly had their eyes on her.

They couldn’t be sure whether Xuanyuan Wanrong had found the Mighty King and obtained the memory pearl.

Consequently, they had already made plans even before today to extract Xuanyuan Wanrong’s memory again. If Xu Que hadn’t suddenly come out with his story about a Divine Decree and announced that the Heaven Palace Sect was about to face a great tribulation, perhaps they would already be busy preparing everything at this time to put their hands on Xuanyuan Wanrong.

“These are really troubled times.” Looking at Xu Que setting up the so-called Divine Formation in high spirits, Wang Chi couldn’t help but mutter coldly to himself.

He swept his glance toward a black-robed elder and soundlessly communicated with him without moving his lips.

“Elder Hei, you watch over Xuanyuan Wanrong closely. I have a very bad feeling about her. That group of disciples came with a report that they’d lost track of the Mighty King. I guess this woman is likely to have already obtained the memory pearl and parted ways with the Mighty King.”

The elder in the black robe heard Wang Chi, but his expression didn’t change. He made a slight move as he soundlessly communicated his reply, “Yes.”

Following which, he was silent for a little while and then said again, “Dean, Slayer Lord came back with Xuanyuan Wanrong just now. Could this great tribulation be…?”

He voiced the suspicion in his heart, but they didn’t feel as if the possibility of it was very great.

After all, they had personally witnessed the miracles of Xu Que being able to make a Divine Text appear from the Tao Test Stone and also use a hammer to break the Tao Test Stone. This couldn’t be false.

So, to say that Xu Que was the Divine Son, they could basically believe it for the most part

But Wang Chi had always been an extremely suspicious person. Before he might not have thought about it so much, but now that the Elder in the black robe had mentioned it, as also involving Xuanyuan Wanrong, Wang Chi couldn’t help but to also start to carefully consider this scenario.

The more he thought about it, his suspicious nature just got carried away.

The more he thought about it, the more he felt something fishy was going on.

The more he considered, the more uneasy he became. A feeling, which was causing his chest to feel constricted, became more intense.

“Is it possible that…this is really a plot? But how did they do it?” Wang Chi suspected a lot of things, but really couldn’t explain the two incidents of Xu Que making a Divine Text appear from the Tao Test Stone and also breaking the Tao Test Stone.

“Elder Hei, could you ask Elder Li and the others to translate all the Divine Text according to the previous translation booklet. Whether it is right or wrong, do the translation first.” In the end, Wang Chi soundlessly communicated with the Elder in the black robe to go take care of another matter.

Since the matter of the Tao Test Stone couldn’t be explained, then they would at least take a look at whether there was any translation error in the Divine Text. For the time being, this matter should be confirmed first.

“Okay!” The black-robed Elder nodded and turned to gather several other Elders.

Soon, the several Elders in charge of the translation received their orders. They were startled, but still enthusiastically took out the Divine Text that had been collected earlier.

Placing the translation formula that they’d thought was wrong side by side for comparison, they began the translation.

But unexpectedly, the translation formula, which they had originally thought was wrong, was surprisingly easy to use when they used it to translate the Divine Text. And the translated Divine Text they obtained seemed clear and coherent.

Each Elder had mastered the translation formula and each of them was responsible for a section of the Divine Text, and then they were supposed to put it all together.

As a result, after they had all translated the sections of the Divine Text for which they were responsible, their bodies suddenly shook, and their faces changed sharply.

One Elder looked flushed, and his mood fluctuated dramatically like he had the impulse to vomit blood.

“What…?”

“What’s going on…with the Divine Text?”

Several Elders raised their heads in shock at the same time and looked at each other in horror.

They all took out the translated Divine Text in their hands and looked at each other’s translation of the Divine Text.

Oh, my God, they’re all filled with insults.

“You lowly ant, take your dirty hands away!”

“You’re unworthy.”

“F*ck, you’ve just spat on your hand and you dare touch the Stone?”

“D*mn, you even picked your nose?”

“F*ck, don’t touch me, beat it!”

“You have tarnished me. I’m going to kill you. I won’t give up till you die.”

“You, the ant cursed by the deity, along with the ants not recognized by the World of Tao, how dare you be so disrespectful to the Stone.”

“You’re done for, it’s going to be over for you, you’re an ant cursed by the Fire God. In the future, when the eyes of a certain deity fall upon you, you will definitely be dead.”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1565 - Exposed
chapters.body:
Chapter 1565 - Exposed

Chapter 1565: Exposed

“Wh…what’s this?”

Many of the Elders were dumbfounded as they looked at the jade slips in their hands. The lines of translated Divine Text made their hearts twitch.

“What was this?”

“Wasn’t the translation method wrong?”

“How…how could it have been used so successfully?”

It had swiftly translated the whole Divine Text without any difficulty.

“But why were all of the sentences of this translated text scolding the tyrant?”

“Wasn’t he the Divine Son?”

“Hadn’t he received the Divine Decree?”

“Wasn’t he sent by the deities to teach the Heaven Palace Sect how to pass through the great tribulations?”

“Sh*t, this couldn’t be right!”

Several of the Elders suddenly exploded with anger. Their expressions changed, and they yelled loudly, “Oh no, we’ve been fooled! We’ve been fooled!”

“Thief, stop!”

“Return our Celestial Spirit Stones!”

Some of the Elders roared at Xu Que, and some of them used their Magic Arts.

Soon, everyone in the audience had heard these shouts and they were all stunned. They turned their shocked gazes in the direction of all the noise.

Dean Wang Chi, who had arranged for them to translate the Divine Text, was so brilliant that he had figured out what had happened. At this moment, hearing the shouts of the Elders, he groaned to himself as he realized that his speculations had been correct.

D*mn it, it had been a scam, a huge scam!

“You’re going to die!” Wang Chi’s expression became deadly serious, and his murderous spirit swirled madly, majestic power pouring out of it. It was obvious that he intended to join with those Elders and take down Xu Que.

“Oh, no!” Not far away, Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly frowned. The situation was not looking good.

Originally, according to Xu Que’s plan, he would cheat and obtain the Celestial Spirit Stones and go and change the Mountain’s Protective Spell Array into a death spell.

Earlier, as she’d watched Xu Que trick Wang Chi and the others into running around in circles and had even made them hand over the Celestial Spirit Stones, Xuanyuan Wanrong had almost felt that Xu Que had already succeeded.

But now, in an instant, the tables had turned.

The Elders who’d reacted first had already used their Magic Arts and rushed toward Xu Que, who was still setting up the death spell.

Even if Xuanyuan Wanrong had wanted to help, it was too late. But, after hesitating a little bit, she decided to attack and used a Celestial Art against the Elders.

With her ability, and because everything had happened so fast, she could only help Xu Que by blocking these two Elders.

However, at this moment, Xu Que didn’t respond at all. He seemed to be completely unaware of what was going on around him and simply continued to focus on setting up the spell Array.

The two Elders from the Heaven Palace Sect who’d rushed out in front of the group to attack Xu Que had been blocked by Xuanyuan Wanrong’s Celestial Art and immediately slowed down in order to resist this Celestial Art.

However, the other Elders had started to catch up and immediately started attacking without hindrance.

WHOOSH!

A ray of powerful Sword Qi, with momentum that could split the sky, slashed toward Xu Que.

Another Elder waved his sleeves, forming a golden light in the shape of an inverted bowl, trying to block Xu Que’s retreat.

Suddenly, Xu Que seemed to be trapped in a dead end. There was no way for him to escape or to fight his way out.

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s expression suddenly changed. In a shocked tone, she reminded him, “You are still not running away?”

She had chosen to attack to buy time for Xu Que. “Who would’ve thought that this kid would continue to set the spell Array and miss the best opportunity to escape?”

What was even more worrying was that now the Elders were full on attacking him, and he wasn’t even resisting. He remained squatted on the spot laying down his Celestial Spirit Stones. “What was he doing?”

Even if he’d wanted to give up, he didn’t need to do it so blatantly.

BOOM!

The next moment, both the Golden Light Magic Art and the sky-splitting Sword Qi all came crashing down.

Everyone could see clearly that Xu Que had not managed to escape and was directly overwhelmed by the Magic Arts.

“Something’s wrong! That’s not his real body!” Dean Wang Chi understood what was happening extremely quickly and shouted loudly.

BAM!

He pushed his palm forward with a shining spirit, his diffusing celestial core power condensing in mid-air and quickly transforming into a scroll that resembled an ancient painting.

In the painting, there were mountains and water. At first glance, it was clearly recognizable as a scene of the Heaven Palace Sect. There was also a dark-colored figure, whose facial features were blurred and couldn’t be seen clearly. He was moving quickly in the painting and finally had gotten to a place where he stopped moving.

“He’s in the Treasure Room!”

Wang Chi waved his hands and shouted coldly, “This is an order to everyone from the law enforcement hall. Xuanyuan Wanrong is suspected of colluding with foreign thieves and must be immediately taken down, shut into Taishang Cave, and dealt with later. Everyone else, follow me and head to the Treasure Room to capture the thieves and stop the tyrants.”

After giving this order, Wang Chi didn’t pause. He launched directly into the air, rushing toward the Treasure Room.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was certainly important, but he was very clear that because of Xuanyuan Wanrong’s strength, it was impossible for her to escape from the hands of the Elders from law enforcement hall. It would be easy to take her down.

The more urgent task at this moment was to take down that guy who was operating as a tyrant.

Through cheating and lying, he had swindled his way into the Heaven Palace Sect. These swindlers this year were really bold. It was no small matter that they had already stolen thousands of Celestial Spirit Stones by cheating. However, if this news ever spread around the Heaven Continent, wouldn’t the Heaven Palace Sect become a laughingstock?

The important thing was that he, as the Dean, would bear the brunt of this. After today, how would he still have nerve to walk around in the Heaven Continent in the future?

Therefore, it was necessary to stop this tyrant. No matter how difficult, it was necessary.

However, before leaving, Wang Chi held back a trick or two. He was 80 percent sure that Xuanyuan Wanrong had restored her memory, so he made a hand gesture and sealed Xuanyuan Wanrong’s voice so that she couldn’t speak of the truth of her past. Wang Chi didn’t want to arouse suspicions from any of the other disciples of the Heaven Palace Sect.

“These old guys, every year they plant Spiritual Poison into my cultivation pills. Now, they’ve easily sealed my voice. When Xuanyuan Wanrong realized that she couldn’t speak, she immediately knew why.

After Wang Chi had made that hand gesture, the Spiritual Poison that had been hidden in her body for so many years was activated and made her mute. What was most deadly was that this Spiritual Poison was produced from her own celestial core power, and so she couldn’t expel it by herself.

So Wang Chi could control her life and death with little difficulty.

But…

“When did that guy change his real body into a replica? He did so with so many people watching him, and no one, not even I, noticed it?” Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t bother to resist. She was indeed not a match for the several Elders from the law enforcement hall.

At this moment, she was already thinking about Xu Que’s future plans.

“What other follow-up arrangements did that guy have?”

…..

At the same time, in the Heaven Palace Sect’s Treasure Room, Xu Que was sitting cross-legged on the floor, smiling and staring at the astonished-looking pre-existences of Buttface and Duan Qide.

“Sh*t, you’re so cunning?”

“So which one is your real body? How could I not notice it just now.”

Buttface and Duan Qide asked at the same time.

“At the last moment, my replica was broken up, and now Wang Chi and the others are rushing over here. Which one do you say is the real body?” Xu Que smiled and said.

“Nonsense, you must be the real one!” Buttface rolled his eyes, and, suddenly thinking of something, he panicked and shouted, “Sh*t, so you’ve been exposed? Are they rushing over here now? We’d better slip away.”

“That’s not right.” Duan Qide glared and said in a deep voice, “I suspect that you are also a replica.”

“Hey!”

At that moment, Xu Que smiled and shook his head. “What you saw was only the second level, and you even thought that I was at the first level. In fact, I am on the fifth level!”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1566 - Magical Wisdom
chapters.body:
Chapter 1566 - Magical Wisdom

In the Heaven Palace Sect’s Taoist Sanctum, three law enforcement Elders, leading dozens of elite disciples from the law enforcement hall, had already surrounded Xuanyuan Wanrong.

At this moment, the majority of the people still couldn’t believe that their famous senior would’ve actually betrayed the Heaven Palace Sect by joining outsiders to trick the Heaven Palace Sect.

They really couldn’t figure out why Xuanyuan Wanrong would do this.

This also included the two law enforcement Elders.

Among the three law enforcement elders who Dean Wang Chi had left behind, only Elder Lin, who was dressed in black, had participated in the event that had caused Xuanyuan Qishang to die back in the day when she’d been a little girl. The other two law enforcement Elders knew nothing about what had happened in the past.

If they hadn’t just seen Xuanyuan Wanrong attack them and prevent them from surrounding Xu Que, they wouldn’t have easily believed that Xuanyuan Wanrong would betray her Sect.

“With such talent, why become a thief? Alas!” An unknowing Elder from the law enforcement hall looked at Xuanyuan Wanrong and sighed unhappily.

Xuanyuan Wanrong stood silent and proud, expressionless, not even bothering to explain. She knew very well that even if she’d told them what had happened back in the day, how many of these people would have believed her?

And, even if they did believe her, so what? In the end, hadn’t they just come along to see her die?

What was more was that Xu Que had told her earlier that this was just a world of memory. Everything in it had already happened, and thus, no matter what they did here, it couldn’t change the past.

So explanations didn’t really matter.

“Ha, ha, ha, this is ridiculous. Why become a thief? You don’t even know who is the thief. You’re all just blindly speculating here. And it’s all terribly stupid.” At this time, a laugh could be heard.

“Who’s that?” Several law enforcement Elders’s expressions became puzzled. And the disciples were also surprised.

Looking in the direction of the sound of the laughter, another person had appeared. They had no idea when this had happened, but there he was at the gate of the Heaven Palace Sect, at the place where previously there’d been an explosion. He was a handsome guy, with a touch of roguishness at the corners of his mouth. However, he also had a despicable air about him that made everyone want to beat him up.

“Tyrant!” The crowd immediately shouted his name.

“So it turns out that you are still here. What trick did you use, to actually lead the Dean and the others all the way to the Treasure Room? What was your ulterior motive?” Elder Lin shouted coldly, waving his hands. Several elite disciples from the law enforcement hall immediately went over and surrounded Xu Que.

Not only did Xu Que not run, but he took the initiative to walk closer to them. He said with a smile, “Do I still need to tell you about my ulterior motives?”

After he’d finished, he looked at Xuanyuan Wanrong and asked with a concerned tone, “Rong’er, they didn’t hurt you, right? Don’t be afraid, I’m here!”

“Rong…Rong’er?”

Everyone who was witnessing this incident opened their eyes wide in disbelief.

“This guy actually called Xuanyuan Wanrong Rong’er?”

“Sh*t!”

All the disciples from the Heaven Palace Sect were horrified. “What was the relationship between this guy and their senior?”

“Their senior was famous for not ever being close to anyone. She was notoriously cold and ruthless, but he’d called her Rong’er? He was…really amazing.”

“What are you doing here?” Xuanyuan Wanrong ignored what Xu Que had called her and asked him with a frown.

She was really not sure what Xu Que intended to do. The development of the current situation had already strayed far from the previous plan that Xu Que had told her about.

The important thing was that after the plan had been exposed, Xu Que had obviously had the opportunity to escape, and now for some reason he’d returned. It was difficult for her to understand why.

After all, with Xu Que’s current cultivation strength, returning was equivalent to walking right into trouble.

“Of course I’m here to open the spell Array, don’t you know? If I set the spell Array but didn’t open it, what was the point?” Xu Que walked toward the Taoist Sanctum.

“Open the spell Array? Your spell Array has already been set?” Xuanyuan Wanrong was startled.

“Of course, I’m famously fast!” Xu Que said with a smile.

Everyone was confused. “This guy had come back to open the spell Array. What spell Array?”

Unexpectedly, in the middle of his dialogue with Xuanyuan Wanrong, Xu Que had managed to walk smoothly into the Taoist Sanctum.

“What are you all waiting for, why aren’t you going to get him?” Elder Lin yelled.

A few of the elite disciples had managed to recover, and they simultaneously tried to use their Magic Arts to attack Xu Que.

“Hee, hee, hee, you guys are useless.” Xu Que smiled, and his figure flickered around as if he could predict the direction from which the people would attack, avoiding them by one step in advance, and then reappearing behind them.

“How is this possible?” Several elite disciples exclaimed.

In terms of cultivation stages, theirs were not any lower than Xu Que’s. They were all Golden Celestials of the Great All-Embracing Heaven. And in terms of combat skills, they also felt that they could overcome Xu Que.

However, Xu Que had managed to stay one step ahead and avoid all of their attacks, as if he somehow knew everything in advance, which made several people feel completely puzzled.

“Ha, ha, ha, do you guys know what the calamity-foreseeing art is? I can predict the future, what can you do to me?” Xu Que smiled smugly and, without pausing, immediately went to the center of the Taoist Sanctum.

“Spell Array, open!”

BOOM!

He tapped his toes lightly on the ground and the ground started to open up, making a loud noise.

After which, the lines on the ground started to flicker with golden light, with the Taoist Sanctum at the center, and spread frantically in all directions.

“Oh, no, this… our Mountain’s Protective Spell Array has been altered!” An Elder suddenly exclaimed.

“Stop him!” Elder Lin shouted, and at the same time his figure flickered as he headed toward Xu Que.

Xuanyuan Wanrong had been already prepared for this and immediately attacked, trying to stop the law enforcement Elders.

However, Xu Que was one step faster than she was, as if he had already anticipated their actions. But he had no intention of dodging them. Instead, he raised his hand and made a hand gesture, his lips moving slightly.

“The Clouds and Pouring Rain!”

An ethereal sound that seemed as if it came from outside the heavens escaped from Xu Que’s mouth.

Following which, the color of the sky changed dramatically.

The sky, which was supposed to be bright at this time, instantly became covered with dark clouds that weighed down darkly on the atmosphere.

Heavy rain started to fall from the sky.

Suddenly, the entire area was covered with raindrops, and all the law enforcement Elders and surrounding disciples from the Heaven Palace Sect were immediately frozen in place and couldn’t move.

“This…no, this is impossible, how can the laws of heaven and earth have been changed like this?” Elder Lin asked in horror.

“Ha, ha, ha, now this area is under my rule.” Xu Que laughed loudly.

Then, with a PFFT sound, he spurted out a mouthful of blood.

“Sh*t, this magical wisdom… Even if this is the System’s biggest function, which provides celestial core power, it is still rather unsustainable.” Xu Que looked bitter and delayed no longer. He quickly created a few strands of celestial core power and activated all the spell cores under his feet.

This magical wisdom was also one of the ten Great Arts of Compelling Divine Power. Its full name was the “All-Encompassing Magical Wisdom Divine Art”. With its wisdom and knowledge, one could have an unobstructed path to enlightenment and be able to summon the clouds and rain.

It was a pity that with his current cultivation stage, in addition to the System’s most powerful function giving him celestial core power, it was only enough to reach one-tenth of the power of a Divine Magic Art and could only freeze people.

However, this was already not easy. After all, those three law enforcement Elders were all Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was stunned by the scene before her. She stood rooted to the spot, her mouth slightly open and her eyes full of horror.
