She could never have imagined that a mere Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven such as Xu Que could easily freeze all the law enforcement Elders who were Celestial Kings and Celestial Primes, as well as all of the disciples of the Heaven Palace Sect.

Of course, if he hadn’t vomited blood, that would’ve been perfect.

“This guy…” Xuanyuan Wanrong couldn’t help but look at Xu Que in a new light.

This guy was almost qualified to be her man!

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1567
chapters.body:
Chapter 1567

Chapter 1567

?C.1567

“Boom -!”

Earth shaking explosions hit everywhere.

After all, the three law enforcement elders could not stop Xu Ke. Fazhitong changed the law of heaven and earth and imprisoned the three law enforcement elders unconditionally.

Although it can only last three seconds with its weak strength, three seconds is actually very long, enough to do a lot of things.

For example, the array eye was successfully activated and the mountain protection array of the whole Tiangong courtyard was detonated.

The terrible explosion sound swept up in an instant.

From the back mountain to the Shanmen Taoist temple, from mid air to the ground, an energy of destroying the sky and the earth filled the whole audience.

“No…” an elder sent out a trembling roar, and a magnificent energy burst under his feet and swallowed it in an instant.

The magnificent immortal state has gone up in smoke here.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was also stunned in situ. It was incredible that Xu que had created such a terrible array.

“Go!”

Xu’s voice sounded in her ear.

Immediately after, Xuanyuan Wanrong felt warm at his waist and was picked up. Then the scene of explosion in front of him suddenly blurred. All the scenes were distorted, his eyes were dark, and a strong sense of involvement hit his whole body.

In a flash, everything returned to normal.

Xuanyuan Wanrong opened her eyes again and appeared at the foot of the mountain in the Tiangong courtyard. Although there was an explosion in her ear, it was obviously far away.

Xu Xu is standing in front of her and looking at her with a smile.

That’s a smiley face!

Xuanyuan Wanrong couldn’t help turning her eyes. She didn’t know why. She always wanted to fight Xu Duan.

But now she knows very well that even if she is a fairyland, even if Xu Ke is just a great Luojin fairyland, she will never be the opponent of this guy.

After all, she had never heard that a great Luojin Wonderland could change the laws of heaven and earth.

“Well, I helped you out. Do you feel like you’re beginning to like me?” At this time, Xu que opened his mouth and said with a smile.

That cheap tone made Xuanyuan Wanrong clench her fist again.

“In fact, it doesn’t matter whether you like it or not. Now the Tiangong courtyard has been blown up by me, and the world rules have been broken. It’s time for our love robbery to end.” Xu Que’s face was full of joy.

This damn love robbery, damn Taiyi Tianshi, is finally coming to an end.

However, the system did not give any response.

Xu Xu is used to it.

But gradually, he began to find that it was not normal.

Looking up into the sky, the Tiangong courtyard on the mountain has already been ablaze at this time, and is melting in the explosion at a speed visible to the naked eye. Looking from a distance, it is like playing Xiaole, and the top of the mountain is disappearing little by little.

But this time it seems different from last time. The world has not been distorted and there are no signs of collapse.

“What’s going on? The heavenly palace has been destroyed, and the memory world has not collapsed yet? ” Xu que looked stunned.

The destructive power of this time is far more than that of the last love robbery. How could this happen?

Is it difficult for Taiyi Tianshi to repair this bug?

“No, the memory world did not collapse because the destructive power I caused was not enough to affect the normal development of the world. The celestial world is so big that it is far from comparable to the earth. ”

Xu que seems to have found the reason, and his eyes also fall on Xuanyuan Wanrong.

At this time, he remembered that the destruction of the heavenly palace seemed to have little influence.

Because… In the original world, Tiangong courtyard once perished overnight. It is likely that Xuanyuan Wanrong did it.

What he is doing now is nothing more than destroying the Tiangong courtyard with more destructive power. In terms of the results, he is only advancing the destruction of the Tiangong courtyard.

“This… Wasted a long time!”

Xu Xu was ready to cry without tears.

But fortunately, the array used to destroy the heavenly palace courtyard cost hundreds of millions of installation value, all of which are free within the system time limit, otherwise they will really cry.

“When the robbery is over, how do we leave?”

At this time, Xuanyuan Wanrong looked at Xu Que and asked.

“Er…” Xu Que’s expression stiffened, showing an embarrassed but polite smile: “this… A little accident. Maybe we have to destroy several sect forces.”

“What do you mean?” Xuanyuan Wanrong immediately frowned and showed suspicious eyes.

This guy is not really a liar, is he?

Cheat me to destroy the heavenly palace courtyard together, and now you want to harm other sects?

It’s just that the Tiangong courtyard has a deep blood feud with itself. Other sects have no grievances with themselves!

“Here’s the thing. It involves a lot of knowledge. First of all, we have to start from our real world. Over there…” Xu lacked a big head and opened his mouth to explain.

But in the middle of it, it suddenly stopped. At this moment, his knowledge robbery suddenly started, and a picture flashed in his mind Lying trough. ” Xu que shouted, immediately grabbed Xuanyuan Wanrong, and once again used xianpin Shenxing to escape. The two men disappeared in situ. The next second, when they were standing, a thunder burst out of thin air, and the whole space was distorted Xuanyuan, Wanrong, XuKe, you can’t escape. ” A roar came from the air. It was Wang Chi, the president of the heavenly palace, who had learned Xu Ke’s real name. The so-called “mieba” was just a pseudonym. But at the moment, Wang Chi’s clothes were broken, his face had many gray stains, and his mouth was overflowing with blood. He looked very embarrassed. But in fact, he was not seriously traumatized. Coupled with his great anger, his combat effectiveness was simply bursting. Xu que hurriedly grabbed Xuanyuan Wanrong and ran away, but the immortal product Shenxing escape talisman only sent them out for a distance and did not completely run out of the area of the heavenly palace This old man can carry it. He’s still alive! ” Xu Xu heard Wang Chi’s roar and couldn’t help frowning. “Did I think too much just now? Maybe it’s because he didn’t die that the world didn’t collapse?” Xu Ke, take your life! ” At this time, Wang Chi’s roar came again. Obviously, it has been found that Xu que, a huge palm, condenses in mid air and falls directly at Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong Hey, you can’t catch me. ” Xu kujian smiled and grabbed Xuanyuan Wanrong. It was another fairy rune. Anyway, the system is produced. At this stage, it is free in the memory world. Wang Chi stood among the ruins of the Tiangong courtyard and watched Xu Kuang escape his attacks one after another. It seemed that he had expected, had not predicted, and the key was the talisman of tearing the void away. He knew very well that he really had no way to take Xu Kuang. Unless this guy runs out of runes. But seeing Xu Ke’s confident appearance, Wang Chi knew very well that this guy must have other means Four venerable ones, are you going to stand idly by? ” Wang Chi’s divine spirit rushed out and shouted at the four statues that were still intact under the ruins: “the Tiangong courtyard was destroyed like this. This son has many means and is extremely cunning. Now only the shadow team can take it. If you don’t hand over the tiger amulet, I’m afraid all your plans will be wasted, and even you will fall here.” Under the ruins, the four statues were silent a little, and finally gave a sigh That’s all! ” We said, “the tiger talisman can’t be handed over to you, and you can’t control the shadow team.” But the destruction of the heavenly palace has even involved our safety. ” We’ll help you! ” Four voices fell, a ruin in the Tiangong courtyard suddenly shook, and the ground suddenly burst. Bang! With a loud noise, four statues were swept out of the ground and suspended in mid air. Wisps of divine light fell from the sky, and the statue actually bloomed a bright golden awn No! ” At the same time, Xu que, who has knowledge of robbery, has sensed everything and his face suddenly sank. He immediately grabbed a large number of immortal runes with one hand, read them and called out the system System, come on, calculate for me. What’s the way to avoid these four statues? Give me another plan to kill the old man Wang Chi. Maybe we can leave safely immediately. ” The system finally reacted this time. The interface flashed and a window popped up. Xu was stunned when he saw it What… Is this? Alchemy or device? ” Long lost update, cough! As we all know, there are a lot of passages in the early stage of our book. Now they are defined as vulgar and various cuts and rectifications. As a result, many parts of the previous text are different, completely lost their humor and significance, and I am exhausted. However, there are still a lot of readers who have read the original text. I also promised you that they will finish it. After all, a generation forces Wang Xu to be short. How can we give him a decent ending? I don’t want eunuchs or bad endings, so I may need to spend more time writing it. Tiktok, and starting the new book, will be released at the starting point. I will send a new official account in the live broadcast of the sound. I will look forward to it.

chapters.title: Chapter 1568
chapters.body:
Chapter 1568

Chapter 1568

C.1568

At this time, a function bar that has never been seen is displayed on the system interface, which is very much like the alchemy interface in some online games.

There is a large circle space in the middle, surrounded by dense small grids, all connected to the space in the middle with a straight line. Finally, at the bottom, there is an option of “fusion”.

Xu lacked some reactions at once.

At this critical juncture, the system opens up such a new function?

Alchemy or device?

It’s useless. What pill or weapon can instantly improve so much combat power?

Even if there is, the cliff sequelae has huge side effects!

“Ding, it is detected that the host is in a high crisis situation. Given that the system is currently in the free mode, one of the ultimate functions of the limited time open system – ‘all laws in one’, please use this function reasonably.”

“I. The system makes a shot for the host, solves all the problems at present, and exhausts all the force values accumulated by the host without other side effects.”

“Second, after the host solves the crisis by itself and breaks the memory world, a mysterious gift bag will be rewarded.”

Several system prompt sounds sounded in Xu Ke’s mind.

Xu Ke was relieved. His mouth was slightly open and his heart was shocked.

Although the four statues appeared, he also felt dangerous, and the problem was a little big.

But I never expected that the response of the system was so large, which seemed to be the first time in history.

In the past, he has also experienced many near death situations, but the system has never promised rewards in advance, let alone given him the opportunity to make options in advance. Everything depends on him to use the system functions to tide over the difficulties.

But now, the system first opens new functions, and the opening is the ultimate function.

Although it is only temporarily opened, this is the ultimate function. It may be the function that can be opened only after the system is upgraded to the final version.

Listen to that name. People call it “the unity of all dharmas”. As the name suggests, it is used to unconditionally and forcibly integrate the terrorist function of all Dharma formulas.

Don’t worry, the system has two options.

One is to let the system sell and deduct all installed force values.

One is that Xu Ke can get a mysterious gift bag after solving it himself.

What does that mean?

It means that in the calculation of the system, even if Xu que can try all the functions and commodities in the system Mall for free, even if Xu que can temporarily use this ultimate function “the unity of all methods”, it is very likely to fail to get the four statues and even die here.

“No? How strong are these four things? ”

Xu que straightened out the meaning and looked at the four stone carvings again. He was shocked.

For a moment, he knew that Jietong was beating and his eyebrows were suddenly tingling.

“Shit!”

Xu Que’s face changed dramatically, roared, forced his body to twist in the air, and blinked out for several kilometers.

As soon as the man’s front foot left, the remnant of his back foot left in place was torn up in an instant, and even the void he was just in was annihilated in an instant.

“What happened?”

Missing eyelids beating, unbelievable.

I couldn’t see the four stone carvings at all, and there was no warning. If there was no knowledge of robbery and communication to predict all this, he would have been cold just now.

Nima, I’m short of a generation of saints. I’ve been wandering in the immortal world for so many years. Today, I was almost killed in this broken memory world?

It’s unbearable!

“Boom!”

In the cloud air, with a loud bang, Xu’s figure turned into streamer and rushed to the distance, but he suddenly turned around and turned back in front. At almost the same time, at the moment of his turn back, there was a void in place that suddenly collapsed, followed by annihilation and turned into a mass of nothingness.

Xu Ke, meanwhile, ran back and forth crazily in the air, taking his place with flexible snakeskin and constantly avoiding.

Xuanyuan Wanrong is below, already stunned.

She didn’t know where the four stone carvings came from. It was obviously bad that the situation suddenly fell into this situation.

“This guy, is it ok…”

Xuanyuan Wanrong couldn’t help sighing when she looked at Xu Duan’s embarrassed figure.

She guessed that this situation has exceeded Xu’s original plan.

The four stone carvings are so strong that they make no sense. They are so strong that people don’t know how strong each other is.

What kind of existence is that?

Immortal Emperor?

Or gods?

Xuanyuan Wanrong shook her head silently. She was helpless and powerless. In this situation, she was powerless.

At the same time, Xu Ke, who is walking, still keeps communicating with the system.

He has been frantically exchanging the formulas in the system mall. No matter what is expensive or cheap, they are now limited and free. After leaving the memory world, they will all disappear, but if they can be used to solve the current crisis, they must be exchanged.

In Xu Ke’s opinion, there is only one of the two options given by the system. Of course, it is for reward.

Since the robbery period, he has hardly received a systematic gift package.

Today, the mysterious gift package given by the system is absolutely not bad.

This is a reward. How can you not take the reward you can really have after leaving the memory world?

As for the danger?

Bullshit!

Ben forced saint to come all the way. I haven’t seen any danger. That’s it?

Xu que sneered.

“Pa!”

The next moment, his palm suddenly burst into a blood mist, and the whole left palm disappeared.

After all, I was slow and got caught.

“Well, no one can hurt me for a long time. You wait for labor and capital.” Xu que is gnashing his teeth. His anger is burning in his heart, but he still continues to run wildly in the air to avoid the invisible killing moves of the four stone carvings.

There is already a large area of white light in the system interface.

Various Dharma formulas in the mall were exchanged one after another, and then poured into Xu Que’s mind and mastered by him.

The so-called “unity of all dharmas” certainly needs 10000 Dharma formulas to work.

“Fast, fast, plus my own Dharma formula, there are more than 9000 kinds. What… The lowest eighteen dragon subduing palms are also Dharma formulas? Then exchange it, too. Gather up the number. ”

“Ding, the ultimate function of ‘the unity of all dharmas’ is just its name. It doesn’t need 10000 Dharma formulas to integrate.” The system can’t seem to see any more and gives a prompt.

Xu que was stunned when he heard the speech, and then said, “you don’t understand. The unity of ten thousand dharmas is to have ten thousand Dharma formulas. No one knows the unity of ten thousand dharmas better than me. Continue to change.”

Xu’s lack of mind and spirit communication system speeds up the body movement speed at the same time.

Among the tips just exchanged, there are several tips that can increase speed. They are very practical, and it seems that 10000 tips will be collected. How can we give up halfway.

Of course, the more than 9000 Dharma formulas used to deal with the four stone carvings will be useless at all. We can only wait for the integration to see the results.

After all, it’s so difficult to avoid each other’s killing moves now. Let alone close attack, there’s no chance of counterattack at all.

“Xu Ke, you’re finished.”

Not far away, Wang Chi looked on coldly and spoke sarcastically.

He didn’t even bother to take care of Xuanyuan Wanrong. He just felt happy when he saw Xu que being chased and killed by the four stone carvings.

“Hehe, play with your sister.”

Xu que sneered, his eyes turned, and the figure in the air suddenly changed direction and rushed straight to Wang Chi.

Wang Chi didn’t react at first. He was stunned. At this juncture, do you dare to come to this seat for trouble?

But the next second, Wang Chi’s face changed dramatically.

The killing moves of the four stone carvings are indistinguishable.

Once Xu Kuan gets close to him and the killing move is displayed near him, no matter how strong his ruler is, he has to run, otherwise it will be a dead word.

“Fuck off.”

Wang Chi was so angry that he immediately turned around and ran away.

Xu que is in hot pursuit. Even in order to avoid the stone carving’s killing move, he will change his position, but the next second he rushes to Wang Chi from an unexpected position.

“Damn it!”

Wang Chi immediately felt his head big and scolded: “young people don’t talk about martial ethics.”

“Hey, hey!”

Xu lacked a cheap smile.

Not laughing at Wang Chi’s embarrassment, nor laughing at young people who don’t talk about martial ethics, but those 10000 Dharma formulas have been collected.

Ten thousand Dharma formulas are scattered in the dense small grids of the system interface.

From the beginning of the Dragon nine changes, thunder three thousand, Buddha anger lotus and nine mysteries.

Then came the eight or nine Xuangong, fire eye golden pupil, and forced King boxing that were inherited from the foot of the five elements mountain, including various Dharma formulas that the system now stipulates can only be used free in the memory world, as well as the ten magical powers, all of which are listed in small squares.

“Next, it’s time to witness miracles.”

Xu Xu felt a little excited.

This is one of the ultimate functions of the system. It is absolutely extraordinary.

He was also curious that most of these 10000 Dharma formulas were irrelevant and harmonious. Even some of them belonged to magic, and there would be conflicts. What could the system integrate?

“System, start the unity of all laws and give me integration.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1569
chapters.body:
Chapter 1569

Chapter 1569

C.1569

“Ding, the unity of ten thousand methods has been started.”

“Ding, it is detected that the host has more than 10000 skill methods and the fusion time is long. It is recommended that the host start acceleration. It is estimated that 50 million force value is required.”

“It is detected that the host currently has limited time free benefits, and the system will automatically start acceleration.”

“Ding, there is an error in fusion, and 3850 skill attributes have irreversible conflicts. It is recommended that the host start strong fusion, which is expected to require a billion force values.”

“Ding, there is a huge error in fusion. The fusion of 560 skill methods will lead to the sudden death of the host. It is recommended that the host purchase the avenue rule to supplement it. It is estimated that it will need 10 billion forced value.”

“It is detected that the host currently has limited time free benefits, which has automatically started strong integration and supplemented the rules.”

“Gudong!”

Xu que, who was running away, listened to the system prompt sound constantly ringing in his mind and swallowed hard.

Crazy, crazy

He’s a little scared. No, not a little. He’s really scared.

How can you burn money like this?

Start an acceleration, why do you need 50 million installed force value?

The problem is that the cost of various functions required in the follow-up is obviously more terrible!

Strong integration, billion?

Avenue rules, 10 billion?

Nima, this is going against the sky!

Xu Xu is unbelievable. If he didn’t have a limited time and free, he probably would never know that the system could burn money to this extent.

It may not be difficult to accumulate tens of millions of installed force values at the speed of obtaining their installed force values.

But one billion, ten billion, that is estimated to have accumulated for thousands of years, and it has to be forced all the time.

This is terrible.

“All of a sudden, I’m looking forward to it. What will it be…”

Xu que was a little excited.

He continued to flee and avoided the invisible killing moves of the four stone carvings again.

But the next second, the power in the body suddenly stagnated, which seemed to be hollowed out. Zou Ran Ran Ran slowed down a lot, and the whole person stopped in place.

“Sleeping trough, what’s the situation?”

Xu Duan was surprised and reacted very quickly. He quickly pinched out the escape talisman of xianpin Shenxing and disappeared in situ.

At the same time, the system prompt sound came late.

“Ding, due to the insufficient level of the current version of the system, it needs to provide more energy to start Wanfa oneness. It is temporarily unable to provide the host to start the system retaliation mechanism. It is expected to recover in ten minutes.”

“Shit, ten minutes? You let me run for ten minutes on my own strength? ”

Xu Xu’s mind will explode after hearing it.

He used zhijietong, and the system automatically supplemented the immortal yuan power and soul power. He also had to have a system automatic Retaliation Mechanism to escape from the invisible killing moves of the four stone carvings.

Even so, he was blown to pieces in his flight and has barely recovered until now.

But now, the system is unable to provide automatic retaliation mechanism, which is equivalent to taking half of his strength bonus. What’s the difference between this and death?

“I know. Since the unity of ten thousand methods is so powerful, how can I judge that I will probably lose? It turned out that I was waiting here. The system predicted that I could not live for ten minutes before the completion of the unity of ten thousand methods. ”

Xu Xu realized at this time.

He used the immortal product divine line to escape the rune, which has teleported thousands of miles away.

However, at this distance, he has not escaped from the killing range of the four stone carvings at all. However, he can only continue to sacrifice a large number of escape runes and move continuously.

“Boom!”

The next moment, the palm of Xu Ke’s newly recovered hand was blown into blood mist again.

“No, the start of the escape sign is too slow. Relying on this thing, I will die in three minutes.” Xu Ke frowned and looked very ugly.

How long, how long haven’t you realized the tension and stimulation of this narrow life.

But there seems to be no way.

Or stop the unity of all laws and continue to delay and flee.

Or just

“Old Qilin, Duan Qide, are you still watching the play? Come and help! ”

Xu’s eyes turned and shouted.

After all, the two, one is er Gouzi’s previous life and the other is Duan Jiude’s grandfather.

After tens of thousands of years, the ancestor of Kirin is still famous and has been mentioned by countless people. He must have many means.

However, with his cry, he did not get any response.

The autumn wind sweeps away the fallen leaves. It seems that old Qilin and Duan Qide have never been here, and they haven’t even sent out a breath.

Instead, Xuanyuan Wanrong asked, “how can I help you?”

“Just stay away!” Xu Ke responds directly.

At this time, let alone the weakened version of Xuanyuan Wanrong now, even if Xuanyuan Wanrong comes tens of thousands of years later, it must be cool here.

Being able to hide away is really the greatest help to Xu Duan. At least you don’t have to devote yourself to taking care of her safety.

“It’s hard, er Gouzi. Your previous life is more dog than you!” Looking around, I sighed helplessly.

Old Qilin and Duan Qide are too dogs. They hide too deep. Even he can’t find the trace of the two goods.

“Old Qilin, Duan Qide, help me resist for a moment. I can turn over against the wind. If you two help me, I will teach you the supreme secret. ” Xu que had no choice but to continue to pinch the Shenxing rune, shouting and trying to lead the two goods out.

“Old Qilin, I have a way to make you integrate the ninth generation and surpass the blood of the ancient magic dragon.”

“Duan Qide, I have a treasure that can help you become an Immortal Emperor and feel the rhyme of the avenue.”

“Old Qilin, I have another magic weapon that can help you keep the memory of the ninth generation.”

“Duan Qide, I……”

Xu que made all kinds of benefits while fleeing.

Old Qilin and Duan Qide are still silent. They seem to have left long ago. They are not here at all.

However, Xu Xu believes that the two goods are definitely hiding nearby and watching.

“Old Qilin, if you don’t come out again, if I leave here alive and return to the real world, I will break your legs and pull you to make soup.”

“Duan Qide, if you don’t help, I will revenge your son Duan Jiude.”

“You two vegetable chickens, think clearly. This is a memory world. All false beings, including you, come out to sacrifice for me and benefit future generations. It’s all about making money without losing money!”

Helpless, Xu que began to talk hard.

Otherwise, with the character of those two goods, it is estimated that they will not come out.

“Alas!”

Sure enough, with a sigh, a voice came.

“Boy, are you so wicked? You also said that everything in the memory world is false, and you want to take revenge on the real world? ”

Duan Qide’s tone was full of helplessness.

But this is just sound transmission, there is still no exposed position, and even the breath converges very clean.

Obviously, this guy’s means are unfathomable.

“You don’t understand. If I die, it will be difficult for your descendants and the descendants of old Qilin to live. The real world is not safe now. I can change everything unless I can go out.” Xu Wei is busy responding.

At this time, he didn’t want to joke. What he said is true. Previously, when his memory world was broken, he saw the picture of Tianzhou. There was indeed chaos. Even Er Gouzi, Duan Jiude and others rushed out to fight in disorder. The situation is not optimistic.

“Fart, you boy, don’t want to pit Ben shenzun. Ben shenzun doesn’t want to die even if he remembers the world. If, as you said, the real world is in danger, you can’t change anything with your strength. You might as well die here. ” At this time, the voice of old Qilin sounded.

Xu Wei shook his head and said, “I said, protect me for a moment. I’m deducing a Dharma formula that can reverse everything.”

“Deduction formula?” Qilin’s father was happy and laughed: “sure enough, this boy is biting us.”

“Good.” Duan Qide also agreed.

“But I still decided to help, not for anything else, just for the immortal justice in my heart!”

Duan Qide: “??”

Ancestor Qilin said: “Duan Daoyou, let’s go. Let’s protect the boy for a moment… Don’t look at me like that. Check it yourself. This boy is so careless. He just put a poison spell on us through a voice transmission.”

Duan Qide was stunned for a moment, and then a loud “grass” spread all over the four directions.

At the next moment, two dark shadows rushed out of the mountain from a distance. It was Duan Qide and Qilin’s ancestor.

“Come and help, drag one of the stone carvings, and the other three are not enough to be afraid.” Xu que shouted and continued to sacrifice the escape talisman.

It is a kind of magic power exchanged from the system, which consumes blood and spirit.

But I can’t help it. It’s a chronic spell and can’t deal with stone carvings. It’s very effective to intimidate those two goods.

“Shit, I’m so angry. Ben shenzun hides well. You fool has to send a voice to respond to him and implicate Ben shenzun in the poisoning curse.” While scolding, old Qilin flew to Xu que.

No, he just tried. The poison spell is extremely terrible and can’t be removed at all. Moreover, it is bound with Xu’s life. Once Xu’s death, they will die suddenly.

“Just, just remember the world. You and I are false. Why are you greedy for life and afraid of death?” Duan Qide shook his head and sighed. Then his eyes coagulated and shouted in a deep voice: “follow me.”

“Go!” Old Qilin shouted.

The scene was boiling with blood.

Both of them locked one of the stone carvings. They looked dignified and magnificent, and vowed to drag the stone carvings Go! ” Duan Qide shouted again You rush! ” Old Qilin shouted You rush first! ” Duan Qide road I don’t know. You said there was no need to be greedy and afraid of death. You first. ” I just said it casually. ” They were full of momentum, but there was no action at all. Just for a few moments, Xu que was directly smashed half of his body. If there was no system automatic recovery function, he would fall and be killed on the spot. Seeing that Duan Qide and Qilin’s grandfather were still counselling, he immediately burst into anger How can I be with you two goods? ” Xu que scolded and didn’t talk nonsense. While recovering from the injury by relying on the system, he madly stuffed pills into his mouth. At the same time, he pinched the Shenxing escape sign and rushed to the position of Duan Qide and Qilin’s ancestor Sleeping trough, boy, what are you doing here? ” No! ” They were shocked and ready to move. They tried to turn around and run away. Xu Kuang rolled his eyes and yelled: “believe me, help me hold for five minutes, that’s half a cup of tea. I can solve everything.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1570
chapters.body:
Chapter 1570

Chapter 1570

C.1570

Boom!

A loud noise exploded over the Tiangong courtyard, deafening, and the scene was a little anxious.

Xuanyuan Wanrong watched the play below, and Wang Chi didn’t dare to get close easily. He was afraid of being ignited by Xu lack.

Old Qilin and Duan Qide, helpless, were finally forced to lead out a stone carving to help Xu que relieve the pressure.

However, the two goods were still very good at fighting and ran away. At first, the stone carving didn’t want to pay attention to them, but fortunately, the two goods always counseled and brought Gang back to fight the stone carving. They successfully annoyed the stone carving and began to chase them.

Xu Ke’s pressure was relieved instantly. The invisible killing moves of the four stone carvings were unusually fast, but after one of the stone carvings was pulled away, the attack frequency of the invisible killing moves immediately decreased.

This made Xu Kuan Ji’s time to escape from the talisman become more abundant, and he was no longer injured. The half body that had been bombed has now healed, and he is running braver and braver. There is still time to make several separate bodies to try to confuse the public.

He just gave up the move without getting a few separate bodies.

Obviously, separation is of no use to those stone carvings.

The other party doesn’t know what means to use. The attack and killing moves can always accurately lock his real body.

“It’s weird. These four stone carvings can’t see through their strength at all, but this means of attack and cutting is absolutely unprecedented. Won’t they also exist in Tianzhou in the real world?” Xu Ke frowned.

Now the pressure is relieved, the risk is reduced, and everything begins to go well.

He also began to have time to think about the existence of the four statues. If the real world also existed, it would be a little scary. I’m afraid it’s hard to solve it when I go back.

Wait

Shouldn’t two dogs be forced to expose themselves and fight. Are these four statues?

Xu Wei suddenly remembered this, but immediately shook his head and denied it.

In the previous picture, there seems to be no figure of four statues. It is clear that a group of monks with strange clothes and appearance are fighting with ergouzi.

It’s more like an outsider.

“Boy, how are you? Ben shenzun is about to be killed, ah…” at this time, the voice of Qilin’s father was heard.

It was hit by the Dharma formula of stone carving, and a slender fluff fell, startling him with a scream.

“I’m dying, too. Hurry up. It’s agreed that half a cup of tea will not be dark or blown. It only takes us a moment to drink half a cup of tea.” Duan Qide also shouted.

He was a little worse than Qilin’s father. His body was square, and the void was full of dense array patterns, emitting bright light. When the stone carving wrote a Dharma formula, he was shocked and lost two hairs.

“Rubbish, it takes a moment to drink half a cup of tea? This God only needs half an instant. ” Old Qilin sneered and mocked.

Duan Qide’s face is speechless. Are you better than that?

immature!

I don’t know!

Duan Qide expressed his contempt, and then looked directly at the stone carving. His palms coagulated and drank in a deep voice: “old Qilin, get out of the way. I can kill the evil stone carving.”

“What?” Old Qilin looked stunned and unbelievable.

“You can’t, but I can. Get out of the way. It’s too weak.” Duan Qide didn’t even look at Qilin’s father. He shook his head and stared at the stone carving.

“Ouch, I’m NIMA… Have you drunk too much?” Old Qilin’s eyes widened.

Duan Qide’s face was indifferent and ignored. The array lines on his side turned and the bright awns bloomed, interwoven into pieces in the air.

The next moment, he burst into a loud roar: “lightning five whip. Drink! Ha! ”

Boom!

There was a loud noise in the air, and Duan Qide hit five in a row in the blink of an eye.

In fact, it’s only five lightning strikes in a row with the naked eye.

“Hiss!”

Old Qilin took a breath on the spot.

How strong!

The murderous spirit of the five whip lightning made him feel numb on his scalp and suffocate his chest.

Looking at the stone carving not far away, I didn’t notice any danger at first, but I was surprised by Duan Qide’s momentum and the appearance of Qilin’s father, and my eyes couldn’t help but dignify.

However, several flashes of lightning fell in front of it, and the stone carving only played a mark formula, and the lightning was annihilated in an instant.

Then… Nothing.

The stone carving was stunned in place for a moment.

That’s it?

Lightning five whip?

It suddenly glared at old Qilin. Did you just take a breath?

Old Qilin looked like an old God and said indifferently, “hum, it seems that Taoist friend Duan is just like this. Although lightning five whip is strong, it’s just a small Dao. Get out of the way. Next, look at my God. I once had a set of ancestral secret skills, such as receiving, melting and hair. It’s called the three character secret. If you use this move, no one can hit the God nearby. ”

“True or false?” Duan Qide was surprised.

“Oh, look.” Old Qilin smiled lightly and faced the stone carving with great momentum. He shouted, “come and fight.”

The stone carving was angry. Seeing the appearance of Qilin’s father, without hesitation, he immediately raised his stone arm and punched out.

This is the first time that the stone carving has moved so far.

Dong!

There was a dull sound in the void, and then the void between the beams was completely annihilated.

Old Qilin fell from the air on the spot and hit the ground heavily, unconscious.

In an instant, there was a period of stillness on the scene.

Duan Qide was stunned.

The stone carving also has some reactions.

Even the other three stone carvings chasing after Xu Xu are paying attention to the situation here. They are a little stunned for a moment, and their killing moves for Xu Xu have stopped for a while.

Xu Xu also felt silly and unbelievable.

Isn’t old Qilin smarter than Er Gouzi?

Why do you feel… More stupid than two dogs now?

Pick up, melt, hair?

After you take it, it’s melting and hair. What’s the matter with you lying on the ground?

“Shit, how can I fight? Originally, we could delay half a cup of tea together. Now it’s knocked out. We can’t delay that long! ” Duan Qide calmed down and yelled.

“Let you brag about Niubi…” Xu que shook his head and continued, “but from just now to now, it’s almost half tea time. You can keep counting your interest!”

“I can’t hold on.” Duan Qide looked bitterly at the stone carving: “can we have a temporary truce? When I’m ready, I can kill you. ”

Stone carving: ”

The other three stone carvings opened their mouth: “make a quick decision. They are delaying the whole process. Don’t pay attention.”

“Don’t worry about them. Cooperate fully to kill Xu deficiency.”

“Old four, if you hadn’t been led away by them just now, the boy would have died.”

The three stone carvings said that they had launched the siege of Xu vacancy.

This time, they no longer simply use the invisible killing move. It seems that they are going to be serious. They actually start their body and fly towards Xu vacancy.

Xu Ke felt bad for a moment. He knew that the robbery was working. Under various changing choices, he had predicted ten results, all of which were death.

“Shit, I knew it wasn’t that simple.”

Xu que suddenly changed his direction and stopped in place.

Boom! Boom! Boom!

In an instant, the four directions, front, back, left and right, triggered a void explosion at the same time. On the contrary, Xu lacked his original position and was safe and sound.

This time it all depends on knowledge, or you’ll die.

“This child must be divided.”

“He can predict our position.”

“It should be magic!”

“It’s just Luojin fairyland. I’ve mastered magic skills. It’s unusual.”

While talking, the stone carving that originally chased Duan Qide suddenly came back and joined the other three stone carvings.

“Shit, Duan Qide, come and hold him. I’ll be right away.” Xu que immediately jumped his eyelids and pricked his eyebrows. An unprecedented sense of crisis hit his whole body.

“No, I can’t. That’s what I do. I’ll die if I drag on.” Duan Qide shook his head and broke his arm.

At the same time, Xuanyuan Wanrong said, “Qilin’s father is pretending to be dizzy.”

“Fart, Ben shenzun is really dizzy.” Old Qilin closed his eyes.

Xu Ke frowns. He is too lazy to talk to old Qilin.

Anyway, these two goods have been delayed for a long time.

Delay, but also delay a little more time. If you avoid at least four statues and two killing moves, everything will be different.

“It seems that you can only fool and try!”

Xu que, with bright eyes, looked at the four stone carvings and shouted, “four, stop first. I have something to say.”

Zhijietongli, this move works at this time.

It seems that the other party really stopped because he knew that he was possessed of magic.

“I can teach you magic, but you must kill Wang Chi first and then kill me.” Xu que shouted.

The four statues were silent.

Wang Chi in the distance was also stunned and immediately smiled.

“Ha ha, Xu Ke, why are you still whimsical at this time? Although the magic power is precious, it is not enough to take it as the price of the four venerable masters for me. ” Wang Chi joked, very confident.

He can deal with these four stone carvings. Naturally, he has a handle.

“He’s right. Magic is not enough.” One of the stone carvings is indifferent Stop struggling. It’s useless. You’ll die after all. ” But before you die, we have a question for you. Just now you seem to mention words like memory world? Do you know Taiyi Tianshi? ” A stone carving stared at Xu Que and asked this sentence. Xu Wei was overjoyed and shouted, “of course, Xuanyuan Wanrong is the one chosen by heaven and was selected by Taiyi Tianshi, while I am her Taoist companion and have been written into Taiyi Tianshi.” Impossible! ” A stone carving immediately shouted, “if there is any change in Taiyi Tianshi, we will definitely know for the first time. There is no second person on it, unless…” speaking of this, the stone carving was suddenly stunned, and a shock burst out in his eyes Remember the world, don’t you… “Other stone carvings seem to react and shake one after another Answer us, is this heaven and earth where we are now located in Taiyi Tianshi, what you call the memory world? ” The stone carving stared at Xu que, and his tone became solemn. In the distance, the smile on Wang Chi’s face suddenly stiffened. However, Xu Xu didn’t respond this time. The whole person was suspended in midair and motionless. At the same time, the system prompt in his mind was echoing Ding, the unity of ten thousand dharmas has been completed. The ‘unknown Dharma formula’ has been generated. It is being transmitted to the host. The transmission is complete. ” Ding, warning, warning, the “unknown Dharma formula” and the host cannot agree… Agree… Agree… “” Ding, there is an unknown error, please… Please… Please stay… Master… “Zi… The prompt sound of the system disappears completely and turns into a chaotic current sound

chapters.title: Chapter 1571
chapters.body:
Chapter 1571

Chapter 1571

C.1571

The system is out of order!

For a long time, in Xu Ke’s eyes, the almost omnipotent and extremely powerful system has been disordered for the first time.

The system doesn’t seem strong?

No, it’s not. It’s something that comes out of the unity of all methods, which is beyond the control of the system.

At the time of integration, everything went smoothly. Finally, the “unknown formula” was combined, which was an existence that the system could not define, but at least it was smooth.

Even when it is transmitted to Xu Xu, it goes smoothly.

Until the transmission of this formula was completed and Xu Ke really mastered it, the system was disordered.

But Xu Ke didn’t give any response to all this.

At the moment, Xu Ke is very quiet and suspended in the air. A strange breath between heaven and earth sweeps from all directions and is madly pouring into Xu Ke’s eyebrows.

“What happened?”

“No, it doesn’t feel right.”

“Kill him.”

“Take this opportunity to kill!”

After a brief dialogue, the four statues shot at the same time.

Four fists, accompanied by the invisible killing move, roared to Xu que.

Xu Xu didn’t avoid, so he floated in the air.

The killing power of the four stone carvings came, but they were swallowed up by those strange smells a few meters away.

Everything was calm as if nothing had happened.

“This…”

“How is that possible?”

“Our Taoism has been swallowed up?”

The four statues were shocked, and the stone bodies were shaking.

On the ground, old Qilin exclaimed, “lying in the trough!”

Duan Qide: “lying trough, lying trough.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong: “lying… What happened?”

She was frightened and couldn’t figure out what had happened, but she could feel that the lack of breath seemed to be disappearing. Instead, a strange breath was born from heaven and earth and was slowly replacing the lack of breath.

The key is that the strange smell began to make her back cold, and an uneasy premonition became stronger and stronger in her heart.

“What’s the matter with this boy?” Old Qilin was shocked.

“He just said he was practicing kung fu. Can’t he really deduce it?” Duan Qide looked dignified and said in a deep voice, “it’s a little scary. I can’t see through it.”

“Don’t say it’s you. Ben shenzun’s scalp is numb and his heart is unstable.” Old Qilin also nodded.

“Run, run, if you don’t want to die, run!” At this time, Wang Chi shouted in the distance and ran away.

In a hurry, everyone saw his pale face, completely lost his blood color, and his eyes were full of fear.

Wang Chi shouted at the four stone carvings, and then ran away without looking back.

The four stone carvings hesitated for a moment, but they also felt a retreat, especially after seeing Wang Chi’s panic and panic.

“Seems to affect our mind?”

“It’s impossible. We have existed for so many years and can shake our hearts and minds, except those gods.”

“Yes, this may be some kind of profound cover up, trying to shake us.”

“Wang Chi, don’t run.”

Four stone carvings shouted to Wang Chi.

However, Wang Chi didn’t mean to stop at all. He was frightened. He had a feeling of being stared at and dying.

“Whoosh!”

Suddenly, a golden and red lightning, extremely subtle, passed by him.

Wang Chi, who was running away, immediately separated from the head.

The head flew in the air, and the body still continued to rush forward for hundreds of meters until the eyes on the head suddenly widened, completely breathed out and fell from the air.

“Bang!”

Until Wang Chi’s body fell to the ground and made a dull sound.

All the people present suddenly recovered.

Wang Chi… Dead?

Everyone stared with wide eyes, wide mouth and dull face.

How is that possible?

Who did it?

Dean of Tangtang heavenly palace hospital, died like this?

“Where’s Xu Duan?” At this time, Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly asked.

From the moment Wang Chi died, she subconsciously turned around to see Xu que. As a result, Xu que, who was still in mid air, had disappeared.

And his breath seems to have disappeared completely.

No, it seems to be replaced by that strange smell.

“Withdraw!”

The four stone carvings made the same choice at the same time.

When Wang Chi was killed, they couldn’t find out who did it and how to do it. They just vaguely saw a red and a gold flash of lightning.

It’s too weird. Besides, Wang Chi is dead. They don’t have to continue to take risks.

“Boom!”

Suddenly there was a loud noise from the void in front of the four statues.

Four stone carvings were blown away at the same time, and wisps of stone debris were scattered on their bodies. There were cracks on the chest of one of the stone carvings.

“Who is it?” The stone carving cried out in surprise.

I can’t believe I didn’t even see who my opponent was. My body was cracked.

“Jie Jie……”

Suddenly, a sharp and strange laughter came.

In the virtual space, a figure appeared.

A long black-and-white hair, golden eyes, blood scarlet pupils, full of madness, with a ferocious smile on his face.

He walked slowly, and his eyes showed two subtle flashes of lightning, one red and one gold, which drew a long chain of lightning in the air for a long time.

“Xu que!” Old Qilin shouted out.

“No, he… Doesn’t seem to be Xu Duan.” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face became a little pale.

The man in front of him, although still lacking in appearance, seemed to be a different person, extremely strange and terrible.

“Yes, there is something wrong with the formula he deduced, which seems to cause him to lose his sense of autonomy, but his strength has also become… Strong enough to suffocate.” Duan Qide took a deep breath and felt thrilled.

“So weird?” Old Qilin was surprised. He immediately looked at Xu Kuang and shouted, “Xu Kuang, wake up.”

However, Xu que still had a grim smile on his face, and his scarlet pupils stared at the four statues. A surge of killing suddenly swept out.

“No!”

The four statues immediately exclaimed and turned into virtual shadows, trying to escape into the void.

Xu que seemed to have expected this scene. When the four statues had just planned to do so, he had rushed forward. A long arc of lightning was drawn in the middle of the air, but his figure was completely blurred.

The crowd was dazzled, and then heard bursts of dull noise.

The four stone carvings were beaten out of the void.

“Ah! Stop! ”

“Xu Ke, if you are chosen by heaven, the memory world should be your love robbery. You shouldn’t kill us.”

“We are the Taiyi Guardian stone and master the shadow guard. We are the guardians of the chosen people. If you want to go to the divine domain in the future, you must have us to open the way.”

“There was a misunderstanding before. Wang Chi controlled the girl and we cooperated with him. If you first show the identity of the person selected tomorrow, we will obey you.”

“Yes, although this is a memory world, it doesn’t matter if you destroy everything or kill everyone. After all, it’s false, but the four of us are Taiyi guardian stones, which are closely related to Taiyi Tianshi. If you kill us, we in the real world will also be affected.”

“If you kill us, you are weakening your future guard.”

But it didn’t work.

Xu Kui was like a mad devil. His scarlet pupils seemed to destroy everything, and the killing was violent.

Bang! Bang! Bang!

He raised his hands and feet, leaving only a vague shadow of his fist. Every dull sound implied hundreds of vibrations, which meant that in the dull sound of a punch, he actually hit hundreds of punches.

Then, strange black flames sprang up out of thin air and burned on the four stone carvings.

“Ah…” the stone carving immediately sent out bursts of harsh roars and screams.

But they were greeted by overwhelming sword light and sword shadow.

No one saw how many moves Xu lacked, only that the four statues were badly beaten.

The lack of attack and cutting followed one another. It was so dense that it was suffocating, and the speed was so fast that it made people’s scalp numb.

Boom!

Finally, in less than ten minutes, the four stone carvings exploded in the air with a loud noise.

The four incredibly strong stone carvings were destroyed by Xu Que in only ten breathless hours.

“This is completely a madman, a madman who destroys heaven and earth. I’m afraid it’s a disaster to let it out.” Old Qilin finally felt scared and couldn’t help shaking.

Boom!

At the same time, the world began to tremble.

All nothingness began to twist.

“It’s really a memory world. Everything is false.” Duan Qide sighed as he looked at the changes around him.

“I see…” old Qilin nodded, but before he could sigh, his face suddenly changed and turned to run: “shit, this is a memory world. Ben shenzun is also fake. Why are you chasing Ben shenzun?”

“Shit, this boy lost consciousness and killed indiscriminately. Although this seat is also fake, I don’t want to be killed like this!” Duan Qide also shouted in surprise and turned to run.

But in less than a second, a tiny golden red lightning ran through the front of Qilin’s ancestor and Duan Qide.

At the next moment, Xuanyuan Wanrong, who remained in place, gradually recovered his clear eyes, but his face suddenly changed dramatically Xu Ke, you and I are going to kill you? ” The memory world is already broken, and the love disaster is broken without warning. Her memory is restored and she understands everything in an instant. Xu que, who can enter the state of crazy devil, directly stared at her after killing the false ancestor Qilin and Duan Qide

chapters.title: Chapter 1572
chapters.body:
Chapter 1572

Chapter 1572

C.1572

Xuanyuan Wanrong was a little angry at the moment.

At this time, she has recovered her memory, but the memory world has not been completely destroyed, and her strength has not been restored.

But at present, she also knows that even if she recovers her strength, she may not be her opponent.

The old Dean Wang Chi and the four statues were stronger than she was at her peak. They were still easily killed by Xu que.

This guy… What has he practiced? He has become so terrible, just like a crazy devil.

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked into Xu’s eyes and felt a chill on his back.

“Xu Ke, you are under the control of evil thoughts. Don’t enjoy killing, otherwise you will be completely lost and reduced to a senseless madman.” Xuanyuan Wanrong said, with a crisp voice like the sound of nature.

She tried to awaken Xu que.

However, Xu Duan’s eyes were still full of hostility, and the blood thirsty smile on his face made his scalp numb.

“Boom -!”

There was a loud noise from the sky again. The memory world collapsed more and more severely. Between the fragments and cracks, there were scenes of the other world, overlapping constantly.

That’s Tianzhou.

“Whoosh!”

At this time, Xu que had started his body and disappeared in situ.

A towering killing intention completely locked Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face changed and quickly retreated.

However, it was still a step late. In the blink of an eye, Xu lacked that crazy cold smiling face, which was close at hand.

A fist that seemed to destroy everything was coming at her.

“Die in your hand…”

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s eyes were slightly dull and closed slowly, as if she accepted her life.

She couldn’t escape the blow.

I just feel that if I die in Xu Ke’s hands, I seem to be able to accept it.

Just why is there a trace of reluctance?

How can there be an existence in this world that I don’t give up?

“Bang!”

Suddenly, a crack appeared in the void in front of Xuanyuan Wanrong.

The gap between her and Xu que broke like a mirror, and the crack in the memory world occurred here.

Xu Xu’s punch emptied and crashed out along the crack of the memory world.

There was a loud and deafening noise from the outside world.

“Lying trough, what kind of fist is this? Rob the head of this God! ”

Then came a familiar cry.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was slightly stunned and seemed to be a dog named Er Gouzi.

No, that guy is the descendant of Qilin’s ancestor tens of thousands of years ago, also known as king Wei Wu.

No wonder I’ve always felt familiar and strange before.

“Lying in the trough, it seems that Xu Ke has the taste of that boy, but when did he become so strong?” Another voice came.

Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned slightly: “Duan Jiude, the grandson of Duan Qide?”

Boom!

Another loud noise, the memory world is completely broken.

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s expression was slightly strange. He escaped from death because of the crack in the memory world and survived from Xu vacancy.

Shua!

The scene in front of us also changed in an instant.

The mountains of Tiangong courtyard completely disappeared and replaced by a battlefield filled with gunsmoke.

Countless monks fought in mid air, and countless Dharma formulas covered the sky and filled the sky.

Two dogs are rushing to several big Luojin fairyland, constantly taking out people’s lower bodies, kicking people’s hips, sneaking attacks, turning around and running away.

Duan Jiude’s face was dignified and immortal, offering a series of talismans.

Then he shouted “Zhentian fist”, raised his feet and kicked his opponent’s forehead. His mouth opened and spewed out a poisonous fog.

On the other side of the battlefield, there are countless familiar faces of Tianzhou.

Yaochi, Shennong clan, shadow futu sect, Fangcun Xianzong, Tianzhou 14 immortal region, all joined hands in the war.

Their opponents are the same as those of Er Gouzi Duan Jiude. They all wear the same clothes.

“Xuanyuan Wanrong? You’re out. Where’s Xu Kuan? ”

Not far away, a woman who was fighting with the enemy asked. It was Zixia fairy.

“What, Xuanyuan Shangxian is back?” The second dog son didn’t know when he had come nearby. He rushed over immediately and shouted, “welcome Xuanyuan to the immortal and save our God!”

“Welcome Xuanyuan Shangxian.” Duan Jiude also came, his face full of anger: “xianyuanzhou invaded Tianzhou, crazy and inhuman.”

“What about Xu Ke? Come and help. ” Two dogs look around.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was relieved. Xiumei picked it. By the way, where’s Xu madman?

“Boom -!”

Almost at the same time, the void not far away caused a loud noise.

A figure rushed out of it. The long black-and-white hair danced in the wind, and the whole body was filled with violence.

Tianzhou, the 14 immortal regions, yaochi, Shennong and other forces, all those who knew Xu Ke were stunned.

“Lying trough!” Two dogs were startled.

“Lying trough, lying trough!” Duan Jiude was also confused.

How did Xu que become such a virtue?

People are a little afraid, and dogs are a little afraid!

“What’s going on?”

Zixia fairy frowned, and her eyes immediately swept to Xuanyuan Wanrong, quite a question.

“He didn’t know what skill he practiced in the memory world. He suddenly became possessed. His strength soared and killed many people, even me!” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face was expressionless and indifferent.

It’s normal for him to kill you!

Zixia fairy looked away coldly and looked at Xu Ke. She had a kind of palpitation and uneasiness inexplicably.

“Xianyuanzhou, invade Tianzhou?” At this time, Xuanyuan Wanrong also looked at Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude and asked.

“Yes, the people of the heavenly palace didn’t know what stupid things they did. It seems that they opened a channel, and then xianyuanzhou attacked on a large scale. They didn’t say hello and killed anyone.” Two dogs should say.

“Didn’t you hide before?” Xuanyuan Wanrong said, glancing at the battlefield and finding a few figures missing.

Jiang Hongyan, Liu Jingning, Xu Feifei and Mo Junchen are not here.

“I can’t hide. These guys fought and destroyed the cave.” Duan Jiude, with a bitter face, shook his head and sighed.

“What should I do now? Xu Ke is unreliable. He is crazy. Please Xuanyuan Shangxian to lead our God to leave this troubled world.” Two dogs began again, extremely shameless.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was too lazy to pay attention to it and looked at Xu Ke again.

At this time, the scene was somewhat deadlocked, and the appearance of Xu vacancy seemed to cause a slight change.

He was like a madman, with a cold smile on his face, motionless in the air, scanning everyone.

The people in xianyuanzhou were afraid and didn’t rush.

People in Tianzhou looked stunned and looked at each other, some of whom didn’t understand the situation.

“All friars in Tianzhou, give way, leave the battlefield and stay away from Xu deficiency.” Xuanyuan Wanrong drank and gave orders.

But all the people in the 14 immortal regions didn’t start, and they all looked at the leaders of their respective forces.

“Withdraw!” Yaochi reacted the fastest. Bai Cailing ordered all the yaochi disciples to plunder Xuanyuan Wanrong one after another.

The people of shadow floating Tu clan hesitated and followed closely.

Subsequently, other immortal regions also set off one after another. Some people withdrew directly and went away, while others came to meet Xuanyuan Wanrong.

But their group moved, and Xu que also moved.

The people of Shennong clan walked slowly and just flew away.

The next second, Xu Ke Ruo ran through the void and appeared very abruptly in front of them.

The crazy smiling face was deeply printed in the eyes of everyone of Shennong family.

“Xu… Xu Ke, what are you doing?” Someone asked with a shudder.

Boom!

Xu lacked a punch to blow out.

Hundreds of monks of Shennong clan, no matter what realm, disappeared on the spot.

The whole audience was in a dead silence. Everyone was stunned on the spot and looked shocked.

“How is this… Possible?” Duan Jiude is even more confused.

“Oh, it’s embarrassing!” The two dogs opened their mouths and their tongues almost fell to the ground.

The millions of invading monks in xianyuanzhou all looked frozen and frowned.

“Who is this person?”

“Strange, how can there be such a powerful man in Tianzhou?”

“No, he’s the great Luojin Wonderland. How can it be so?”

“Come on, all the fairyland, join hands to kill him first. He can’t stay.”

Xianyuanzhou responded quickly.

Thousands of fairyland raided from all directions and surrounded Xu que.

Nearly a hundred strong immortals descended from the sky with great momentum and stared at Xu que with an expressionless face.

“Ha… Ha ha…”

Suddenly, a creepy and strange laugh came out of Xu’s gap.

His body trembled with laughter, and the crazy bloodthirsty and violent spirit on his face became stronger and stronger.

So many lives in front of him seemed to make him smell the smell of blood in advance, which made him more excited and crazy.

In the eyes, a golden and red lightning arc soared in an instant.

Whoosh!

Then Xu que disappeared.

“Not good.”

The hundred immortals and the thousands of the king of fairyland seemed to be aware of something and moved one after another.

However, before they made any response, two golden red lightning arcs, with a faint shadow, quickly shuttled through their crowd.

Bang! Bang! Bang!

After a breath.

There was a dull noise in the air, and countless Xianwang strong and xianzun strong continued to burst and burst into blood fog. The whole cloud is empty, just like a bright red fireworks. Then, a blood shower came down. Hundreds of immortal worshippers and thousands of fairy kings in xianyuanzhou are dead! The whole army was destroyed, none left PS: I’m a little tired of writing new books. I’ll change my mind by writing old books. I’ll still take time to update old books when I’m free. Old friends who are short of books can go to the starting point to see my new book, the last simplicity of the fairy world.]

chapters.title: Chapter 1573
chapters.body:
Chapter 1573

Chapter 1573

C.1573

Shua!

There was a dead silence!

Everyone was frozen in place, with a look of absentmindedness and stupidity.

So many strong men… Hundreds of immortals and thousands of fairy kings died like this?

What the hell is this?

Immortal Emperor?

Everyone was shocked and unbelievable.

In the blink of an eye, all the strong men in xianyuanzhou had died in Xu Wei’s hands.

The rest is just some great rhodium fairyland and the monks under it.

But even their immortal king and immortal statue were like paper paste in front of Xu lack. Where did they have the courage to rush forward and die?

Originally, this was a great opportunity for the people of Tianzhou to kill all the aggressors.

But

There is another Xu deficiency between their two forces!

A crazy Xu Ke who doesn’t distinguish between us and the enemy!

This is a good example of the clan being crushed by the divine hand.

“Xu que!”

Zixia fairy teacher Qingxuan shouted, trying to wake Xu que up.

However, Xu que is like a mad devil, murderous, and his eyes instantly stare at Shi Qingxuan.

“Whoosh!”

The next moment, Xu’s figure disappeared directly.

“You… You bastard, I’ll settle with you when you wake up.”

Shi Qingxuan said angrily, his body flashed, offered a jade pendant in his hand, and his body jumped directly into it.

Then, the whole jade pendant radiated brilliance and fled into the void.

Boom!

Almost at the same time, Xu Que’s figure appeared from the position where Shi Qingxuan disappeared.

His bloodthirsty eyes were cold, and his eyes began to stare at the next target.

At the same time, er Gouzi had already retreated hundreds of miles away, and his eyes showed shock.

Duan Jiude also touched one side.

“Two dog teacher, stay. There’s something wrong with Xu Ke. If he continues to go crazy, he may destroy Tianzhou. Everyone will die at that time!”

“Teacher Duan’s words are quite reasonable. What should we do?”

“Old man, I think we should go back, influence Xu que with love and sincerity and wake him up. We are also helping him.”

“Teacher Duan is right. In retrospect, Xu Ke has treated our God well over the years. We shouldn’t leave!”

“Two dog teacher is really righteous!”

Duan Jiude praised loudly, but the speed of fleeing was not reduced at all.

Er Gouzi is crazy to play array patterns. Simple short-range transmission arrays are constantly arranged, and the speed is far faster than Duan Jiude.

“Grass!” A man and a dog also looked at him and scolded him at the same time.

“Duan Jiude, what’s your shameless running? Don’t you mean to use love and sincerity to influence Xu lack?”

“Do you run faster than the old man and have the face to say such words?”

“Ha ha!”

“Er Gouzi, don’t laugh. I don’t want to run, old man. I want to invite Xuanyuan Shangxian to do it.” Duan Jiude saw the figure of Xuanyuan Wanrong in front of him, stopped the way, stared at him immediately and said boldly.

“Ow!”

The two dogs howled on the spot, flew out of the transmission array and fell in front of Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned slightly.

Recalling the Kirin ancestor and Duan Qide in the memory world, he really matched the man and dog in front of him.

Use Xu Ke’s words to describe

Duan Jiude is a dog!

And ER Gouzi is a real dog!

Expect them to save Xu vacancy? I’m afraid the grave grass will be 100 meters high in the coming year.

“Two dog teacher, Xu Ke is now comparable to an Immortal Emperor! It must not be easy to trap him by relying on the array. I’ll help you! ” Duan Jiude turned his eyes and tried to slip again.

Unexpectedly, before he started, he was pressed back by two dogs.

“No, the power of the Immortal Emperor is not worth mentioning in terms of my God! You quickly follow Xuanyuan to the immortal to suppress the boy. The power of God is enough to arrange the array. ” Er Gouzi said very seriously.

“If you can’t help it, just leave.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t bother to pay attention to the shamelessness of this man and dog, and said faintly.

Originally, she expected Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi to have some way. Now, seeing that these two goods racked their brains to escape, she won’t embarrass them.

After all, Xu Ke in such a state, even she can’t face it head-on.

Too powerful, too scary Ben shenzun stressed that Ben shenzun is not running away, but looking for countermeasures. ” The two dogs left a word, turned into a dark shadow and swept hundreds of miles away in an instant Alas, old man, why don’t I think so? You all misunderstood me. ” Duan Jiude sighed deeply, and his figure gradually faded from the original place.
