In desperation, they were forced to fight. Then the battlefield gradually moved to the gap of the void boundary wall! At the time of the war, Xu Feifei, who was a little weak, was watched by an old woman in xianyuanzhou and kidnapped him before everyone could react. Jiang Hongyan and others immediately pursued and killed the old woman, and successfully rescued Xu Feifei. However, because they were too close to the gap of the void boundary wall, they were directly sucked into it and entered xianyuanzhou. Two dogs wanted to catch up with them at that time, but they were forced to stay because they were caught in a hard struggle Lying trough, you are in a hard struggle and forced to stay? You’re lying to ghosts. ” Xu Wei was furious after hearing this. He doesn’t know Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude yet? These two goods are obviously greedy for life and afraid of death. They don’t dare to catch up Brother Ke, listen to our explanation. The situation was really dangerous at that time, and Zixia fairy also said that the gap in the void boundary wall was not stable. We reversed the past, and as soon as the time staggered, we would be transmitted to different positions. Therefore, even if we chased after the past, it wouldn’t play any role. We might as well stay and wait for you to send messages. ” The second dog son hurriedly explained Yes, don’t worry, you boy. Now the gap in the wall of the void has not been closed. We can kill it. ” Duan Jiude nodded Wait, I remember when you said that. When I was in a crazy state, Xuan er… Cough, that’s right. Master Jiu, she seems to have entered a jade pendant to avoid my pursuit? ” Xu que coughed and said in a positive tone. Duan Jiude was unhappy for a moment, and his face turned black. What do you mean, master of nine? Old man, I have to shout respectfully in front of that. Master, do you call her xuan’er? You want to be higher than me? no way! The two dogs pressed Duan Jiude, who was about to attack, and said in a deep voice, “that thing was the transmission jade of Weiwu sect. At that time, the god statue felt something, and the transmission jade directly took her to xianyuanzhou.” Well, at least she knows something about them. Maybe she can find them first. ” Xu Xu nodded slightly and said, “but we have to hurry and get there as soon as possible.” Yes, brother Kuang is now as powerful as the Immortal Emperor. We can do whatever we want when we go to xianyuanzhou… Bah, no, it’s a big fight! ” Two dogs waved their paws and cheered up. There was a silence. Xianyuanzhou is bound to go. This is his previous goal. After all, xiaorou is also there! However, judging from the scale of the battlefield just now, the danger of xianyuanzhou is much greater than that of Tianzhou. Just come out at random, thousands of fairy kings and hundreds of fairy gods! The key is to hear that there is a fairy emperor over there? He had killed so many strong people in xianyuanzhou before, and those monks who fled back would certainly spread the matter wantonly. If several of them rush forward like this, I’m afraid they will not only save Jiang Hongyan and others, but also have to be folded there. So this trip to xianyuanzhou is dangerous! Still have to work hard! After all, I can have the strength I have today. I rely on my own efforts, hard work and struggle Come out, system Five companies send it! I haven’t seen you for a long time. Thank you for waiting. The update is resumed from today. I hope you can subscribe more and support. If you have monthly tickets, vote for a monthly ticket. Hey hey, you need monthly tickets for both books. Can you support them!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1578
chapters.body:
Chapter 1578

Chapter 1578

C.1578

Previously, in the memory world, the system promised that if he broke the memory world, he would be rewarded with a mysterious gift bag.

According to the unscrupulous business conduct of the system, if you don’t take the initiative to mention it, I’m afraid it will pretend to be stupid.

Xu que calls out the system interface and opens the backpack space at the first time.

Sure enough, not to mention the mysterious gift bag, it doesn’t even have a hair!

“System, where’s Lao Tzu’s gift bag?”

“Ding! The system has just restarted. I forgot. ”

“Where’s the face? To be a man… Bah, no, to be systematic, the most important thing is integrity. Keeping our word is our most basic moral character, you… ”

“Ding, please return all the loans to the host as soon as possible. After testing, the host has been overdue for more than 100 years, with capital and interest in total…”

“Stop, stop talking and give me the gift bag.”

Xu que, with an indifferent face, interrupted the system and asked for a gift bag.

The system is not ambiguous. After a moment of silence.

“Ding! Congratulations to the host for the mysterious gift bag. ” The wonderful sound of the prompt began.

Xu Que’s face showed a smile. It’s a mysterious gift bag I haven’t seen for a long time!

He thought and directly chose to open the gift bag!

Whoosh!

Several streamers flashed and finally fell into the backpack item grid.

[forgiveness cap]: disposable item. After wearing this hat on the designated object, no matter what you do, you will be forgiven by the other person.

[immovable Mingwang talisman]: a disposable consumable talisman that can resist the attack of Xiandi territory and any of the following strongmen for 7 seconds.

[divine disguise puppet]

[ask for voucher]: with this voucher, you can ask the system for all existing goods or functions.

Looking at a few more things in the item column, Xu didn’t frown.

Pardon cap? Although this thing is a little interesting, it really pulls the crotch. I can’t use it now.

It doesn’t move the Ming Wang Fu

Resist the attack of the strong in Xiandi realm? Is this the upgraded version of Vajra invincible?

Time has also increased from five seconds to seven seconds.

But what’s the last ticket?

Huh?

Ask for coupons?

Can you ask the system for everything?

Xu Ke was excited in an instant!

“In the system, I want to use the ‘ten thousand methods are unified’ that uses the voucher to exchange for the secure version.”

This is a big killing device. In a critical moment, even if you encounter the Immortal Emperor, you may be able to kill each other in a second.

Of course, the premise must be the unification of all methods in the safe version, otherwise it will be an accident if you enter the crazy state again.

“Ding, after calculation, the host can’t control this method at present. Please choose carefully.”

“I want it!”

“After calculation, the host cannot…”

“I don’t care. I want GTR… Bah, no, I want the unity of all laws.”

“After calculation, the host is now…”

“Hoo Hoo Hoo! People want it! Yes! Yes! ”

Before, in the memory world, Xu Ke had upgraded the system to version 11.0.

He has seen everything in the mall. Compared with the “unity of all dharmas”… No! There is no comparability at all!

Is there anything else that can make Xu que of the great Luojin fairyland qualified to fight the Immortal Emperor?

No,

So now he just wants to get this formula out of the system, and it must be safe without sequelae and side effects.

“Please consider carefully. This method is a failed product caused by system errors, and more calculations are needed to improve it.” The system warned again.

It’s not that you’re not afraid to fall into madness again, but you have to go out at this time to collect a wave of ruthless wool from the system.

The opportunity is rare and can’t be missed!

The “…” system seems to feel the lack of attitude and fall into silence.

“System, let’s be reasonable. I’m able to get the ticket, right?”

“I Xu que was open and aboveboard all my life. I didn’t steal or rob. With the accumulation of personality over the years, I issued such a claim ticket. Now I want to exchange this claim ticket for the unity of ten thousand methods, but you obstructed it in every way. Are you worthy of my efforts?”

“I have suffered, sweated and shed tears. Even heaven and earth are moved. Now it’s hard to see the dawn of hope, but you have to take it away cruelly. I… I’m wronged!”

Finally, under the powerful Kung Fu of Xu que, the system failed.

Compromise. The system finally compromised. It agrees to give the formula fused by the “unity of all dharmas”, but it is not a complete version. In short, it became a castrated version, weakened several times, and weakened to the extent that Xu Ke could control it. This also means that the power of this dharma formula is greatly reduced. Do you want to kill the Immortal Emperor in Da Luojin fairyland? Don’t even think about it. However, the system has also offered several good conditions to temporarily make up for this wave of weakening. First, the system will eliminate all loans owed by Xu Ke before. In those years, Xu Ke only owed hundreds of thousands of forced value debts. Now he has become tens of millions of money with interest! Moreover, according to the system, if the arrears continue, people will be sent to collect debts soon. Xu Ke can still remember the millions of heavenly soldiers who were turned into by the thunder. But at that time, Xu que dodged, and the system will send more ruthless people this time. Therefore, the system can eliminate the debt this time, and Xu que also expressed his pleasure. Moreover, on this premise, the system will compensate Xu Ke with another 3 million installation force value. Most importantly, the system promises to gradually improve the unity of all laws. With the improvement of his strength, he will unlock the strength of the unity of all dharmas step by step. This is what Xu Ke values most! As long as you can use it in the future, it means that you will always have the strength to kill the enemy at a higher level, and not at a higher level or two, but directly kill the Immortal King across the realm, maybe you can kill the immortal Zun. In the future, when you are promoted to the fairyland, the Dharma formula will be unsealed, and you may directly have the qualification of World War I Immortal Emperor? If you go to xianzun and use the unity of ten thousand dharmas, you must be able to kill the Immortal Emperor directly! The key is that this is based on the premise that they will not fall into a crazy state and lose control. But that’s not enough! Xu que thought about it and put forward another condition System, when can I improve the attributes of my equipment? Look at my king forcing staff. It’s time to upgrade it. There are other magic weapons, immortals and so on. Give me some more. ” Ding! All equipment attributes are fixed values… “I want the full version of ‘unity of all methods’, now!” System: “…” Ding! The equipment currently owned by the host will be upgraded, which will take one hour. ” Xu Wei smiled with satisfaction when he heard the prompt. Although it is a weakened version of the unity of all dharmas, it can at least maintain reason, which gives Xu Ke a little more confidence to go to xianyuanzhou. At this moment, his divine sense has recovered more than half, and his strength has gradually returned. Xu que immediately withdrew from the system interface and stood up slowly. Two dogs and Duan jiudeton stared at each other Lying trough! ” Lie down, lie down, brother, can you stand up? ” The second dog was shocked and said, “come on, take two steps. Come on, take two steps. Ben shenzun has a local tyrant gold crutch…” “get out!” Xu Ke slapped Er Gouzi on the forehead, glanced at the front and said with a smile: “fried tianbang, it’s time to visit xianyuanzhou!” The first one is delivered. Today, I woke up and saw the background data. It was a little embarrassing. Ha ha. It seemed that many people responded when I restored the update. Finally, only more than 1000 people subscribed. In fact, it’s normal. It’s really broken for too long. There aren’t many people left who want to see it. However, in order to thank the more than 1000 book friends who are still supporting and waiting, as well as several friends for their generous reward and dedication of many monthly tickets, we are still at the fourth watch today. If you have a monthly ticket, remember to vote for it.]

chapters.title: Chapter 1579
chapters.body:
Chapter 1579

Chapter 1579

C.1579

After the war, although the monks of xianyuanzhou retreated, the gap of the void boundary wall in the sky was not closed

Xu Wei is very clear that the gap may not be closed again!

He got a precious big secret from the memory world. Tianzhou was called “Tianzhou” in ancient times.

If monks want to enter the divine realm, they have to take this “heavenly boat”.

Therefore, I’m afraid the big men behind xianyuanzhou also know the secret.

“Wait, boy, you can go to xianyuanzhou, but you have the Dharma formula to protect your body. Naturally, you are fearless, but Ben shenzun and Xiao Jiude brothers are weak. I’m afraid they can’t protect themselves. Why don’t you show us the Dharma formula?” Er Gouzi is a thief and still covets Xu Ke’s Dharma formula.

“Lying trough, two dogs, shut up, old man. I’m a man. Who’s a brother with you?”

Duan Jiude scolded and looked at Xu Xu: “boy, the two dogs talk hard, but the reason is still the same. Otherwise, show the formula to the old man!”

Speaking of this, Duan Jiude pretended to touch the moustache on his mouth:

“In addition, you are in a state of madness, which proves that this formula is not perfect. Old man, I’m just good at it. I call it the supreme improvement of skill! Take it out and I’ll give you some advice. ”

“Shit, Duan Jiude, can you order a face? Just you? Return the power method to improve the Supreme Master? ”

Two dogs immediately yelled and looked contemptuously: “boy, let the God come! You also know that Ben shenzun is the reincarnation of the ancient magic dragon. He was also the ancestor of Kirin in his previous life. He must have profound views on the skill. He will not dare to claim the supremacy after living for many years like some swindler divine sticks. ”

“All right, all right, you two want to see it. Take it.”

At this time, Xu Wei waved to stop the curse war between ER Gouzi and Duan Jiude, and threw out a brand-new secret script.

“Huh?”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude were stunned and shocked.

Here you are?

That’s it?

This or that Xu Ke?

“Say, who are you? Why take away my missing brother? ” Two dogs glared angrily.

“Go away!”

Xu que directly slapped Er Gouzi on the forehead.

Pop!

The second dog couldn’t dodge. After being slapped, he blinked and looked at Duan Jiude: “yes, it’s stronger than just now… It’s definitely a real brother.”

Just not for a while, Duan Jiude threw the script to the ground without even waiting for ER Gouzi to grab it.

“What do you mean?” Two dogs were stunned, some curiously came forward, picked it up and opened it.

Ten seconds later, he stood directly on it and peed.

“Shit, boy, if you don’t want to show this God, don’t pretend. What do you mean by taking this thing out?” The second dog said angrily.

“This is true!” Xu que smiled.

However, the cultivation conditions are extremely harsh.

First of all, it has to be the five spirit root constitution, and then the blood is pure. How pure is it?

It’s pure. At least it has to be Xu’s own father, son and daughter, even if it’s separated by two generations.

In other words, at present, he is basically the only one who can practice this formula!

Others practiced rashly and died in minutes.

“Really?” Duan Jiude doesn’t seem to say that Xu que is false, and combined with some of the content he just saw, it seems that it’s really something like that.

His eyes fell on the rubbings of the Dharma formula again, but now it had become wet!

“Two dogs, NIMA’s mental retardation!”

“If you don’t die, what do you scold the God for?”

Duan Jiude pointed to the wet rubbing of the Dharma formula, “you’ve done everything that dogs don’t do.”

“The essence of this God is above. What do you hate?”

“Although this dharma formula is useless to me, second teacher, you……” Duan Jiude sighed: “you are a monster!”

“Fart! According to the above meaning, no one can practice except this boy! ” The second dog son scolded, and he also saw the secret of the formula.

“Not necessarily. In the future, as long as my children have five spiritual roots, they may be able to practice, but it still depends on their qualifications. Even I can’t control the crazy state of this formula, and it’s even more impossible for others!” Xu que is carrying his hands behind him. He looks like I’m awesome.

“Ah… Unwilling!” Duan Jiude looked up and sighed.

“Wait!” Two dogs suddenly showed a strange smile: “brother lack, what will happen if people who don’t know practice this method?”

“If it’s light, it will explode and die, and if it’s heavy… I don’t dare to think about it.” Xu Weigang said that, suddenly stunned, and immediately understood the meaning of ergouzi’s question.

Why are these two dogs so bad? Duan Jiude also reacted and looked at Er Gouzi in amazement What are you doing? What are you two doing looking at Ben? ” Two dogs stared at him warily What do you say? ” Duan Jiude sneered What do you say? I’m also helpless. After all, it’s really dangerous to go to xianyuanzhou. If there’s no means, how can I dominate xianyuanzhou? ” When Er Gouzi finished, an obscene smile appeared on his face: “hey hey, if you hide those important information from this method, then rub thousands of them and throw them to xianyuanzhou…” shut up, shameless man! ” Xu que immediately shouted Second dog teacher, I read you wrong. I didn’t expect you to be such a dog! ” Duan Jiude shook his head and sighed. Then they raised their hands together and agreed to ER Gouzi’s proposal. They quickly discussed and confirmed the preliminary plan. Divide this dharma formula, then fake it to inherit the ancient spectrum, and then throw it to xianyuanzhou to spread it wantonly. In addition, we should give this formula a domineering name. The unity of ten thousand methods is just the function of the system. If you really throw it out by this name, it is estimated that no one will believe it, not to mention trying to practice. So you still have to name one This time it was all up to me to save the people in Tianzhou. Such a just move is called Zhengqi Sutra. ” Xu que didn’t even think about it and said directly You were like a crazy devil. Are you righteous? Where is righteousness? ” Er Gouzi criticized It should be called crazy magic Sutra. ” Duan Jiude proposed. Xu que responded contemptuously: “you know a fart. It’s called zhengqijing, which means I’m a serious person.” That’s called the righteous mad devil Sutra. ” Said the second dog Eh, it sounds OK. ” Xu que thought about it and thought it was a good name. But crazy devil… It doesn’t sound like serious people can practice Or is it called “Zheng Qi Feng Mo Jing?” Xu Wei suddenly felt that homophonic stem also had a place to play. Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi call this name directly. It’s good. It’s wonderful. Once a serious person listens to it, the cliff will practice! Subsequently, Xu que asked the system to split the formula, stripped most of the attack and cutting methods, divided them into more than a dozen copies, and then copied a large number of rubbings. Some are also directly into the jade slips, which is more high-end. The name of the Dharma formula is also written in five big characters with profound strokes – Zhengqi sealing magic Sutra. When everything is ready, Xu Shao and several people also began to prepare and set off for xianyuanzhou. This trip must make xianyuanzhou a chicken flying dog jumping Second change!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1580
chapters.body:
Chapter 1580

Chapter 1580

C.1580

Whoosh!

The combination of two people and a dog swept out of the cave and rowed across the sky.

After a chaotic war, a large area nearby has been reduced to ruins and is very messy.

“Alas, why so?”

Xu que shook his head and sighed with emotion.

The war is so cruel. Look at how many mountains and forests have been destroyed and how many cities have been destroyed in this war. It is uncertain that some innocent creatures have died in this war

“Brother Duan, don’t feel guilty. It’s not your fault. You were crazy.” Two dogs patted Xu Ke’s shoulder and comforted him.

“Yes, don’t take it too seriously, and you only blew up dozens of mountains and forests, and most of them were the strong ones of xianyuanzhou, so it’s no problem.” Duan Jiude nodded aside.

Xu que understood, and then carefully recalled the memory restored by the system.

Good guy, it seems that the battlefield was really destroyed by himself

Therefore, wars are cruel. It’s the people of xianyuanzhou who have nothing to do to invade Tianzhou.

If you don’t come, it won’t happen

Xu que forcibly threw the pot.

“Bang!”

Just then, the void in front suddenly twisted and sounded.

Not far from the gap of the void wall, four figures suddenly rushed out.

The powerful pressure covered the whole audience. Unexpectedly, they were four fairy King level strong men.

From their strange faces, it is not difficult to see that these four people are all from xianyuanzhou.

The four men had not been in the center of the battlefield before. Fortunately, they escaped the disaster, but they were also affected in the peripheral areas and were slightly injured. Therefore, they hid and cultivated. At this moment, they recovered their action ability.

However, they did not expect that when they were preparing to embark on their return journey and return to xianyuanzhou, they actually met the terrible madman again.

Even if they did not face Xu Que in the state of Madness at that time, the picture of Xu que slaughtering Immortal King and immortal has become an indelible shadow in their minds.

At the moment, looking at Xu vacancy, they are also going to the gap direction of the void boundary wall. The four people suddenly click in their hearts, and the secret road is not good.

This devil is not going to harm us, is he?

When the idea came out, the four people immediately trembled with fear.

Immediately, the four looked at each other and made up their minds.

Be sure to stop it.

They can see that Xu Ke is already extremely weak at this time. It seems that he is only the cultivation of Da Luojin fairyland, and his strength is very unstable.

Obviously, this guy may not be able to use the crazy magic formula before.

Together, the four may have a chance to keep the devil here forever!

“Sleeping trough! It’s the last sin of xianyuanzhou! ”

Two dogs also saw the four fairy kings and the strong, and immediately shouted.

However, the four people didn’t talk much nonsense at all. They suddenly joined hands to attack and kill.

Their goal is very clear, only Xu is short of one person!

“Eh?”

“Eh?”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude were stunned and reacted.

“Not for us?” Two dogs surprised.

“If this boy is not included in ‘we’, you are right.” Duan Jiude nodded and breathed a sigh of relief.

“Shit, you two pit goods, don’t you come to help?”

Xu Wei was angry and had to sacrifice the king forcing staff first to forcibly deal with the attack of the four immortal kings.

“Wait a minute!”

“Next time!”

As soon as the voice fell, the man and dog had slipped hundreds of miles away.

“OK, you run, don’t you? When I finish killing these four people, I’ll come after you two!” Xu que shouted.

The sound spread in an instant.

“I wipe.”

The second dog son’s face changed: “don’t be short of brother. I really don’t want to help. These four are fairyland. I can’t deal with them.”

“Yes, can’t you kill xianzun? Just four fairy kings. You can solve it yourself. If we are nearby, what if we are taken as hostages to threaten you? ” Duan Jiude also shouted.

“Wait until you die. You two will settle the new and old accounts together later. Don’t think I don’t know what you did to me when I was unconscious!”

Xu que scolded.

I’ve long wanted to clean up these two guys. I haven’t been educated for too long. These two goods are going to float.

“Grass!”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude scolded at the same time, and their faces changed dramatically.

Can the boy know what’s going on outside when he’s unconscious?

“Brother Duan, listen to the explanation of our God. It’s all instigated by Duan Jiude, a thief. It has nothing to do with our God!” Two dogs preempted and bit back.

“Oh, the Qing Dynasty is self-cleaning, Xu que. There seems to be a portrait of my master when he was young in my storage ring, old man.” Duan Jiude sneered and was very calm.

“What about the portrait? Has half a dime to do with it? ” Two dogs shouted Two dogs, you wait to die. ” Xu que shouted while dealing with the four fairy kings, erasing Duan Jiude from the blacklist temporarily Lying trough! ” The second dog looked silly for a moment: “brother short, if you like the portrait, Ben shenzun can draw a self portrait for you.” Boom! Xu que blew a fairy king with a fist, ignoring the two dogs. The current war situation is not much pressure for him. Although he has just recovered from his injury, he seems to be able to cope with the four strong people in fairyland. In addition, there is a weakened version of Zhengqi seal magic Sutra. It is not difficult to kill these four fairy kings. However, Xu weimingxian feels that his strength has improved after the madness. He plans to practice with these four immortal kings to consolidate his foundation Whoosh! ” But just then, a dozen figures suddenly came from the rear. The majestic momentum swept like a raging wave Lying in the trough, there are more than a dozen fairy kings! ” Duan Jiude felt more than a dozen breath and his face changed in an instant Damn it, Ben shenzun goes first… Ah, who’s special in Raben shenzun, loosen up… “Two dogs fled to the gap near the wall of the void. As a result, even the dog with urine was directly involved in the void wall and disappeared It’s over! ” Duan Jiude was stunned for half a second and turned pale. In fact, he just got an accompanying sign on ER Gouzi. As long as Er Gouzi uses the transmission array to escape, he can also take the opportunity to “be forced” to take him away. Unexpectedly, er Gouzi ran blindly, ran near the gap of the void wall and was directly sucked into xianyuanzhou. This also means that he will soon be sucked over… “Grass!” Duan Jiude cursed, and then his body twisted violently and was directly dragged into the gap of the void wall Er Gouzi was afraid of being cleaned up by me and deliberately fled to xianyuanzhou in advance? ” Xu Duan raised his eyebrows and was suspicious. However, I can’t think much. There are more than a dozen fairy kings not far away, so this wave must be serious. Well, then try this weakened version of the positive Qi seal magic Sutra. How powerful is it Chi! ” Xu que suddenly burst into a circle of air waves, and his eyes began to turn red gradually. There was a golden and red lightning arc, and the silver white color slowly appeared in his long black hair… “This… This is…” “he wants to show that kind of crazy devil state again?” The four fairy kings were immediately scared crazy and immediately prepared to retreat Sect leader Xu, stop! I misunderstood! ” We’re here to help! ” Suddenly, anxious cries came from the dozens of figures behind Huh? ” Xu que was stunned when he heard the speech and stopped for a moment. He vaguely sensed the breath of those people, some familiar, had seen. It shows that more than a dozen fairy kings are from Tianzhou. by the way. I remind of it. It is the Immortal King of shadow futu sect, Fangcun sect, yaochi sect and so on. These guys are so kind that they suddenly come to help

chapters.title: Chapter 1581
chapters.body:
Chapter 1581

Chapter 1581

C.1581

“Leader Xu, are you going to xianyuanzhou? Go quickly and leave the four to us. ” Soon, a fairy king from the shadow floating Tu sect shouted.

“Yo? When have you been so warm-hearted? ”

Xu Ke was suddenly happy.

Look at this posture, it seems that these people are really here to help.

Is it difficult to be deterred by your previous crazy state, so run to show it?

OK, good, pretty good.

“What leader Xu said, Tianzhou belongs to each of us, but it definitely does not belong to these invaders. Everyone has a responsibility to protect Tianzhou.”

“Yes, sect leader Xu has helped Tianzhou before. Now let’s deal with this little trouble.”

“These four people don’t know what’s good or bad. They dare to stop leader Xu’s way. We will make their life worse than death.”

“Sect leader Xu, go quickly. We’ll take over here.”

More than a dozen people shouted as they galloped in a turbulent manner and surrounded the four strong men in xianyuanzhou in an instant.

Seeing this, Xu que smiled happily.

“Thank you old fellow for your help.” He smiled and arched his hands at the crowd.

There are some feelings in my heart.

Looking back on the gratitude and resentment with these forces at the beginning, I didn’t expect that now everyone has turned fighting into friendship because of the invasion of xianyuanzhou.

There is true love in the world, and there is true love in the world.

“Don’t want to enter my xianyuanzhou.”

He knows very well that he can’t walk away today.

But in any case, we can’t let this terrorist existence that can enter the state of Madness at any time enter xianyuanzhou.

“The more you say that, the more I want to go.” As soon as Xu Duan’s eyebrows are picked, he will fight immediately.

However, an old fairy king of Fang Cun directly blocked in front of the fairy king and hit hard. He didn’t forget to turn back and shout to Xu Wei: “sect leader Xu, go quickly.”

“Ah, this!”

Xu Ke was stunned in an instant. This sudden move

“Senior, you…” Xu Ke opened his mouth to say something.

“Let’s go.”

Other celestial kings have surrounded the four strong xianyuanzhou and urged Xu que to leave at the same time.

However, he was too lazy to ask the truth. Since they were willing to solve this little trouble, let them go.

“Ladies and gentlemen, I’ll go first. I’ll see you tomorrow.”

Xu que smiled, turned and swept to the gap in the wall of the void.

However, just when he felt the traction of the void boundary wall, there came a roar from the strong man of xianyuanzhou: “I heard that this man has done harm to all sides in Tianzhou. Why do you help him so?”

“Silly, you know shit. You ran out to stop this scourge when he was about to leave. Can we help him and help you in turn? ”

“Hey, hey, now that the ‘wicked dogs’ are gone, Tianzhou is finally going to be peaceful.”

“Cough, don’t speak so loudly first. Xu Ke doesn’t seem to have gone in yet…”

More than a dozen fairy kings glanced at Xu que who was being dragged into xianyuanzhou.

“I’m NIMA…”

Xu que was already full of anger. He was about to rush out of the gap in the wall of the void and educate these people.

However, there was a huge pull behind him, which immediately pulled him back.

Boom!

There was a huge roar in my ears, and the scene in front of me changed rapidly, and the void was completely distorted.

The next moment, when all the forces involved dissipated, everything in front of Xu Ke returned to normal.

He is already in a strange place.

Surrounded by a vast plain, there are mountains and forests in the distance.

The air contains an incomparably strong aura, and even the world is full of the smell of Tao rhyme rules. It seems that if you practice in this place, you can feel the main road and break through in situ at any time.

“Is this xianyuanzhou? It’s really a good place. ”

After taking a deep breath, Xu Wei felt refreshed and in a much better mood.

However, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, who had been sucked in before, had no trace at the moment.

According to what Er Gouzi said earlier, if the gap in the void boundary wall of Tianzhou is reversed, as soon as the time is staggered, it will be transmitted to different positions.

Therefore, Xu que opened his divine consciousness and scanned at will. After he could not detect the breath of the two guys, he gave up looking for them directly.

It’s estimated that the two goods will be notorious in a short time with their conduct and style. At that time, you don’t have to look for them. It’s estimated that you can know their whereabouts from others.

Therefore, it is urgent to find Jiang Hongyan and them first.

After all, the saying “beauty is a curse” is not unreasonable. The overall strength of monks in xianyuanzhou is stronger than that in Tianzhou, and there are many strong people. With Jiang Hongyan’s appearance and temperament, I’m afraid they will inevitably encounter trouble.

“Just now I seem to feel the smell of monks in this direction.” Xu Xu’s eyes swept to the East. In the divine sense, he could detect that there were human groups gathering in the distance Go and inquire about the situation first. ” He whispered to himself, his body shook, turned into a virtual shadow and swept forward. A moment later. Xu Ke appeared outside a city. Looking up, there are three big words “unexpectedly Hecheng” written above the gate Are Taoist friends here to participate in the three trials? ” As I stopped, a voice suddenly came around me. Looking back, Xu Xu is a beautiful young man in white. But the boy seems to have wonderful bones. It looks beautiful, petite and weak, and the chest muscles are different from the development of ordinary people. Xu’s eyes looked down again. Good guy, his legs look slender and stable. It’s a good gun frame… Bah, no, it’s a good figure ratio Tao you? ” Seeing that Xu lacked didn’t reply, the boy called again Good. ” Xu que smiled, nodded and said, “I have no shortage of flowers. I’m here to participate in three trials this time. My brother also goes alone. If you and I go together?” That’s what I mean! ” The other party suddenly bloomed and showed a sweet smile I don’t know what to call my friend? In fact, I only heard about the three selection cases by hearsay and came here admiringly. Can you tell me more about it? ” Xu que asked politely Ah, yes… “The young man smelled the speech and said,” forgive me, brother Hua, I’ll take care of Zheng… “In the introduction, they also walked to the city together. During the conversation, Xu que learned that “Jinghe city” belongs to Qingzhou in the Wudu region of xianyuanzhou. There are three main gates around the city. Among the gates, there are several immortal kings and strong people. It is one of the 18 ancient sects in Qingzhou. The selection of three schools in Hecheng is not that they want to recruit new disciples, but that they have accepted the task of a big force to find talented people. However, it was revealed that the three cases were selecting talents for the rumored four Tianmen. As for the origin and uniqueness of the four heavenly gates, Guan Zheng asked three questions, because he also heard about it from the outside. Xu Xu was almost so angry that he wanted to hammer him in the chest. You said a lot of trivial things, but you said you didn’t know the key things. Did you hear them from others? However, as a newcomer, Xu Ke felt that he still needed to keep a low profile. After all, the experience of this period of time made him feel mature and more stable than before. Therefore, under the leadership of Guan Zheng, the two soon came to an inn for a temporary rest. Xu Ke also took this opportunity to talk with other monks who also came to participate in the three selection in the inn, and beat around the Bush to inquire about the news. As a result, after some inquiry, “friends” made a lot of friends, and the useful information was almost zero. These people have never heard of Tianzhou people entering this world, let alone the news of Jiang Hongyan and others. However, this is also very normal. From those people’s mouth, Xu que probably learned about the situation of xianyuanzhou. It is roughly divided into seven large areas. The scope of each large area is almost wider than the whole Tianzhou. Even if there is any news in such a vast world, it is estimated that it will spread very slowly. This makes Xu lack a little distressed. The sea of people is vast and the world is big. It’s not easy to find Jiang Hongyan and them in a short time! Do you have to do it the old way? Throw shoes and ask for directions PS: let me tell you, we started to restore the update on May 5, but it started at 0:00. Now it is the update on June 6. If you are not used to it, I will update it in different periods and adjust it to the day.]

chapters.title: Chapter 1582
chapters.body:
Chapter 1582

Chapter 1582

C.1582

“Alas!”

Xu que looked at his remaining forced value, shook his head and sighed deeply.

After the system upgrade, the air transport aura is enhanced.

However, the installed force value that needs to be consumed also soared.

Once opened this aura, 1000 points per second.

Now when this function is enabled, 100000 points of installed force will be directly consumed per second.

If you are in a small place, such as Tianzhou, Xu Ke may also try to throw shoes and ask for directions.

But now in xianyuanzhou, the geographical span is too large, comparable to seven Tianzhou.

I can only throw my shoes more than ten times when I have only a few million points left.

If you want to use this method to find Jiang Hongyan and them, unless you are lucky, the millions of points are worth nothing.

So throw shoes, ask the way, ask a piece of wool!

“Uncomfortable!”

Xu que sighed.

Instead of fighting for his luck, he decided to spend his strength on the blade.

If it doesn’t work to throw shoes and ask for directions, use an older method!

But I just said to keep a low profile when I first arrived, and I’m already a mature and serious person. It doesn’t seem very good to do things again?

But in order to find the little girls as soon as possible, it seems that they can only do so now.

Three selected dials?

Four heavenly gates?

All right, let’s start from here!

Several delicacies have been placed on the dining table in the inn.

Guan Zheng saw Xu que sitting there dejected and asked, “is brother Hua worried?”

“Oh? Isn’t brother Hua leaving home for the first time? ” The other party’s eyes lit up immediately.

“Yes, indeed.” Xu nodded.

“No wonder you don’t know much about many things. In fact…”

Guan Zheng nodded suddenly, then looked around and whispered, “in fact, I slipped out of my house this time.”

Xu Ke’s eyebrows were picked up, her eyes fell on her exaggerated pectoralis major, and the corners of her mouth Drew: “I can see it.”

“What?”

Guan Zheng was shocked. He always pretended to be very sophisticated. How could he be seen?

“How did brother Hua know?”

He asked curiously. At the same time, he noticed that Xu’s eyes always seemed to linger in front of his chest.

“Does brother Hua want to eat this dish?”

“I don’t seem to need it.” Xu Wei shook his head, “but you can eat more. It’s strong and Yang.”

Hearing the speech, Guan Zheng was inexplicably stunned.

She’s a woman! What kind of Yang!

Sure enough! Are men like this?

When she first saw Xu que, she thought she was a gentleman.

I didn’t expect to talk more and immediately expose my nature.

Hehe, man!

“No, I’m not good at this.” She skimmed her lips.

At this time, there was a noise outside the inn.

They were also immediately attracted to their attention and looked around.

Outside the inn, there were two monks confronting each other.

One of the men looks handsome, but he looks familiar. He looks like Guan Zheng for seven or eight points.

“Xiang min! Where on earth did you hide my sister? ” The man dragged the collar of another young man and asked angrily.

“Brother Guan, I didn’t lie to you. I really don’t know where Zheng Zheng went.” The young man looked helpless.

“Bastard, can you call Zheng Zheng?”

“Well, brother Hua…”

At the same time, Guan Zheng has already left his seat. He has a sneaky and guilty look, as if he is avoiding something.

“What’s the matter?” Xu que pretends to be confused and doesn’t expose each other.

“I want to go to this cottage suddenly… Cough, I want to go to this cottage.”

“Oh, you go, but do we need to shit when we are in such a state?” Xu que suddenly raised his voice and looked surprised.

These words also attracted the attention of the people around, and their eyes swept over one after another.

Who, who needs to pull that or something?

“Zheng Zheng!”

At the same time, the two people who argued outside also looked over and shouted at the same time.

“Oh, brother Hua, you…”

Guan Zheng stamped his feet in frustration, and his face turned red, but he didn’t care so much.

Two people outside the door have rushed over with joy.

Guan Zheng’s eyes fell on Xu Wei and his heart moved. He seemed to think of something. Suddenly, a magic weapon dagger appeared in his hand and quickly stuffed it into Xu Wei’s hand Brother Hua, help me! ” While talking, she pulled Xu’s arm, and the whole person also took the initiative to lean into Xu’s arms You are… “Xu Ke’s face was speechless. Will anyone believe this kind of dog blood drama these days Brother Hua, hurry up, they’re coming! ” Guan Zheng hurried anxiously Well, I see what you mean. ” Xu Que’s face coagulated, nodded and clenched the dagger in his hand: “don’t worry, you go first, I will kill both of them with your dagger.” Ah? ” Guan Zheng was startled and waved again and again: “brother Hua, don’t don’t don’t don’t don’t, you misunderstood…” misunderstood? ” Xu Xu deliberately pretended to be stupid and said, “Oh, I see. You want me to help solve the two people, and then this dagger is my reward.” Oh, no, brother Hua… “Guan Zheng almost vomited blood with anger. This flower is perfect. It looks gentle. Why is your mind full of fighting and killing? I want you to pretend to hijack me and take me away. Why do you have to think about killing? One of them is my brother Presumptuous! ” Stop! ” At this time, two shouts came at the same time. The two men arrived at the same time and looked at the dagger in Xu Que’s hand. His face suddenly became dignified and nervous This Taoist friend, I advise you not to mess around. ” One of them suddenly had a long sword in his hand. Just listen to the buzzing of the sword. The long sword immediately comes out of its sheath and points at Xu Ke. The people who were still quietly watching the excitement in the inn were excited at the moment I know this man. He is the young leader of Qinghong sect, Xiang min! ” Someone looked at the man with the sword and whispered Another, I guess everyone is no stranger. Cheng Ping, the shaomen supervisor of the burning gate. ” The hijacked teenager… No, that guy is a woman disguised as a man. I recognize her. She is Guan Chengping’s sister, Guan Zheng! ” Someone exclaimed in an instant It’s said that Qinghong is preparing to marry shaochengmen and wants to match Xiang min and Guan Zheng. ” So the question is, who is the boy next to the eldest lady? ” Everyone’s eyes fell on Xu vacancy, and his face began to become strange Good guy, what’s the origin of this boy? He dares to hijack the daughter of the sect leader of burning city in broad daylight. ” Is that too bold? ” Three trials have not officially started yet. How dare someone offend three trials at the same time? Admiration

chapters.title: Chapter 1583
chapters.body:
Chapter 1583

Chapter 1583

C.1583

Xu Ke has some helplessness.

I’m going to do something, but I didn’t want to start from here.

It’s all the blame of the guy dressed as a man. The key to such a bloody drama is that this group of people actually believe it.

And the guy named Xiang min, dare to point a sword at me?

I hate people pointing at me with a sword in my life!

“Hum!”

Xu kuanleng snorted, his big hand suddenly explored forward, and immediately took Guan Zheng into his arms.

This is a standard hijacking technique without any filth.

“Don’t come here. Be careful that my dagger accidentally pierces her throat and breaks her vitality!” Xu que sneered and threatened.

“Brother Hua, your hand…”

At this time, Guan Zheng in her arms blushed and whispered.

Xu que looked down and said, “they are all old men. Don’t care about such details.”

“Brother Hua, i… I’m a woman.”

Guan Zheng has regretted now, but it is difficult to ride a tiger.

“Ah?”

Xu Wei was perfunctorily surprised and suddenly said, “no wonder, I said, it was a girl.”

With that, he still maintained the standard hijacking method and didn’t mean to move away.

“Bastard, you want to die!”

At the same time, Xiang min was out of patience. His green veins burst on his forehead and roared loudly.

This is his fiancee, but now she has been hijacked and taken advantage of in full view of the public. How can she bear it!

“I don’t care where you come from. If you don’t let go of the Zheng within three breath, you will live worse than death, and the second half will live in regret!” Xiang min shouted angrily, so angry that his voice trembled.

The magnificent murderous spirit covers the whole Inn in an instant.

“Call someone!”

Guan Chengping, with an iron blue face, shouted to an attendant at the gate of the inn.

“Yes!”

The attendant answered immediately and rushed to the street to ignite a talisman!

“Whew!”

With a sharp sound, a ray of streamer flew to the sky and exploded a gorgeous spark.

“Qinghongzong, also call people!”

Seeing this, Xiang min shouted directly.

Immediately outside the inn, a figure rushed into the street, which also ignited a talisman and sent a shaking signal.

At that time, the inn fell into a dead silence. The air temperature seemed to drop to freezing point, and countless monks were shivering.

Both the Qinghong sect and the burning city gate have issued a request for help, and one is the Shao sect leader and the other is the Shao sect leader. Many strong people will come to the two major sects.

I’m afraid the guy who hijacked the daughter of the burning city gate is really going to die.

Everyone looked at Xu’s eyes and couldn’t help feeling a little more sympathy.

Guan Zheng’s face changed a lot now.

How did this happen all of a sudden?

Brother and Xiang min even want to shout the people from the two main doors. It’s over. It’s big

She felt anxious and at a loss.

“Oh, call someone?”

At this time, Xu Xu smiled and said calmly, “I’ll introduce myself first. You can call me Huahua or my brother, but don’t threaten me. I can’t stand the threat.”

Fried sky Gang? No shortage of flowers?

Everyone in the audience was thinking, and then many people shook their heads.

I’ve never heard of the “Heaven bombing Gang”, and I’m afraid it’s just a lengtouqing who has just come out to experience.

“Oh, there’s no shortage of fried heaven sect flowers, right? Do you know who I am? ” Xiangmin sneered, and his eyes showed a fierce color.

“Oh, roughly.”

“Ah? Yes… It’s Qinghong sect. ” Guan Zheng didn’t seem to be relieved from the situation. After being stunned for a while, he subconsciously replied.

“Oh, yes, Qing… Well, what’s the Qing clan?”

“Qinghong sect!”

“Well… What hongzong?”

“Qinghong sect!”

“What rainbow is green?”

“Oh, I see.”

Xu que looked at Xiang min again and said with a light smile: “the little leader of Qinghong sect…”

Halfway through, he got stuck again.

He looked down at Guan Zheng and asked in a low voice, “what’s the picture?”

“Xiangmin!” Guan Zheng replied with a dull face.

Everyone present was already confused.

You know roughly, do you really know roughly?

Haven’t you heard of qinghongzong?

Xiangmin, the eldest disciple of the clan, is a famous figure. Haven’t you heard of it?

“Ha ha ha!” At this time, Xu que already laughed, as if nothing had happened: “Xiangmin, the young leader of Qinghong sect, I’ve heard a lot about your name!” Then he didn’t forget to loosen the zither, quickly arched his hand towards Xiangmin, and immediately pressed back the pectoralis major muscle. Everyone present was stunned. Nima, where the hell did this guy come from? Isn’t that shameful? You haven’t even heard of other people’s names and zongmen. What’s the meaning of shouting? I’ve heard a lot about your name You… Oh, good, good! ” Xiang min smiled angrily, but the ferocity on his face became more and more obvious. The murderous spirit in his eyes was frightening Brother Xiang praised me! ” Xu Xu is still smiling, which makes people feel that he deserves to be beaten This Taoist friend… “At this time, Xu Ke suddenly heard a light whisper in his ear. Unexpectedly, someone was transmitting Taoist friend, you’d better leave quickly. The leader of Qinghong sect is the strong one in the fairyland, and the leader of burning city gate is the best among the fairyland kings. You’d better leave quickly before the people of their two main gates come. ” Huh? ” Xu Wei was stunned after listening. Which kind-hearted classmate is reminding me in good faith? He glanced at the crowd and soon saw a fairyland youth leaning on a crutch and hanging his right trouser leg, winking at himself. A kind man with a broken leg? When Xu lacked the stupefied spirit, the other party heard again: “Taoist friends, listen to my advice, sanzong is the overlord here. One hand covers the sky. My leg was cut off when I accidentally rubbed Xiang min’s shoes.” This…… “Xu Xu Xu couldn’t help frowning after hearing this:” with your cultivation, even if your leg is broken, it shouldn’t be difficult to grow again? ” Ah. ” However, the young man heard a helpless and bitter Laughter: “how overbearing the three sects were. Xiang min cut off my leg at that time and didn’t allow me to leave unexpectedly Hecheng for half a step. He said that if I dared to recover my leg, I would cut off my head next time.” It’s awesome. It’s really a local snake worthy of the name! ” Xu que sighed and continued, “what did you just say about the suzerain of their three sects?” Fairyland! ” Young people should say That’s not a big problem, just a fairy king, and only three. It’s a little fun. ” Xu que smiled calmly. Before coming to xianyuanzhou, he had tried to play four. If you use healthy qi to seal the magic Sutra, you can kill 40 of them! However, seeing that Xu que didn’t listen to advice, the young man no longer said anything, shook his head, turned and left on crutches. Xu que looks at Xiang min again. Can this gentle looking scum do so hard? The key is to marry Guan Zheng, a silly girl? In fact, Guan Zheng should not be stupid. If he is really stupid, I’m afraid he won’t think of escaping. Oh, no, I’m still stupid. I don’t know how far to escape. I escaped to jinghecheng, which is under the jurisdiction of three cases. What’s the difference between running away from home and running away to my own back garden Soon there was a commotion outside the inn. Xu Xu also obviously felt that dozens of breath were approaching quickly, and there were two groups of people Little sect leader! ” Little Lord! ” Soon, with bursts of voices, dozens of strong Luoxian fell outside the inn. Xiangmin’s fierce expression has a little more joking smile at the moment No shortage of flowers. How are you thinking now? Will you let people go? ” Second, send it. Originally, I planned to send only two copies today, but I didn’t send any copies. It seems that I’m a little sorry for the monthly voters. So the second chapter is sent first, and then I’ll change two chapters during the day, so that we can change the update time after tomorrow to the day. Finally, continue to ask you for monthly tickets.]

chapters.body:
Chapter 1584

Chapter 1584

C.1584

At the moment, Xu que tilted his head and looked at Xiang min with slightly narrowed eyes. His face was clearly with a playful smile and did not respond to Xiang min’s questions.

Such an indifferent, if strategizing look, fell into the eyes of the public, but became ignorant of life and death.

Everyone is watching Xu Ke.

The guy who claims to be the flower of the fried heaven Gang is not weak. At least he is also the existence of the great Luo Jinxian, which is only one step away from the fairy King’s land.

But now the people from the burning gate and the Qinghong sect have come and directly dispatched dozens of strong Da Luoxian.

Looking at the world, I’ve heard of some terrible and extraordinary talents who can defeat ten with one in the same level.

But now there are not ten, but dozens of great Luo immortals.

What’s more, this kind of talent is not necessarily the kind of genius rumored. Otherwise, why haven’t you even heard of its name.

An unknown person, who first arrived in Hecheng, offended three sects and two at once. Facing the arrival of dozens of great Luo immortals, he looked like a dead pig not afraid of boiling water.

I’m afraid it won’t be a genius, but a lengtouqing who doesn’t know how to live or die.

There are many people like this in the fairy world.

Their final outcome is often tragic, ranging from death to life.

“This young man must be more or less unlucky today, with three previous styles…” someone couldn’t help but sigh in a low voice.

“Speak carefully, be careful that misfortune comes out of your mouth.” Others are busy to remind.

The man’s face changed in an instant. He covered his mouth tightly and said in secret that it was dangerous.

How huge are the three sects in this area. Who dares to offend?

I didn’t control my mouth just now. I accidentally spoke my heart out. If it was really heard by the people of the three sects, I’m afraid I’ll lie down later than the flower without shortage.

“There is no shortage of flowers. I am burning the city gate and managing Chengping.”

At this time, Guan Chengping, Guan Zheng’s brother, came forward and looked at Xu que with a gloomy face.

“You are very steady. You don’t talk to me until you call someone, but as I said just now, I can’t stand threats. Do you think it’s necessary for us to talk now?” Xu que smiled.

“Necessary.” Guan Chengping nodded faintly.

He stretched out his hand and pointed to the dozens of strong Luoxian outside the door, and continued: “these are the only people coming now. If you let go of my sister and arrest her, you may still be able to save your life. If I wait for my father to come, or if the Lord Qinghong comes in person… ”

A word.

Guan Chengping exuded a powerful momentum, and his voice suddenly raised: “can you bear the anger of the Immortal King?”

Boom!

In an instant, the whole audience suddenly changed their faces and their scalp became numb.

Who are the leader of the burning city gate and the leader of the Qinghong sect coming here in person?

That’s the fairy king!

Now it’s just a Leng Touqing in Luojin Wonderland who hijacked Guan Zheng and would disturb the two fairy kings?

“This…”

Guan Zheng’s face is white at the moment.

When she saw so many uncles appear, she realized that things were bad.

But I didn’t expect that my brother and Xiang min were shocked by both my father and the leader of Qinghong sect. This problem is obviously serious.

In any case, she did not expect that her temporary method would evolve into this situation.

If you really wait for your father or Lord Qinghong to come in person, isn’t brother Hua

She can’t imagine!

Can’t go on!

“Brother Hua, we have to stop. I’m sorry. I don’t think about it. Let go and I’ll explain it to them.” Guan Zheng patted Xu Ke’s arm and whispered.

Xu Ke was stunned.

Forget it. Since the Lord doesn’t want to act now, forget it.

“OK!”

He immediately nodded and gently pinched his right hand. The feel of the dagger was very good.

The left hand is also pinched, and the feel is OK.

“Brother Hua…”

Guan Zheng obviously felt Xu Ke’s small action, and his small face turned red again in an instant, whispering an angry sentence.

“Ah? Sorry, it’s too long to form muscle memory. ”

Xu que smiled and quickly released his hand. By the way, he skillfully put away the dagger of the magic weapon grade.

As the saying goes, thieves don’t leave empty… Bah, no, the saying is wrong.

This dagger is a reward. People give it voluntarily. How can it be regarded as a thief?

“Sister!”

“Zheng Zheng!”

Seeing Xu que suddenly let go of Guan Zheng, Guan Chengping and Xiang min immediately shouted and rushed up for fear that Xu que would change his attention.

“Brother, wait a minute, you tell Dad they don’t need to come over. In fact, this matter…” Guan Zheng took Guan Chengping’s hand and explained in a low voice.

She told the whole story of herself and Xu Que’s self directed and self performed play, and especially stressed that it was her own idea, “flower without defect” was innocent. After hearing the cause and effect, Guan Chengping and Xiang min’s expression suddenly became strange Smelly girl, I’ve been fooling around as much as I can. Recently, some major events have happened, and everything is very unstable. You…… “Guan Chengping scolded angrily, but he seemed to want to say something later. He stopped when he realized that the occasion was wrong I know it’s wrong. Tell your father they’re just misunderstandings. ” Guan Zheng answered with his mouth tilted All right. ” Guan Chengping is very aware of his sister’s disharmony. In full view of the public, he is too lazy to investigate with Xu vacancy. After all, this guy who claims to have no shortage of flowers is also a great Luojin Wonderland. Even if he and Xiangmin, as the three little masters, have countless resources to supply. Now their accomplishments can reach Da Luo Zhenxian! So it can be seen that the flowers are perfect, and I’m afraid the background is not simple Wait. ” On one side, Xiang min suddenly opened his mouth to stop and waved to many big Luoxian outside the inn. Shua! At the next moment, a group of strong Luo Xian of Qinghong sect rushed into the Inn and surrounded him directly. Just as Guan Chengping was about to speak, a group of great Luo Jinxian of Qinghong sect suddenly came to Xu Que and surrounded him Xiangmin, stop, what are you going to do? ” Seeing this, Guan Zheng shouted quickly. Guan Chengping on one side frowned slightly, and soon stretched out and kept silent. He is very interested in the origin of this flower without shortage. Although the word “fried heaven Gang” has never been heard of, if Xiang min and flower without shortage can make trouble, he may be able to involve the backing forces behind this guy. What’s more, I just borrowed Xiangmin’s hand to teach this unkind boy a lesson. Otherwise, in the future, when her sister runs out of the house, she may be covered by others, which is a very bad influence Zheng Zheng, don’t get involved in this! ” Xiang min glanced at Guan Zheng and said in a deep voice, “if you let this boy leave so easily today, how can I face walking in Hecheng? When this matter comes out in the future, won’t my Xiangmin become the laughing stock of people all over the world? ” He is my friend. Besides, it’s my idea. It has nothing to do with him! ” Guan Zheng explained in a loud voice. However, the words fell in Xiangmin’s ears, and his heart was even more jealous! Who in Hecheng didn’t know that I Xiangmin had an engagement with you Guanzheng, but you avoided me everywhere and even ran away from home many times to oppose the engagement. Now he makes friends with a lengtouqing he just met and is pinched in full view of the public. I haven’t even pinched your hand hair, but you let others pinch it and protect him everywhere when it’s done? Why? Xiangmin thought more and more angry, and the nameless jealousy fire burned more and more in his heart Take it easy, guys. This is really a misunderstanding. I thought you two were the enemies of Guan Zheng. In addition, when the incident happened suddenly, Guan Zheng asked me for help. People of our generation are righteous and sincere. Is there any reason not to help? ” At this time, Xu que stood up and explained. He was awe inspiring and almost convinced Alas, I didn’t expect that the flood washed the Dragon King temple. It turned out that they were all their own people. There was a big misunderstanding. ” Xu que pretended to sigh and said to the crowd, “well, in order to apologize, I’ll help pay for the whole consumption today.” With that, he threw out a spirit stone and landed safely on the counter table of the innkeeper. He was about to leave Stay! ” However, in front of him, a strong man of Qinghong sect, Luo Xian, stopped him and looked at him expressionless Oh, you don’t want me to go? ” Xu Duan asked with a smile Ha ha ha. ” Xiang min then came forward with a laugh, full of banter and ridicule: “flowers are perfect. You can go if you want. In the face of Zheng Zheng, chop off your two dirty hands and kowtow to me. Otherwise… I promise you will be carried out of the inn horizontally.” On the third watch, I asked for a monthly ticket!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1585
chapters.body:
Chapter 1585

Chapter 1585

C.1585

Dirty hands?

Hearing this, the people at the scene held their breath one after another. The atmosphere didn’t dare to take another breath for fear of being angry by Xiang min.

After all, when Xu lacked to “hijack” Guan Zheng, everyone saw the small movements in his hands.

Just because of the power of the three sects, no one dared to talk about it. They could only act as if they didn’t see anything.

Now Xiang min asked Xu to break his hands, kowtow and kneel down to apologize.

Everyone asked himself with deep gratitude. They all felt that this wave was not bad.

However, the main thing is that Guan Zheng pleaded, and Xiang min would only make such a request.

However, people who know Xiangmin’s style know very well that Xiangmin is only hindered by Guan Zheng’s presence, so this request is only to return some face first, and then he will find this flower for liquidation.

“Xiang min, I warn you that if you dare to hurt him, I will be punished with him.” Guan Zheng faced Xiang min’s eyes and shouted.

No

Xu que stood at the window of the wing room, looking at the night outside, and fell into deep thought.

Come as soon as you have seed. You’ll be finished if Ben forces Sheng to fight or not Brother Hua, I’ve talked about this. He immediately reached out and pinched

She screamed with surprise.

One punch!

The man flew backwards in an instant. There was no movement after landing, and there was only one breath left.

The audience was suddenly silent, and everyone held their breath and dared not move.

That’s a real Luo Jinxian!

Alas, I hope people are all right!

“Well, irrelevant personnel hurry up and leave in line. Don’t affect my work.” At this time, Xu Wei waved his hand.

When people hear the speech, they dare to stay more!

However, because Xu lacked said not to jump in line, these big wild escort guests lined up in a long line and slowly walked out of the Chunfeng building for the first time.

After those people left, there were only those female immortals who burned the city gate.

Xu que glanced at them and asked, “where’s the boss?”

“I’m here!” A beautiful woman dressed in brocade and plain soft satin came slowly. Xu Xu is worried about her. Won’t she lose her balance when walking with a pair of papaya? Adhering to the good habit inherited by the fried heaven gang and being willing to help others, Xu que quickly helped the woman take over the papaya: “why do you still bring a gift?” Thank you, young master! ” The woman was stunned and said in a low voice, “I don’t know what you want to do to find me?” Xu Kui stretched out his hand to clean up some dust five inches behind her waist and said positively, “yes, I just received the news that our fried heaven Gang is going to set up a [poverty alleviation foundation] in jinghecheng. As the leader of jinghecheng folk art industry, you have to donate a little.” Help… Poverty alleviation? ” The woman suddenly pulled out a smile and said, “this… This is a good thing. I’m also charitable on weekdays, but I don’t know how much I’m going to want?” You are not well informed! ” Xu Wei smiled: “I said that Hecheng, including three cases, was taken over by my fried tianbang.” Then he gently put down a storage ring and put it on the table: “put all the fairy crystals here and the deeds of sale of these girls. I want them all!” Everyone outside the door was stunned when they heard this! Even the deed of sale? It is said that the forces behind the three sects will come tomorrow, and he is still thinking about it. They do not believe that this flower is capable of dealing with the forces behind the three cases. But they really don’t understand why the boy doesn’t run away, but still makes things so swaggering here. Do you know this is a fatal situation and want to have fun in time? Said to send warmth, send warmth, fried sky Gang never reneged Next! ” Xu Ke waved his hand and walked towards the street At the same time, burn the city gate. In the face of a young man who can defeat the inquiry, Guan LiuMang really has no courage to oppose him Endure! ” Guan LiuMang took a deep breath and said only one word. He knows very well, as long as he can bear it for another day! When the master of Tianmen arrives in Hecheng! He must frustrate the arrogant boy On the other side, the Wuyun building, one of the three I beg your pardon? He went to the pill shop on our Wuyun building! ” Yes, landlord! ” I have never touched him since the Wuyun building happened. He… How can this be so? Young people don’t talk about martial ethics! ” The landlord of Wuyun building was almost not angry when he heard the news. But he is a fairy king and can’t die That huawuvacancy said he would set up a “Wudu branch of fried tianbang poverty alleviation foundation”, which said it was a matter for the benefit of all the people. I hope our Wuyun building will also contribute. ” I’m out of his old wood Second change.]

Still coming?

And this direction

Respect the strong. You should give the respect you deserve!

Don’t miss me, don’t you?

That adult, when on earth will

Suddenly!

coming!

and! There was a young man with a gun behind Yong hang!

I’m afraid that Hecheng will really fall into the hands of flowers.

The scattered practitioners did not expect that such a flower could turn Hecheng upside down.

After hearing Guan LiuMang’s words, Xiong Ba and Xiang Qing’s eyes were all shining!

yes!

Five days!

Just five days!

The feather fairy will come to Hecheng!

Yurou fairy has the strength comparable to xianzun. Moreover, when she cruises around the world, four xianzuns will follow and guard her!

As for the fairy king, there are countless!

As long as the feather soft fairy arrives, the flowers will die!

So we just need to keep waiting.

We really don’t believe it.

How many immortals can you get?

At this time, there was a suburb outside Hecheng.

Yong Xing woke up slowly, but found himself hanging under a tree with his legs tied and his head down.

He was startled at once. Without much thought, he was ready to use his kung fu to remove the shackles, but he found that he could not mobilize any spiritual power at all.

“Wake up?” Xu’s voice sounded, and a stone popped up in his hand to help him turn his body Who are you Yong Xing’s face changed, pretending to be calm, and asked in a deep voice. However, there was a sense of affectation in the tone, which made Xu que very unhappy. He was forced to pretend just now. Now he has become a prisoner. How dare he pretend to force himself? I didn’t pay attention to Ben! Then Ah… Ah… Don’t… “There were bursts of happy voices under the tree. Half an hour later, Yongxing only had a pair of shameful underpants. The whole body is covered with red marks left by Xu Que’s whip. Even there were several bruises on that handsome face. Xu que bit the stinky tofu, shook his head and said with a smile, “tut tut Tut, your mouth is really hard!” You can’t get any information from me! ” Hearing the speech, Xu que couldn’t help sneering. Would he have no choice? No more thinking! Xu que took out a dozen belly pockets directly from the system space. Yong Xing looked at the items in Xu Wei’s hand and showed a look of contempt: “disgusting!” Xu Xu is innocent! This is the reward he got after saving chunfenglou girl. He can swear that he has never done anything dirty Ignorant man, you know a fart! ” Xu que scolded and then launched the art of reading clothes. This is a power from the system when I was in Tiangong Academy. It is very practical! Xu que simply turned it over, selected a lilac small belly pocket, showed a sunny and handsome smile on his face and said, “Xiao Zi, please help ask that underpants and let it tell everything about Tianmen.” See this! Yong Xing was suddenly afraid! The man in front of us is not only a pervert, but also a person with brain problems! He! He’s talking to a belly pocket! And said he wanted to find out from his underpants. However, after counting the interest… “Oh? You fairy Yurou will arrive in Jinghe city in five days? ” Xu que looked up at Yongxing with a smile. Yong Xing’s face changed! How is this… Possible? How did he know… No, no! It must be the news the boy got from three previous cases! Otherwise… “Oh? Eight immortals and 33 immortals? This is forcing me to hit forty-one? ” You… What magic did you use? ” Yongxing was not calm this time. He was very shocked! There are usually only four immortals guarding the Taoist path around Yurou fairy, but recently, because of some things, eight immortals have been temporarily arranged to guard. This is the secret of Tianmen! Even Yongxing never understood the reason! But few people in Tianmen know this arrangement. How did this guy know? Yong Xing couldn’t help staring at his underpants. Was it really a leak? I haven’t changed my underpants for hundreds of years. I know a lot about these underpants…….. [Third watch.]
