chapters.body:
Chapter 1597

Chapter 1597

C.1597

The more Yongxing thought, the more flustered he became.

If today’s incident is stabbed to the gate of heaven, how should I report it then?

Don’t you think so, sir, my underpants leaked the secret. I’ve never betrayed Tianmen!

Crazy!

Who would believe this?

“Oh? You talk a lot in your underpants. I can’t imagine that your boy still has that relationship with his immediate boss… “At this time, Xu lacked his eyebrows and gave him a meaningful look.

I didn’t expect this product to be serious!

“You… Don’t go too far! What else do you want to know! I tell you! ”

“No!” Xu que clapped his hands and took back the dozen belly pockets: “now, you’re useless!”

Hearing this, Yongxing couldn’t help but panic.

It can’t be true?

If you don’t catch me, just ask me in my underpants, will you fool me?

“Brother Hua, please spare my life. I’m still useful!” Yong Xing shouted hurriedly.

Xu Ke was stunned for a moment, which forced him to reply hard just now. He pretended not to know who I was. Now he calls brother Hua?

Seeing Xu que didn’t reply, Yongxing hurriedly continued: “I think your Excellency and I have common hobbies, so…”

Xu Ke’s face is full of question marks! Direct hand up and down!

“Who has a common hobby with you!”

Those belly pockets are really other people’s thank-you gifts. At that time, looking at the grateful eyes of those girls, Xu Kegen couldn’t refuse!

If you can refuse, which serious person would want to take this thing?

On the other side, the top floor of Tianmen Wudu branch Tianta.

A man in black came in a hurry, knelt at the door and said in a deep voice.

In the attic, a woman in a long white dress slowly got up from her seat, walked to the window and stared at the direction of Hecheng.

After counting the interest, he calmly said, “we’ll start early.”

“But…” the black robed man was surprised: “but things here…”

The woman frowned slightly. After pondering a little, she said faintly, “there are only some finishing things left. Please stay and deal with them. I’ll go first.”

“Yes, my subordinates!”

The man in black didn’t dare to question again. He hurriedly replied and hurried back.

When the man in black left, the woman in white took back her eyes and frowned again.

Between the beautiful eyes, I couldn’t help but flash a touch of doubt.

She found her hand trembling slightly.

She whispered, “what the hell is there over there.”

She has practiced for many years and was regarded as a feather soft fairy by friar xianyuanzhou!

There has never been a bottleneck on the road of practice, and there has never been any worry in life!

But this time… I just took a look at the direction of Hecheng!

She felt as if she had something to pull, but she had to be distracted at once!

Is there something over there that I have lost for a long time?

This wonderful throbbing made Yurou fairy feel uneasy.

After some hesitation, her figure gradually faded from the Tianlou Pavilion, turned into a wisp of smoke, and swept away in the direction of Jinghe city.

On the way, with the help of several special transmission arrays, she arrived in Jinghe city in just two days.

Although the so-called three selection is a major event in Tianmen, it is not important to her.

She came to unexpectedly Hecheng quietly, and did not disturb anyone, let alone let the people of the three sects know.

She changed an ordinary woman’s face. She walked quietly in the street, looking for something to guide her heart.

The other side.

After Yurou left Tianmen for a long time, several immortal protectors also hurried to deal with their affairs and set out in a hurry.

Yurou fairy is the next leader of Tianmen and the most likely person to become the next Immortal Emperor.

The whole Tianmen attaches great importance to her!

Even though they knew that this was only a part of Yurou fairy, several Taoist protectors still dared not relax.

They set out half a day later than fairy Yurou, and were about to arrive at Jinghe city.

Someone struck a talisman and swept away.

Soon, a spell floated slowly in the three venues.

Seeing this, Guan LiuMang couldn’t help getting excited!

coming!

They’re finally coming!

Fried heaven sect flower is perfect!

Your death is coming!

Whoosh!

At the same time, the spell glowed with gold, gradually condensing the figure of an old man.

“We have left ahead of time and arrived within an hour.”

When the words fell, the spell turned into ashes.

The three sects are not even qualified to talk to the old man.

“Brother Guan! In an hour, will we have time to prepare? ” Xiong Ba is a little nervous. Because they know very well that they will see the strongest fairy Yurou of the younger generation of xianyuanzhou soon! Xiangqing also looked at Guan LiuMang. Now among the three sects, only their Qinghong sect is not as strong as the fairy king. Guan LiuMang said in a deep voice, “first hurry to summon the disciples. Anyway, the battle to meet fairy Yurou must be big.” At this moment, he was in the countryside outside Hecheng. After handling Yonghang, Xu que did not return to Jinghe city. He sat in a cave and was preparing everything. Now that we have learned that xiaorou will come, we must make a comprehensive plan and make comprehensive arrangements for all plans. The simplest way is to wait for xiaorou to show up, regardless of whether she has any previous memory, pick it up and run. People get the most important. As for her memory loss, there will always be a way to solve it anyway An hour later. It is still the gate of Jinghe city. The people of the three sects have been ready and have been waiting outside the city for more than half an hour. Suddenly! A vast breath floated from afar! Great joy in the hearts of the three religions! coming! Yurou fairy finally came! Now they don’t have to guard against Xu deficiency at all! Because they believe that if Hua wuduan dares to make trouble at this time, he will be killed by fairy Yurou’s Dharma protector. The people of the three sects knelt down and shouted, “welcome fairy Yurou! Welcome to your excellency! ” The spirit boat they rode in was more wrong than Yongxing! There is no comparability at all! This should be called a heavenly boat! It is so suspended in the sky, the size of which is comparable to that of half a crane city! Then, twenty black figures appeared from the spirit boat, all wearing black robes, and even their faces were covered tightly This… What is this! ” Unexpectedly, the casual repair in Hecheng couldn’t help looking up at the spirit boat in the air. His mouth was so open that he could put 20 million golf balls in it Is this the force behind the three sects? A Yongxing died, and now there is such a big battle! ” This spirit boat… “A man’s eyes were full of excitement:” it seems to be the ‘Emperor boat’ of Tianmen, but it’s the ride of fairy Yurou! ” When hearing this, everyone was stunned! Yurou fairy! The Yurou fairy who is known as xianyuanzhou is most likely to become the next Immortal Emperor! She should appear in Hecheng At this time, Yurou fairy, who was walking in the streets of the city, also looked up at the sky. The defenders came so quickly. However, she has traveled all over Jinghe City, but she still hasn’t found the person or thing she wants Is it… Just an illusion? ” She frowned. With her current state of mind and strength, how can there be an illusion Fourth, send it to. Originally, I still wanted to stabilize the update of two chapters. After all, saving the manuscript is also very precious. You don’t vote very much these two days, and you have a lot less subscriptions. Alas, I won’t mention it. But if you don’t even vote for free recommendation, my heart will break!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1598
chapters.body:
Chapter 1598

Chapter 1598

C.1598

Outside the crane city.

Many people in black slowly stepped out of the flying boat and fell to the ground.

The first few people’s eyes were cold and swept the audience.

The people of the three religions held their breath and dared not speak.

“Have you arranged the selection?” At this time, a man in black asked faintly.

Xiong Ba, the landlord of Wuyun building, hurriedly replied: “back to adults, we have prepared the selection venue and the list of candidates, but…”

“Just what?”

Seeing the Tianmen strongman answer, Xiong Ba, who plays the most, tears directly in his eyes and cries on the ground: “my Lord! You must decide for me! That flower is perfect… ”

The black robed man snorted coldly, and a fierce and incomparable momentum slowly swung away from him: “Yongxing has already reported this matter, there is no need to say, he will die!”

In an instant! Unexpectedly, the tower of Hecheng began to shake.

Some fine stones fell off slowly. It seemed that a god of death holding a sickle blade appeared in front of the scattered repairmen in the city. I’m afraid the whole crane city would be destroyed in an instant when he waved the sickle blade!

Some timid friars have swept back a few miles now. The oppressive force is so terrible that they can’t bear it at all.

But if you can see such a strong person in your lifetime, you will die without regret!

They thought that Yongxing’s momentum was strong enough, but after seeing xianzun, they knew what people were outside and mountains were outside!

If Yongxing’s authority is like the surging water of a river, the immortal’s momentum is a mysterious and powerful ocean with seemingly calm but actually surging waves.

“Is this the power of xianzun!”

They never thought that the power of monks could reach such a level!

And this moment! Guan LiuMang was even more delighted!

Xianzun is so powerful!

If it was one of the them who came here, how could he let that flower run wild?

“Where is the flower now?”

Hearing this, the three sects were stunned!

These days they really haven’t heard any more news about flowers and flowers, and they don’t dare to inquire about his whereabouts. After all, it’s good if the guy doesn’t come out to harm them.

But now, how do you answer that?

“Speak!” Seeing that they didn’t answer, the man in black couldn’t help drinking!

“Big, sir, I don’t know!”

As soon as he finished, the three leaders felt a chill invading their bodies

Guan LiuMang and Xiong Ba hate each other very much at the moment. What are you doing with flowers?

Guan LiuMang responded first, fell on his knees and shouted, “Sir, spare your life!”

But the man in black didn’t listen to their explanation at all!

Raise your feet!

Next moment! Xiangqing’s brain flower was directly ejected into Guan LiuMang’s face!

After venting, the breath of black robed people will gradually stabilize.

But even so, the strong breath is not what they can bear!

Guan LiuMang, they are too scared to lift their heads!

It’s only a few days. Qinghong sect will hold another banquet again.

If we continue like this, can qinghongzong still have the money to start?

At this time, another man in black came out slowly and said, “that man has the strength to kill Yongxing. What do you expect these wastes to do?”

The man looked into the city and suddenly sighed, “don’t forget our purpose!”

When the black robed man’s divine consciousness spread out, the feather fairy standing at one end of the city tower had already gathered her breath. She didn’t want to be found by the protector.

She came to Hecheng just to find the person or thing that affected her mind, but she got nothing.

As for the three selections, she didn’t care. If it weren’t for the teacher’s explanation, she wouldn’t care at all.

“Hum!”

When the man in black heard his companion’s words, he couldn’t help humming: “if you can’t do anything, what’s the use of keeping it!”

A moment later, there were wind and sand outside the Crane City, and the killing intention was long!

But even so, Guan LiuMang didn’t even dare to escape!

In front of several immortals in front of me, I’m afraid that if I have a little disrespect, I will be crushed to death by a powerful momentum.

Only then will they miss flowers!

If he shows up, the predecessors of Tianmen will not embarrass them any more!

I don’t know if I’ve had a lot of bad luck recently!

When this thought rose in their hearts, a young man in white rushed frantically towards this place, with an excited look on his face!

No shortage of flowers!

Their three greatest enemies!

At this moment, they appeared in front of them like gods coming down to earth!

“Miss brother! Brother Kuang is here. My big brother is here at last! ” Guan LiuMang’s eyes lit up and couldn’t help shouting in his heart!

But now all the immortals in Tianmen are here. He dares to take the lead. He’s really brave. I admire him Sir, he’s here. He’s the flower of the fried heaven gang. ” At the same time, Xiong Ba, the landlord of Wuyun building, also shouted. As soon as his voice fell, he felt the smell of the man in black before him like a sword! In this sword, Guan LiuMang almost suffocated! But in front of these immortals, how dare they move, otherwise they will come to an end with Xiangqing. Therefore, they can only continue to lean on their bodies, their foreheads close to the ground, hoping that no one can pay attention to them as a mass of garbage on the ground. At this time, Xu Xu also looked dignified. He can naturally feel the killing intention of the man in black! But today he has only one purpose, that is to take xiaorou! But which of the many people in black is xiaorou? And… “No! Should not! How can there be no smell of xiaorou! ” Xu Ke’s divine knowledge swept out and couldn’t help but be stunned: “is it because after reshaping the flesh, he changed xiaorou’s breath?” For this speculation, fried tianbang Conan is quite confident! He firmly believes that as long as xiaorou is among these people, even if it is only a pair of eyes, he can recognize it! But now these black robed people use special masks to block their faces and the exploration of divine consciousness. Even their eyes look only dark, and even the heavenly eye can’t see everything What are you doing all this mystery? ” Xu que took a deep breath! It seems that we can only remove all the masks of these people in black first! Whoosh! With a wave of his big hand, he calmly took out the purple gold forced King’s staff. When one man was in charge of the pass, no one could open it. He blocked it in front of the crowd. The forced King’s staff pointed directly at many people in black robes and shouted in a deep voice: “the leader of the fried heaven gang has no shortage of flowers. Now I suspect you kidnapped my wife. Quickly lift the mask and let me identify them one by one. You have the right to remain silent, but every word you say will become a last word. “??” No matter the three sects or Tianmen people were completely stunned when they heard this! What is he talking about? Kidnap his wife? What we say will be our last words? Just a big Luo Jinxian, why does he dare to talk so much! Doesn’t this boy have a brain to find fault? But they looked at Xu’s eyes and felt that it seemed to be true At the same time, not far from the city wall. The feather soft fairy was also slightly stunned. She couldn’t help but cast her eyes and looked at the figure carefully. There are many young friars among their guardians. Although they are older, is it true? But… When they enter the gate of heaven, they will cut off the past. They are afraid of no fate anymore Junior, do you know what nonsense you are talking about? ” At this time, one of the black robed people said. The voice fell, but another man in black made a direct move: “what’s the nonsense with him!” Seeing his sudden attack, Xu que didn’t care. His mind moved and forced the metal sheet on the king’s staff to shoot out, flying towards the man in black like a bullet! That’s a strong immortal! Xu Ke, who has not yet opened any state, naturally cannot cause any substantive damage to him. Seeing this scene, the hearts of the three religions were overjoyed! Although the boy has the strength to fight with the fairy king, he has become powerless in the face of xianzun Junior! Are you tickling? ” Xu que takes back the metal piece and turns it into purple gold armor. It’s dazzling! Seeing this, the man in black couldn’t help humming coldly: “joke!” Then, the man in black blew out with a fist, which was like a giant beast hunting and flying

Chapter 1599

Chapter 1599

C.1599

Boom!

Nima, the two brothers surnamed Xiang of Qinghong clan died unjustly. The two tables… Forget it, don’t mention it.

Then! The wind and sand all over the sky seemed to be frozen and stopped in mid air!

The breath of this immortal black robed man is at least three times stronger than before!

But

It’s just to improve the breath! Who didn’t?

“Murder book!”

A magnificent air wave suddenly burst out from Xu Shao’s feet and directly collided with the sword Qi on the man in black robe!

Guan LiuMang trembled, and a smell came out of his pants

However, the lack of breath is still rising at the moment!

Boom!

Gas burst!

what the fuck! What kind of secret is this? Why can you improve so much in an instant?

“That’s interesting! Tianmen needs talents like you, but it’s a pity… ”

Moreover, xiaorou has amnesia. If she also makes moves, although she can maintain her reason in the state of Zhengqi sealing magic Sutra, it is difficult to control her power.

If you hurt her unknowingly, wouldn’t it be a loss of blood!

So we have to find her first.

In the final analysis, the strength is too weak. Otherwise, all the women present, regardless of the fairy king and Fairy Statue, carry them home and take them off… Well, take off the masks one by one, and you can always find out which is xiaorou.

Someone will ask, why touch? Eyes can’t see?

Yes, I have eyes, but I don’t look. I have to learn to touch the blind and elephant. Ah, just play!

However, Xu Que’s action of rushing into the crowd also stunned everyone present.

What does this guy want?

fall into a snare?

What’s the difference between this and dying!

At this time, a group of black robed people in fairyland also made a defensive posture immediately, with a high sense of war!

There are so many immortal kings. Xiaorou doesn’t know which one is. Fools fight indiscriminately. If they accidentally hit xiaorou and spread it out later, don’t they all have to shout Ben forced saint?

Shua!

Xu Xu is covered with lightning. His body method and fire power are all open, just like a lightning arc, directly jumping in the crowd.

Such a speed also made everyone feel cold again.

The eyes of several immortal zuns also flashed a different color.

This son is really gifted!

But before everyone could appreciate his picturesque posture, one of them, a fiery fairy king in black, suddenly felt cold on his face, as if he had been brushed by a breeze.

Then the whole mask fell off.

“Oh…”

After listening to a retch, Xu que flashed away with a pale face. He didn’t forget to mutter: “Bai blind, with such a good figure and such a marijuana face, it scared people to death.”

“You…” the fairy King woman blushed and was as angry as thunder.

Are you blind? Where’s the pockmarks on my face? So it’s all moles. Do you understand beauty moles?

At this time, Xu que had already extended his hand to the mask of the second man in black.

This is still a fairy king. His figure looks very similar to xiaorou.

As a result, the mask was taken off.

“I’ll go. Who are you? Why only one eye? Oh, sorry, I didn’t see it clearly. The other eye is too small. ”

Next Sleeping trough, grandma, keep a good figure. It doesn’t look at your face. I haven’t seen that you’re very old! ” Next Oh, hey, aunt, you… I don’t know what to say. It’s hard to say. ” Next Ouch, this young man… Women also have beards? ” In an instant, Xu que aroused public anger. Huge public anger. Many fairy kings were angry and smoke. The boy has a broken mouth. It’s too damaging and cheap. The people of sanzong were so frightened that they almost wanted to shout lying trough. This guy is really invincible. Can he die like this Boom! Boom! Boom! ” More than a dozen fairy kings shot directly, and a large number of Dharma formulas smashed at Xu que. But Xu que avoided them all. The lightning arc crossed the crowd. Xu que appeared in front of a immortal and powerful man, and his big hand directly poked into his face mask Die! ” The immortal powerful man was instantly angry. It’s enough for you to flirt with the fairy king. I’m a great immortal. Do you dare to uncover my mother’s cover? Whew! A flash of sword light flashed in an instant Under the metallic trill of “Qiang”. Xu Ke’s whole body was shocked and retreated a few steps, and his body suddenly stopped. There was an obvious scratch on the metal sheet on the arm, but the metal on it slowly began to wriggle and recovered as before Kill! ” The immortal respected strong man drank in a deep voice and ordered the other fairy kings to fight together. She doesn’t care about face. She just doesn’t want to waste time here That’s enough. That’s the end of the farce. Cut off this person’s head within five seconds. Don’t wait for us to do it ourselves. ” At the same time, the Dharma protector also spoke coldly Yes! ” Everyone immediately responded in unison, including the second Dharma protector who fought with Xu Xu before Second, more. Is this chapter long? Do you want to go to the fourth watch today? Do you have a recommended ticket and a monthly ticket? I want them all.]

chapters.title: Chapter 1600
chapters.body:
Chapter 1600

Chapter 1600

C.1600

Boom!

In an instant, there was a constant earthquake outside Hecheng.

The Mantian Dharma formula is shining and pervading the sky. The whole sky is rendered colorful and distorted!

Many powerful immortal kings in Tianmen are extremely angry with Xu que. They will receive the order of the great Dharma protector and work harder. They will sacrifice immortal weapons one after another and directly chase and kill Xu que.

This picture shocked and envied the people of the three religions.

Tianmen is so terrible!

Every fairy king has at least one fairy weapon in his hand. Although the grade is slightly lower, this treatment is really greedy!

How do you play this wave?

No matter how good you are, you can’t get so many fairy kings, not to mention several immortal zuns.

Unexpectedly, countless monks in Hecheng are also watching this scene and marveling.

“This flower is really powerful. Through the ages, I have never heard that anyone can fight in daluojin fairyland, but there are so many fairy kings in the first World War, not to mention the power to fight with the strong ones of xianzun.”

“After today, no matter whether the flower is alive or dead, the fried tianbang flower will surely become famous all over the world.”

“Oh, is it life or death? It must be dead. What’s the use of fame for people who are dead? ”

“Also, in a few years at most, the name will be forgotten by the world.”

“After all, it’s still too young and a pity. With such talent, if you practice for tens of thousands of years, I’m afraid it’s stronger than fairy Yurou, even…… ”

“Shh, Taoist friends, be careful. The people of Tianmen are outside the city. You dare to talk like this. Be careful that misfortune comes out of your mouth.”

Soon, everyone changed the topic one after another, and no longer mentioned the word Yurou fairy.

However, sister Sizi… That is, fairy Yurou, heard all this clearly.

But it won’t bring her any emotional ups and downs.

In her opinion, these people do not understand that strength and realm are sometimes two very different things.

Some people may have strong qualifications, far more strength than the same level, or even be able to fight more than the same level.

But if such a person can’t move to a higher level, he can only fight others in that level forever.

Although some people with strong talents are not invincible at the same level, they will be invincible in the world if they can step into xianzun realm, Xiandi realm, or even higher Tao realm in the future.

Therefore, some comments and comparisons are meaningless to her.

With her state of mind, how can there be emotional fluctuations.

But

At this time, she was still very confused.

Why is there such a place as Hecheng? What will affect her peaceful heart.

I visited the whole city of Jinghe, but I got nothing.

“Why on earth…”

The feather soft fairy frowned again. Even if she turned into an extremely ordinary woman at the moment, she still showed a dusty temperament.

Fortunately, now everyone is attracted by the battlefield, but few people will notice that such a strange woman is hiding in the hidden position of the city wall.

“My God!” At this time, the crowd in Hecheng suddenly exclaimed.

“Hua Wuque took over the cooperation of the two immortals, but he was only slightly injured!”

“Fart minor injury, that guy must have a powerful healing holy method, and the injury recovers very quickly.”

“Yes, if I hadn’t seen it in time, the wound would have healed directly.”

Many people talked about it.

The feather fairy could not help but be attracted and turned her eyes to the battlefield again.

There is no shortage of such strange means. Is there really such a shortage of young people?

“Bang!”

However, the situation on the battlefield began to be bad.

After the two immortal zuns joined hands and were directly forced by Xu que, the expressions under the masks of several immortal zuns were extremely dignified.

Even the great Dharma protector didn’t care about the order to cut Xu’s head with five breath.

She also saw that this flower is really extraordinary.

If it can be included in Tianmen

Just thinking of this, the Dharma protector shook his head.

In fact, Tianmen does not lack talents, let alone such powerful thugs.

How strong is a person?

After all, it’s just a big Luo Jinxian.

If this person didn’t offend Tianmen, it’s just that he made it big. Everyone in Hecheng knows it. If he doesn’t kill this person, he will be recruited into the portal. How will Tianmen become powerful in the future?

“That’s it!”

Finally, the Dharma protector took action.

As the most powerful immortal among several people, she just raised her hand and slapped in the air.

Dong!

The emptiness in front of the palm sank and burst into cracks.

Then an invisible powerful impact rushed straight at Xu Ke’s head.

“Lying trough!”

Xu Ke was startled in an instant.

What kind of Yin move is this?

“System…” Xu Ke immediately called out the system to help.

Unfortunately, it’s still a little late.

Boom!

The terrible sound exploded in an instant.

Xu Ke was beaten hundreds of meters away and stumbled to the ground. His face was white and a wisp of blood was suddenly coughed up in his mouth.

“How?”

The great Dharma protector looked at Xu Wei coldly, “are you going to arrest him or… I’ll kill you myself?”

“Kill you!”

Xu lacks anger.

An immortal, are you plotting against me?

And when Ben forced saint to fight with dozens of people, he ran out to plot against me?

That’s all. How dare you pretend to force me?

The tiger doesn’t get angry. Do you really think I’m a sick cat?

“Positive gas seal…”

There was a flash of golden and red lightning in Xu Que’s eyes. He was about to show the righteous Qi sealing magic Sutra and cook these immortal zuns first.

However, he had not really entered the state of madness, but suddenly stopped.

“Xiao Rou?”

He was stunned with a look of surprise.

Because just now, he clearly felt an extremely weak breath.

The smell is very familiar, too familiar.

It’s obviously xiaorou’s!

So xiaorou is really here!

Xu Ke woke up in an instant. He was a little distracted, but he didn’t dare to use Zhengqi to seal the magic Sutra.

If you can’t control your power once you use it, you may be seriously hurt or even killed in this group, and the consequences will be… Unbearable!

At this time, he was on the city wall of Hecheng.

The feather fairy’s eyes are full of different colors.

Just now, when she witnessed the young man being hit hard by the great Dharma protector’s move, her heart, which should be as calm as water, suddenly ripples

An unspeakable feeling, very strong, distracted her on the spot.

Fortunately, she responded quickly, quickly sealed and covered her own breath, and calmed the ups and downs of Tao heart.

Her eyes turned to the battlefield ahead again, staring at Xu Ke’s figure, and the corners of her mouth trembled slightly: “who is this person… Exactly? What does it have to do with me? ”

At the same time, in the battlefield.

The Dharma protector was scolded by Xu Ke. He was stunned and stayed for a while before he calmed down.

How many years?

How many million years?

I have never heard anyone dare to be so disrespectful to me.

How dare you insult this guy?

“You want to die!”

The Dharma protector was so angry that he raised his hand and suddenly pressed forward.

Boom!

The clouds and clouds in the whole sky surged, and the vast aura in the four directions converged rapidly, and instantly condensed into a huge palm print to block out the sky and the sun.

The majestic pressure suddenly pressed on everyone’s shoulders like huge mountains.

Xu Ke also reacted at this time. Seeing this move, he was immediately happy.

I can do this, too!

But

Xu que hesitated for a moment and really let go of his hands and feet to fight. If he didn’t use Zhengqi to seal the magic Sutra, he would certainly not be the opponent of these immortal giants.

We need another way!

Xu Ke’s eyes narrowed slightly and suddenly flashed a touch of Lingguang.

“Yes!”

He suddenly raised a smile at the corners of his mouth and quickly collected it.

At this time, the second Dharma protector and the other two immortals have joined hands to kill.

The Dharma guardians have done it themselves. How dare they spare their strength?

At this moment, he has gone all out and directly used the killing move.

“Tianmen bullied people too much and robbed my wife. Now they bully more and bully the weak. The people of our tianbang sect are indomitable and never bow to evil forces. I have no shortage of flowers. Even if I die in battle today, I will fight with you to the end.”

As soon as Xu Kushen drank, his words were magnificent.

Several immortal zuns were stunned. Before the killing moves were formed, they saw Xu que walking like a suicidal reckless man and directly rushed over!

Boom!

Under a huge sound, Xu Ke was rushed out with the air wave.

Even if it’s an unformed killing move, after all, it’s the strength of xianzun, which can’t be underestimated.

Xu que fell to the ground and hit a huge pit.

The purple gold armor on the body began to crack, turned into a wisp of liquid metal, and returned to the Purple Gold King forcing staff.

“Poof!”

At the same time, he suddenly coughed up a mouthful of blood, his face became more pale, his breath dropped sharply and his momentum was listless He can’t! ” Everyone saw this and suddenly realized it. This guy must have used some secret skills before he became so powerful. Now the secret skill has been broken and hit back to its original shape. So weak, this is a reasonable great Luojin Wonderland End all this! ” When the Dharma protector saw this, he frowned, waved his sleeve and robe, and removed the huge palm print from the sky. Since this person is already weak, there is no need to kill himself. After giving an order, she turned around and didn’t even want to look at Xu again. The second Dharma protector and several other immortals also stopped. If you are so weak, don’t you dirty your hands by doing it yourself? Anyway, to deal with these finishing things, there are those fairy kings. Therefore, a group of black robed people in the fairyland, with a joke and sneer, rushed to Xu que one after another. All kinds of killing moves have condensed! The immortals disdained to take action. It just suits their wishes. They can avenge the previous humiliation. At this time, Xu que was embarrassed and got up from the ground with great “difficulty”. His mouth was full of blood, and his eyes were full of complexity and loneliness. He turned a blind eye to the strong Immortal King who came from all directions. The next moment, he suddenly shouted: “xiaorou… Are you serious about doing this to me? Have you really forgotten me? ” The third extended version is delivered.]
